H1: אב | 意義: 1) father of an individual; 2) of God as father of his people; 3) head or founder of a household,  group,  family,  or clan; 4) ancestor; 4a) grandfather,  forefathers — of person; 4b) of people; 5) originator or patron of a class,  profession,  or art; 6) of producer,  generator (fig.); 7) of benevolence and protection (fig.); 8) term of respect and honour; 9) ruler or chief (spec.) (譯作: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.)
H2: אב | 意義: 1) father (譯作: father.)
H3: אב | 意義: 1) freshness,  fresh green,  green shoots,  or greenery (譯作: greenness, fruit.)
H4: אב | 意義: 1) fruit,  fresh,  young,  greening (譯作: fruit.)

(譯作: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.)

H8: אבד | 意義: 1) destruction (譯作: perish.)

H11: אבדון | 意義: 1) place of destruction,  destruction,  ruin,  Abaddon (譯作: destruction.)

H13: אבדן | 意義: 1) destruction (譯作: destruction.)

H16: אבה | 意義: 1) reed,  papyrus; ++++; Probably ships made of reeds or papyrus were the clipper sailing ships of those days because of their speed. (譯作: swift.)
H17: אבוי | 意義: 1) Oh!,  Woe!,  (exclamation of pain — indicates desire or uneasiness) (譯作: sorrow.)
H18: אבוס | 意義: 1) crib,  manger,  feeding trough (譯作: crib.)
H19: אבחה | 意義: 1) slaughter,  flesh,  meat,  slaughtered meat (譯作: point.)
H20: אבטיח | 意義: 1) watermelon,  Egyptian fruit (譯作: melon.)
H21: אבי | 意義: Abi = "my father"; 1) mother of Hezekiah (cf  H029) (譯作: Abi.)
H22: אביאל | 意義: Abiel = "El (God) is (my) father"; 1) Saul's grandfather (譯作: Abiel.)
H23: אביאסף | 意義: Abiasaph = "my father has gathered"; 1) son (descendant) of Korah (譯作: Abiasaph.)
H24: אביב | 意義: 1) fresh,  young barley ears,  barley; 2) month of ear-forming,  of greening of crop,  of growing green Abib,  month of exodus and passover (March or April) (譯作: Abib, ear, green ears of corn (not maize).)
H25: אבי גבעון | 意義: Abi Gibon = "father of Gibeon"; 1) site of great Bamah,  location of the tabernacle of the Lord in the high place (譯作: father of Gibeon.)
H26: אביגיל | 意義: Abigail = "my father is joy"; 1) wife of Nabal,  then of David; 2) sister of David (譯作: Abigal.)
H27: אבידן | 意義: Abidan = "my father is judge"; 1) a prince (ruler) of Benjamin (譯作: Abidan.)
H28: אבידע | 意義: Abida or Abidah = "my father knows"; 1) fourth son of Midian and grandson of Abraham by his wife Keturah (after Sarah died) (譯作: Abida, Abidah.)
H29: אביה | 意義: Abia or Abiah or Abijah = "Jehovah is (my) father"; 1) king of Judah,  son and successor of Rehoboam; 2) second son of Samuel; 3) son of Jeroboam the first,  king of Israel; 4) son of Becher,  a Benjamite; 5) head of a priestly house (one of the 24 Levite groups); 6) head of a priestly house (after the exile); 7) wife of Hezron; 8) mother of Hezekiah (cf  H021) (譯作: Abiah, Abijah.)
H30: אביהוא | 意義: Abihu = "he is (my) father"; 1) a son of Aaron destroyed for sacrificing strange fire to God (譯作: Abihu.)
H31: אביהוד | 意義: Abihud = "my father is majesty"; 1) son of Bela,  a Benjamite (譯作: Abihud.)
H32: אביהיל | 意義: Abihail = "my father is might"; 1) a Levite in Moses's time; 2) a Gadite; 3) father of Esther; 4) wife of Abishur; 5) wife of Rehoboam (譯作: Abihail.)
H33: אבי העזרי | 意義: Abiezrite = "my father is help"; 1) one of the family of Abiezer,  a descendant of Joseph's son,  Manasseh (譯作: Abiezrite.)
H34: אביון | 意義: 1) in want,  needy,  chiefly poor,  needy person; 2) subject to oppression and abuse; 3) needing help,  deliverance from trouble,  especially as delivered by God; 4) general reference to lowest class (譯作: beggar, needy, poor (man).)
H35: אביונה | 意義: 1) caper-berry-of stimulating desire (譯作: desire.)
H36: אביטוב | 意義: Abitub = "my father is good(ness)"; 1) son of Shaharaim,  a Benjamite (譯作: Abitub.)
H37: אביטל | 意義: Abital = "my father is (the) dew"; 1) a wife of David (譯作: Abital.)
H38: אבים | 意義: Abijam = "my father is the sea" or "Yah(u) is (my) father"; 1) king of Judah,  son and successor of Rehoboam (譯作: Abijam.)
H39: אבימאל | 意義: Abimael = "my father is El (God)"; 1) son of Joktan,  descendant of Shem (譯作: Abimael.)
H40: אבימלך | 意義: Abimelech = "Melek is father" or "my father is king"; 1) king of Gerar in Abraham's time; 2) king of Gath in David's time; maybe title of Philistine kings; 3) son of Gideon by a concubine; 4) priest,  son of Abiathar (譯作: Abimelech.)
H41: אבינדב | 意義: Abinadab = "my father is noble" or "my father is willing"; 1) a man of Gibeah who sheltered the ark; 2) second son of Jesse,  David's older brother; 3) a son of Saul,  slain with him by the Philistines (譯作: Abinadab.)
H42: אבינעם | 意義: Abinoam = "my father is delight"; 1) father of Barak,  descendant of Naphtali (譯作: Abinoam.)
H43: אביסף | 意義: Ebiasaph = "my father has gathered"; 1) a son or descendant of Korah (譯作: Ebiasaph.)
H44: אביעזר | 意義: Abiezer = "my father is help"; 1) a Manassite,  called "son" of Gilead,  also son of Gilead's sister; 2) a Benjamite,  warrior of David (譯作: Abiezer.)
H45: אביעלבון | 意義: Abialbon = "El (God) is my father"; 1) one of David's mighty men (hero) (譯作: Abialbon.)
H46: אביר | 意義: 1) strong,  mighty-used only to describe God; 2) the Strong-old name for God (poetic) (譯作: mighty (one).)
H47: אביר | 意義: 1) mighty,  valiant; 1a) of men; 1b) of angels; 1c) of animals; 1d) (metaph); 1d1) of enemies; 1d2) of princes; 1d3) of sacrificial objects; 1e) obstinate (fig.) (譯作: angel, bull, chiefest, mighty (one), stout(-hearted), strong (one), valiant.)
H48: אבירם | 意義: Abiram = "my father is exalted" or "(the) Exalted One is (my) father"; 1) a Reubenite,  son of Eliab in exodus; 2) son of Hiel the Bethelite who worked to rebuild Jericho (譯作: Abiram.)
H49: אבישג | 意義: Abishag = "my father is a wanderer"; 1) David's beautiful young nurse (譯作: Abishag.)
H50: אבישוע | 意義: Abishua = "my father is rescue (safety), or is opulence"; 1) son of Phinehas,  grandson of Aaron (譯作: Abishua.)
H51: אבישור | 意義: Abishur = "my father is a wall"; 1) son of Shammai,  descendant of Judah (譯作: Abishur.)
H52: אבישי | 意義: Abishai = "my father is Jesse" or "my father is a gift"; 1) grandson of Jesse,  nephew of David via his sister Zeruiah, brother of Joab (譯作: Abishai.)
H53: אבישלום | 意義: Absalom or Abishalom = "my father is peace"; 1) father-in-law of Rehoboam; 2) third son of David,  killer of first-born son Amnon,  also leader of revolt against his father-David (譯作: Abishalom, Absalom.)
H54: אביתר | 意義: Abiathar = "my father is great"; 1) priest,  son of Ahitub (Ahimelech),  faithful to David,  but later rebelled with Adonijah (譯作: Abiathar.)
H55: אבך | 意義: 1) to roll,  turn; 1a) (Hithpael) to roll,  roll up,  billow (譯作: mount up.)
H56: אבל | 意義: 1) to mourn,  lament; 1a) (Qal) to mourn,  lament; 1a1) of humans; 1a2) of inanimate objects (fig.); 1a2a) of gates; 1a2b) of land; 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to mourn,  cause to mourn (fig.); 1c) (Hithpael); 1c1) to mourn; 1c2) play the mourner (譯作: lament, mourn.)
H57: אבל | 意義: 1) mourning; 1a) for the dead; 1b) because of calamity; 1c) of rites of mourning; 2) mourner (subst.); 2a) for the dead; 2b) for calamity (譯作: mourn(-er, -ing).)
H58: אבל | 意義: 1) meadow (from verb-to grow green,  to withstand) (譯作: plain. Compare also the proper names beginning with Abel-.)
H59: אבל | 意義: 1) city in northern Israel near Bethmaachah; 2) the place where the ark rested in the field of Joshua at Bethshemesh (譯作: Abel.)
H60: אבל | 意義: 1) mourning; 1a) for the dead; 1b) for rites of mourning (metaph); 1c) mourning garb; 1d) period of mourning (譯作: mourning.)
H61: אבל | 意義: 1) truly,  verily,  surely; 2) but,  however,  howbeit; 3) contrariwise,  nay rather (neg.) (譯作: but, indeed, nevertheless, verily.)
H62: אבל ביתמעכה | 意義: Abel Beth Maachah = "meadow of the house of Maachah"; 1) city in northern Israel near Beth Maachah (譯作: Abel-beth-maachah, Abel of Beth-maachah,)
H63: אבל השטים | 意義: Abel Shittim = "meadow of acacias"; 1) place in lowlands of Moab (譯作: Abelshittim.)
H64: אבל כרמים | 意義: Abel Keramim = "meadow of the vineyards"; 1) a place in Ammon (譯作: plain of the vineyards.)
H65: אבל מחולה | 意義: Abel Meholah = "meadow of dancing"; 1) a city of Issachar,  birthplace of Elisha (譯作: Abel-meholah.)
H66: אבל מים | 意義: Abel Maim = "meadow of waters"; 1) a city in northern Israel (perhaps Abel Beth Maachah) (譯作: Abel-maim.)
H67: אבל מצרים | 意義: Abel Mizraim = "meadow of Egypt"; 1) a place east of the Jordan (perhaps "as fertile as Egypt") (譯作: Abel-mizraim.)
H68: אבן | 意義: 1) stone (large or small); 1a) common stone (in natural state); 1b) stone,  as material; 1b1) of tablets; 1b2) marble,  hewn stones; 1c) precious stones,  stones of fire; 1d) stones containing metal (ore),  tool for work or weapon; 1e) weight; 1f) plummet (stones of destruction) also made of metal; 1g) stonelike objects,  eg hailstones,  stony heart,  ice; 1h) sacred object,  as memorial Samuel set up to mark where God helped Israel to defeat the Philistines; 1i) (simile); 1i1) sinking in water,  motionlessness; 1i2) strength,  firmness,  solidity; 1i3) commonness; 1j) (metaph); 1j1) petrified with terror; 1j2) perverse,  hard heart (譯作: [phrase] carbuncle, [phrase] mason, [phrase] plummet, (chalk-, hail-, head-, sling-) stone(-ny), (divers) weight(-s).)
H69: אבן | 意義: 1) stone; 1a) a (the) stone; 1b) stone,  material of idols and buildings (譯作: stone.)
H70: אבן | 意義: 1) wheel,  disc; 1a) potter's wheel; 1b) bearing-stool,  midwife's stool (譯作: wheel, stool.)
H71: אבנה | 意義: 1) river Abana,  Syrian river flowing through Damascus (譯作: Abana.)
H72: אבן העזר | 意義: Ebenezer = "stone of help"; 1) memorial stone erected by Samuel to mark where God helped Israel to defeat the Philistines-north of Jerusalem (譯作: Ebenezer.)
H73: אבנט | 意義: 1) girdle,  sash,  waistband; 1a) of high priest; 1b) of other priests; 1c) of high official (譯作: girdle.)
H74: אבנר | 意義: Abner = "my father is a lamp"; 1) Saul's cousin and army captain,  treacherously slain by Joab (譯作: Abner.)
H75: אבס | 意義: 1) to feed,  fatten; 1a) (Qal) fattened (passive participle) (譯作: fatted, stalled.)

H213: אוץ | 意義: 1) to press,  be pressed,  make haste,  urge,  be narrow; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to press,  hasten; 1a2) to be pressed,  confined,  narrow; 1a3) to hasten,  make haste; 1a4) be narrow; 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to urge,  insist; 1b2) to hasten (譯作: (make) haste(-n, -y), labor, be narrow.)
H214: אוצר | 意義: 1) treasure,  storehouse; 1a) treasure (gold,  silver,  etc); 1b) store,  supplies of food or drink; 1c) treasure-house,  treasury; 1c1) treasure-house; 1c2) storehouse,  magazine; 1c3) treasury; 1c4) magazine of weapons (fig. of God's armoury); 1c5) storehouses (of God for rain,  snow,  hail,  wind,  sea) (譯作: armory, cellar, garner, store(-house), treasure(-house) (-y).)
H215: אור | 意義: 1) to be or become light,  shine; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to become light (day); 1a2) to shine (of the sun); 1a3) to become bright; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be illuminated; 1b2) to become lighted up; 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to give light,  shine (of sun,  moon,  and stars); 1c2) to illumine,  light up,  cause to shine,  shine; 1c3) to kindle,  light (candle,  wood); 1c4) lighten (of the eyes,  his law,  etc); 1c5) to make shine (of the face) (譯作: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.)
H216: אור | 意義: 1) light; 1a) light of day; 1b) light of heavenly luminaries (moon,  sun, stars); 1c) day-break,  dawn,  morning light; 1d) daylight; 1e) lightning; 1f) light of lamp; 1g) light of life; 1h) light of prosperity; 1i) light of instruction; 1j) light of face (fig.); 1k) Jehovah as Israel's light (譯作: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.)
H217: אור | 意義: 1) flame,  light of fire (譯作: fire, light. See also <w src="224" lemma="אוּרִים" xlit="ʼÛwrîym" POS="oo-reem'"/>.)
H218: אור | 意義: Ur = "flame"; 1) city in southern Babylonia,  city of the Chaldeans,  centre of moon worship,  home of Abraham's father,  Terah,  and departure point for the Abraham's migration to Mesopotamia and Canaan (譯作: Ur.)
H219: אורה | 意義: 1) light; 2) light of joy and happiness (fig.) (譯作: herb, light.)
H220: אורה | 意義: 1) manger,  stall,  crib (譯作: cote.)
H221: אורי | 意義: Uri = "fiery"; 1) a prince of Judah,  a son of Hur who was used by God to prepare the tabernacle; 2) an officer (or the father of an officer) of Solomon in Gilead; 3) a porter or gatekeeper in time of Ezra who took a foreign woman as wife (譯作: Uri.)
H222: אוריאל | 意義: Uriel = "God (El) is my light"; 1) chief of the Levitical line of Kohath in David's time; 2) maternal grandfather of Abijah (譯作: Uriel.)
H223: איריה | 意義: Uriah or Urijah = "Jehovah (Yahweh) is my light (flame)"; 1) Hittite husband of Bathsheba; 2) a priest who built king Ahaz' heathen altar; 3) a priest who rebuilt Jerusalem's wall; 4) a prophet slain by Jehoiakim (譯作: Uriah, Urijah.)
H224: אורים | 意義: Urim = "lights"; 1) stones kept in a pouch on the high-priest's breastplate,  used in determining God's decision in certain questions and issues (譯作: Urim.)
H225: אות | 意義: 1) (Niphal) to consent,  agree (譯作: consent.)
H226: אות | 意義: 1) sign,  signal; 1a) a distinguishing mark; 1b) banner; 1c) remembrance; 1d) miraculous sign; 1e) omen; 1f) warning; 2) token,  ensign,  standard,  miracle,  proof (譯作: mark, miracle, (en-) sign, token.)
H227: אז | 意義: 1) then,  at that time; 1a) temporal expressions; 1a1) then (past); 1a2) then,  if...then (future); 1a3) earlier; 1b) logical expressions; 1b1) in that case; 1b2) that (being so) (譯作: beginning, for, from, hitherto, now, of old, once, since, then, at which time, yet.)
H228: אזא | 意義: 1) (P'al) make hot,  heat (譯作: heat, hot.)
H229: אזבי | 意義: Ezbai = "my humblings"; 1) father of one of David's mighty men (譯作: Ezbai.)
H230: אזד | 意義: 1) (P'al) to be gone (譯作: be gone.)
H231: אזוב | 意義: 1) hyssop,  a plant used for medicinal and religious purposes (譯作: hyssop.)
H232: אזור | 意義: 1) waist-cloth,  the innermost piece of clothing; 1a) of God's power over kings (fig.); 1b) of faithfulness (metaph); 2) waistband (譯作: girdle.)
H233: אזי | 意義: 1) then,  in that case (譯作: then.)
H234: אזכרה | 意義: 1) memorial-offering,  the portion of the meal (food) offering which is burned (譯作: memorial.)
H235: אזל | 意義: 1) to go,  to go away,  to go about; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to go away; 1a2) to go about; 1a3) to be used up,  be exhausted,  be gone,  evaporated; 1b) (Pual) to go to and fro (譯作: fail, gad about, go to and fro (but in Ezekiel 27:19 the word is rendered by many 'from Uzal,' by others 'yarn'), be gone (spent).)
H236: אזל | 意義: 1) to go,  to go off; 1a) (P'al) to go,  go off (譯作: go (up).)
H237: אזל | 意義: Ezel = "departure"; 1) a memorial stone between Ramah and Nob; scene of final farewell between David and Jonathan (譯作: Ezel.)
H238: אזן | 意義: 1) to hear,  listen; 1a) (Hiphil); 1a1) to hear,  listen,  give ear; 1a2) to be obedient, harken; 1a3) to hear or listen to prayers (of God) (譯作: give (perceive by the) ear, hear(-ken). See <w src="239" lemma="אָזַן" xlit="ʼâzan" POS="aw-zan'"/>.)
H239: אזן | 意義: 1) (Piel) weigh,  test,  prove,  consider (譯作: give good heed.)
H240: אזן | 意義: 1) tools,  implements,  weapons (譯作: weapon.)
H241: אזן | 意義: 1) ear,  as part of the body; 2) ear,  as organ of hearing; 3) (subjective) to uncover the ear to reveal; the receiver of divine revelation (譯作: [phrase] advertise, audience, [phrase] displease, ear, hearing, [phrase] show.)
H242: אזן שארה | 意義: Uzzen Sherah = "portion of Sherah"; 1) city built by Sherah,  Ephraim's daughter (譯作: Uzzen-sherah.)
H243: אזנות תבור | 意義: Aznoth Tabor = "peaks of Tabor"; 1) a pair of hills on Naphtali's border (譯作: Aznoth-tabor.)
H244: אזני | 意義: Ozni or Oznite = "my ear (hearing)"; 1) son of Gad; 2) pertaining to Ozni and his descendants (譯作: Ozni, Oznites.)
H245: אזניה | 意義: Azaniah = "Jehovah (Yahweh) hears"; 1) the father of Jeshua,  a Levite (譯作: Azaniah.)
H246: אזקים | 意義: 1) chains,  manacles (譯作: chains.)
H247: אזר | 意義: 1) gird,  encompass,  equip,  clothe; 1a) (Qal) to gird,  gird on (metaphorical of strength); 1b) (Niphal) be girded; 1c)(Piel) hold close,  clasp; 1d) (Hiphpael) gird oneself (for war) (譯作: bind (compass) about, gird (up, with).)
H248: אזרוע | 意義: 1) arm (譯作: arm.)
H249: אזרח | 意義: 1) a native (one rising from the soil); 1a) of man,  native Israelites; 1b) of tree,  native (to Israel) (譯作: bay tree, (home-) born (in the land), of the (one's own) country (nation).)
H250: אזרחי | 意義: Ezraite = "a native (as arising out of the soil)"; 1) Ezrahite,  of the family of Zerach (譯作: Ezrahite.)
H251: אח | 意義: 1) brother; 1a) brother of same parents; 1b) half-brother (same father); 1c) relative,  kinship,  same tribe; 1d) each to the other (reciprocal relationship); 1e) (fig.) of resemblance (譯作: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.)
H252: אח | 意義: 1) brother (譯作: brother.)
H253: אח | 意義: 1) ah!,  alas!,  woe! (譯作: ah, alas.)
H254: אח | 意義: 1) fire-pot,  brazier (譯作: hearth.)
H255: אח | 意義: 1) howling animal; 1a) jackal; 1b) hyena (譯作: doleful creature.)
H256: אחאב | 意義: Ahab = "father's brother"; 1) king of Israel,  son of Omri,  husband of Jezebel; 2) false prophet executed by Nebuchadrezzar,  time of Jeremiah (譯作: Ahab.)
H257: אחבן | 意義: Ahban = "brother of an understanding (intelligent) one"; 1) son of Abishur of Judah (譯作: Ahban.)
H258: אחד | 意義: 1) (Hithpael) to go one way or another,  to be sharp (譯作: go one way or other.)
H259: אחד | 意義: 1) one (number); 1a) one (number); 1b) each,  every; 1c) a certain; 1d) an (indefinite article); 1e) only,  once,  once for all; 1f) one...another,  the one...the other,  one after another,  one by one; 1g) first; 1h) eleven (in combination),  eleventh (ordinal) (譯作: a, alike, alone, altogether, and, any(-thing), apiece, a certain, (dai-) ly, each (one), [phrase] eleven, every, few, first, [phrase] highway, a man, once, one, only, other, some, together,)
H260: אחו | 意義: 1) reeds,  marsh plants,  rushes (譯作: flag, meadow.)
H261: אחוד | 意義: Ehud = "united"; 1) great grandson of Benjamin (譯作: Ehud.)
H262: אחוה | 意義: 1) declaration (譯作: declaration.)
H263: אחוה | 意義: 1) declaration,  a declaring (譯作: showing.)
H264: אחוה | 意義: 1) fraternity,  brotherhood (譯作: brotherhood.)
H265: אחוח | 意義: Ahoah = "brother of rest"; 1) a grandson of Benjamin (譯作: Ahoah.)
H266: אחוחי | 意義: Ahohite = "brother of rest"; 1) one of the clan of Ahoah (譯作: Ahohite.)
H267: אחומי | 意義: Ahumai = "a water reed: brother of waters"; 1) grandson of Shobal,  descendant of Judah (譯作: Ahumai.)
H268: אחור | 意義: 1) the back side,  the rear; 1a) backwards; 1b) hereafter (of time); 1c) behind (譯作: after(-ward), back (part, -side, -ward), hereafter, (be-) hind(-er part), time to come, without.)
H269: אחות | 意義: 1) sister; 1a) sister (same parents); 1b) half-sister (same father); 1c) relative; 1c1)(metaph) of Israel's and Judah's relationship; 1d) beloved; 1d1) bride; 1e) (fig.) of intimate connection; 1f) another (譯作: (an-) other, sister, together.)
H270: אחז | 意義: 1) grasp,  take hold,  seize,  take possession; 1a) (Qal) to grasp,  take hold of; 1b) (Niphal) to be caught, grasped,  be settled; 1c) (Piel) to enclose,  overlay; 1d) (Hophal) fastened (譯作: [phrase] be affrighted, bar, (catch, lay, take) hold (back), come upon, fasten, handle, portion, (get, have or take) possess(-ion).)
H271: אחז | 意義: Ahaz = "he has grasped"; 1) king of Judah,  son Jotham,  father of Hezekiah; 2) a Benjamite,  son of Micah,  and great grandson of Jonathan (譯作: Ahaz.)
H272: אחזה | 意義: 1) possession,  property; 1a) land; 1b) possession by inheritance (譯作: possession.)

H274: אחזיה | 意義: Ahaziah = "Jehovah (Yahu) holds (possesses)"; 1) ruler of Israel,  son of Ahab; 2) ruler of Judah,  son of Jehoram (Joram) (譯作: Ahaziah.)
H275: אחזם | 意義: Ahuzam = "possessor"; 1) a descendant of Judah through Caleb (譯作: Ahuzam.)
H276: אחזת | 意義: Ahuzzath = "possession"; 1) friend of Abimelech (譯作: Ahuzzath.)
H277: אחי | 意義: Ahi = "my brother"; 1) a head of the families of Gad; 2) an Asherite (譯作: Ahi.)
H278: אחי | 意義: Ehi = "my brother"; 1) son of Benjamin (譯作: Ehi.)
H279: אחיאם | 意義: Ahiam = "mother's brother"; 1) one of David's warriors (heroes) (譯作: Ahiam.)
H280: אחידה | 意義: 1) puzzle,  riddle (譯作: hard sentence.)
H281: אחיה | 意義: Ahiah or Ahijah = "brother of Jehovah (Yahu)"; 1) grandson of Phinehas; 2) scribe of Solomon; 3) a prophet who predicted the revolt of the Northern tribes; 4) father of Baasha,  who usurped the Northern throne; 5) grandson of Hezron (or mother of 1-4 above); 6) a Benjamite,  son of Ehud; 7) one of David's heroes; 8) a Levite during David's time; 9) a chief man under Nehemiah (譯作: Ahiah, Ahijah.)
H282: אחיהוד | 意義: Ahihud = "brother of majesty"; 1) a prince of Asher (譯作: Ahihud.)
H283: אחיו | 意義: Ahio = "brotherly" or "fraternal"; 1) son of Abinadab who sheltered the ark; 2) a Benjamite; 3) another Benjamite of Saul's ancestry (譯作: Ahio.)
H284: אחיחד | 意義: Ahihud = "brother of mystery"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Ehud (譯作: Ahihud.)
H285: אחיטוב | 意義: Ahitub = "my brother is good (goodness)"; 1) a grandson of Eli; 2) the father of Zadok the priest (譯作: Ahitub.)
H286: אחילוד | 意義: Ahilud = "child's brother"; 1) father of Jehoshaphat,  David's recorder; 2) father of Baana,  an officer of Solomon (譯作: Ahilud.)
H287: אחימות | 意義: Ahimoth = "brother of death" or "my brother is death"; 1) a son of Elkanah,  a Levite (譯作: Ahimoth.)
H288: אחימלך | 意義: Ahimelech = "my brother is king" or "brother of Melek"; 1) a priest murdered by Doeg at Saul's command,  for supposedly assisting David; 2) a Hittite warrior under David (譯作: Ahimelech.)
H289: אחימן | 意義: Ahiman = "my brother is a gift"; 1) a son of Anak; 2) a Levite servant in the temple (譯作: Ahiman.)
H290: אחימעץ | 意義: Ahimaaz = "my brother is anger (wrath)"; 1) father-in-law of Saul; 2) Zadok's son who aided David during Absalom's rebellion; 3) a supply officer of Solomon (譯作: Ahimaaz.)
H291: אחין | 意義: Ahian = "brotherly" or "fraternal"; 1) son of Shemida of Manasseh (譯作: Ahian.)
H292: אחינדב | 意義: Ahinadab = "my brother is liberal, or, noble"; 1) a supply officer of Solomon (譯作: Ahinadab.)
H293: אחינעם | 意義: Ahinoam = "my brother is delight"; 1) wife of Saul,  daughter of Ahimaaz; 2) wife of David,  mother of Amnon,  a Jezreelitess (譯作: Ahinoam.)
H294: אחיסמך | 意義: Ahisamach = "my brother is support (has supported)"; 1) a Danite,  father of Aholiab,  a workman on the tabernacle (譯作: Ahisamach.)
H295: אחיעזר | 意義: Ahiezer = "my brother is help"; 1) a Danite chief who assisted Moses; 2) a Danite chief,  one of David's heroes (譯作: Ahiezer.)
H296: אחיקם | 意義: Ahikam = "my brother has risen (arisen)"; 1) son of Shaphan,  an officer in Josiah's reign; 2) protector of Jeremiah; 3) father of Gedaliah (譯作: Ahikam.)
H297: אחירם | 意義: Ahiram = "my brother is exalted" or "brother or (the) lofty"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Benjamin (譯作: Ahiram.)
H298: אחירמי | 意義: Ahiramite = "brother of mother"; 1) one of the clan of Ahiram (譯作: Ahiramites.)
H299: אחירע | 意義: Ahira = "my brother is evil"; 1) a chief of Naphtali (譯作: Ahira.)
H300: אחישחר | 意義: Ahishahar = "my brother is dawn" or "brother of the dawn"; 1) a Benjamite (譯作: Ahishar.)
H301: אחישר | 意義: Ahishar = "my brother sang"; 1) chief steward for Solomon (譯作: Ahishar.)
H302: אחיתפל | 意義: Ahithophel = "my brother is foolish (folly)"; 1) a counsellor of David,  grandfather of Bathsheba (cf 2Sa 11:3, 23:34), who joined Absalom in revolt against David,  and committed suicide when Absalom did not heed his counsel (譯作: Ahithophel.)
H303: אחלב | 意義: Ahlab = "fertile place"; 1) a town allotted to Asher,  site presently unknown (譯作: Ahlab.)
H304: אחלי | 意義: Ahlai = "O! would that!"; 1) daughter of Sheshan; 2) father of one of David's heroes (mighty men,  warriors) (譯作: Ahlai.)
H305: אחלי | 意義: 1) Oh that...!; oh would that!; ah that! (譯作: O that, would God.)
H306: אחלמה | 意義: 1) amethyst,  a gem in the third row on the ephod,  breastplate of judgment worn by the high priest.  Transliteration of the Septuagint word.  Identification is not certain but is a purple stone perhaps a corundum or red or brown jasper. (譯作: amethyst.)
H307: אחמתא | 意義: Achmetha = "Ecbatana"; 1) capital of Media,  captured by Cyrus in 550 BC and then summer residence of Persian kings (譯作: Achmetha.)
H308: אחסבי | 意義: Ahasbai = "brother of my encompassers"; 1) father of Eliphelet,  one of David's heroes (譯作: Ahasbai.)
H309: אחר | 意義: 1) to delay,  hesitate,  tarry,  defer,  remain behind; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to delay,  tarry (intensive); 1a2) to cause one to delay,  hinder,  keep back; 1b) (Piel) to delay,  wait,  stay behind (but not in hope) (譯作: continue, defer, delay, hinder, be late (slack), stay (there), tarry (longer).)
H310: אחר | 意義: 1) after the following part,  behind (of place),  hinder, afterwards (of time); 1a) as an adverb; 1a1) behind (of place); 1a2) afterwards (of time); 1b) as a preposition; 1b1) behind,  after (of place); 1b2) after (of time); 1b3) besides; 1c) as a conjunction; 1c) after that; 1d) as a substantive; 1d1) hinder part; 1e) with other prepositions; 1e1) from behind; 1e2) from following after (譯作: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase] persecute, posterity, pursuing, remnant, seeing, since, thence(-forth), when, with.)

H313: אחר | 意義: Aher = "following"; 1) a Benjamite (譯作: Aher.)
H314: אחרון | 意義: 1) behind,  following,  subsequent,  western; 1a) behind,  hindermost,  western (of location); 1b) later,  subsequent,  latter,  last (of time) (譯作: after (-ward), to come, following, hind(-er, -ermost, -most), last, latter, rereward, ut(ter) most.)
H315: אחרח | 意義: Aharah = "a following brother"; 1) a son of Benjamin (譯作: Aharah.)
H316: אחרחל | 意義: Aharhel = "a following host"; 1) a descendant of Judah through Caleb (譯作: Aharhel,)
H317: אחרי | 意義: 1) other,  another (譯作: (an-) other.)

H320: אחרית | 意義: 1) end,  latter (譯作: latter.)
H321: אחרן | 意義: 1) other,  another (譯作: (an-) other.)

H323: אחשדרפן | 意義: 1) satrap,  a governor of a Persian province (譯作: lieutenant.)

H329: אטד | 意義: 1) bramble,  thorn,  buckthorn; 2) the threshing Atad,  meaning thorn,  also called Abelmizraim and afterwards called Bethhogla was located on the west of Jordan between the Jordan and Jericho (譯作: Atad, bramble, thorn.)

H352: איל | 意義: 1) ram; 1a) ram (as food); 1b) ram (as sacrifice); 1c) ram (skin dyed red, for tabernacle); 2) pillar,  door post,  jambs,  pilaster; 3) strong man,  leader,  chief; 4) mighty tree,  terebinth (譯作: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.)

H357: אילון | 意義: Ajalon or Aijalon = "field of deer"; 1) Levitical city in Dan,  14 miles or 25 km NW of Jerusalem,  later ruled by the Amorites, then the Benjamites of Judah,  then by the Philistines; 2) a city of Zebulun,  site unknown (譯作: Aijalon, Ajalon.)

H365: אילת | 意義: 1) doe,  deer,  hind; 2) "Aijeleth Shahar" is part of the title of Ps 22:1 and probably describes to the musician the melody to which the psalm was to be played (譯作: hind, Aijeleth.)

H374: איפה | 意義: 1) ephah; 1a) a dry measure of quantity,  equal to 3 seahs,  10 omers; the same as the liquid measure bath; (about 9 imperial gallons (40 l), rabbinical writings give sizes of one-half this amount); 1b) the receptacle for measuring or holding that amount (譯作: ephah, (divers) measure(-s).)

H376: איש | 意義: 1) man; 1a) man, male (in contrast to woman,  female); 1b) husband; 1c) human being,  person (in contrast to God); 1d) servant; 1e) mankind; 1f) champion; 1g) great man; 2) whosoever; 3) each (adjective) (譯作: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), husband, man(-kind), [phrase] none, one, people, person, [phrase] steward, what (man) soever, whoso(-ever), worthy. Compare <w src="802" lemma="אִשָּׁה" xlit="ʼishshâh" POS="ish-shaw'"/>.)
H377: איש | 意義: 1) (Hithpalel) to be a man,  show masculinity,  champion,  great man (譯作: show (one) self a man.)
H378: אישבשת | 意義: Ishbosheth = "man of shame"; 1) surviving son of Saul,  king of Israel for 7 years while David was king over Judah; succeeded by David who united the kingdom (譯作: Ish-bosheth.)
H379: אישהוד | 意義: Ishod = "man of majesty"; 1) a Manassite from east of the Jordan (譯作: Ishod.)

H381: אישחיל | 意義: 1) a mighty man,  valiant man (譯作: a valiant man.)
H382: אישטוב | 意義: Ishtob = "man of Tob"; 1) a region beyond Jordan,  north or northeast of Gilead (譯作: Ish-tob.)
H383: איתי | 意義: 1) there is,  there are; 2) particle denoting existence (譯作: art thou, can, do ye, have, it be, there is (are), [idiom] we will not.)
H384: איתיאל | 意義: Ithiel = "God is with me"; 1) the disciple to whom Agur gave proverbs; 2) a Benjamite in Nehemiah's time (譯作: Ithiel.)
H385: איתמר | 意義: Ithamar = "coast of palms"; 1) fourth and youngest son of Aaron (譯作: Ithamar.)
H386: איתן | 意義: 1) perpetual,  constant, perennial,  ever-flowing; 1a) ever-flowing  (of a stream); 1b) permanence,  permanent,  enduring (fig.) (譯作: hard, mighty, rough, strength, strong.)
H387: איתן | 意義: Ethan = "enduring"; 1) an Ezrahite known for his wisdom; 2) a grandson of Judah,  father of Azariah; 3) a Kohathite descendant of Levi; 4) a Merarite son of Kushaiah,  descendant of Levi (譯作: Ethan.)
H388: איתנים | 意義: Ethanim = "enduring"; 1) seventh Jewish month,  corresponding to modern Oct. to Nov.; so named because permanent streams still flowed (譯作: Ethanim.)
H389: אך | 意義: 1) indeed, surely (emphatic); 2) howbeit,  only,  but,  yet (restrictive) (譯作: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).)
H390: אכד | 意義: Accad = "subtle"; 1) a city in north Babylonia,  also the district around it (譯作: Accad.)

H394: אכזרי | 意義: 1) cruel (譯作: cruel (one).)

H396: אכילה | 意義: 1) food,  a meal,  an eating,  meat (譯作: meat.)
H397: אכיש | 意義: Achish = "I will blacken (or terrify)" or "only a man"; 1) Philistine king of Gath (譯作: Achish.)
H398: אכל | 意義: 1) to eat,  devour,  burn up,  feed; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to eat (human subject); 1a2) to eat,  devour (of beasts and birds); 1a3) to devour,  consume (of fire); 1a4) to devour,  slay (of sword); 1a5) to devour,  consume,  destroy (inanimate subjects - ie,  pestilence,  drought); 1a6) to devour (of oppression); 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be eaten (by men); 1b2) to be devoured,  consumed (of fire); 1b3) to be wasted,  destroyed (of flesh); 1c) (Pual); 1c1) to cause to eat,  feed with; 1c2) to cause to devour; 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to feed; 1d2) to cause to eat; 1e) (Piel); 1e1) consume (譯作: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.)
H399: אכל | 意義: 1) to eat,  devour; 1a) (P'al); 1a1) to eat (of beasts); 1a2) to devour; 1a3) eat their pieces (in a phrase,  that is,  slander them) (譯作: [phrase] accuse, devour, eat.)
H400: אכל | 意義: 1) food; 1a) cereal; 1b) meat; 2) food supply; 3) meal,  dinner (譯作: eating, food, meal(-time), meat, prey, victuals.)

H403: אכן | 意義: 1) surely,  truly,  indeed; 1a) truly,  indeed (strong assertive force); 1b) but indeed,  but in fact (emphasizing a contrast) (譯作: but, certainly, nevertheless, surely, truly, verily.)
H404: אכף | 意義: 1) press,  urge,  bend; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to crave (譯作: crave.)
H405: אכף | 意義: 1) pressure,  urgency,  burden (譯作: hand.)
H406: אכר | 意義: 1) plowman,  husbandman,  farmer; 1a) working the land,  yet not owning any of it (譯作: husbandman, ploughman.)
H407: אכשף | 意義: Achshaph = "I shall be bewitched"; 1) city in north Canaan at foot of Mt Carmel (譯作: Achshaph.)
H408: אל | 意義: 1) not,  no, nor,  neither, nothing (as wish or preference); 1a) do not,  let not (with a verb); 1b) let there not be (with a verb understood); 1c) not,  no (with substantive); 1d) nothing (as substantive) (譯作: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.)
H409: אל | 意義: 1) no,  not (譯作: not.)
H410: אל | 意義: 1) god, god-like one,  mighty one; 1a) mighty men,  men of rank,  mighty heroes; 1b) angels; 1c) god,  false god,  (demons,  imaginations); 1d) God,  the one true God,  Jehovah; 2) mighty things in nature; 3) strength,  power (譯作: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. H411: אל | 意義: 1) these,  those (譯作: these, those. Compare <w src="428" lemma="אֵלֶּה" xlit="ʼêl-leh" POS="ale'-leh"/>.)
H412: אל | 意義: 1) these (譯作: these.)
H413: אל | 意義: 1) to,  toward,  unto  (of motion); 2) into (limit is actually entered); 2a) in among; 3) toward (of direction,  not necessarily physical motion); 4) against (motion or direction of a hostile character); 5) in addition to,  to; 6) concerning,  in regard to,  in reference to,  on account of; 7) according to (rule or standard); 8) at,  by,  against (of one's presence); 9) in between,  in within,  to within,  unto (idea of motion to) (譯作: about, according to, after, against, among, as for, at, because(-fore, -side), both...and, by, concerning, for, from, [idiom] hath, in(-to), near, (out) of, over, through, to(-ward), under, unto, upon, whether, with(-in).)
H414: אלא | 意義: Elah = "oak"; 1) father of one of Solomon's deputies (譯作: Elah.)

H416: אל ביתאל | 意義: El Bethel = "The God of the House of God"; 1) the place where God revealed Himself to Jacob (譯作: El-beth-el.)
H417: אלגביש | 意義: 1) hail (lit. -pearls of God) (譯作: great hail(-stones).)
H418: אלגומים | 意義: 1) a tree (from Lebanon),  algum trees (譯作: algum (trees).)
H419: אלדד | 意義: Eldad = "God has loved"; 1) one of the two elders who prophesied in the Israelite camp (譯作: Eldad.)
H420: אלדעה | 意義: Eldaah = "God has known"; 1) a son or descendant of Midian (譯作: Eldaah.)
H421: אלה | 意義: 1) (Qal) to lament,  wail (譯作: lament.)
H422: אלה | 意義: 1) to swear,  curse; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to swear,  take an oath (before God); 1a2) to curse; 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to put under oath,  adjure; 1b2) to put under a curse (譯作: adjure, curse, swear.)
H423: אלה | 意義: 1) oath; 2) oath of covenant; 3) curse; 3a) from God; 3b) from men; 4) execration (譯作: curse, cursing, execration, oath, swearing.)
H424: אלה | 意義: 1) terebinth,  terebinth tree; 2) valley where David killed Goliath (譯作: elm, oak, teil-tree.)
H425: אלה | 意義: Elah = "An oak"; 1) an Edomite chief; 2) a king of Israel for two years,  son of Baasha; 3) the father of king Hoshea of Israel; 4) a son of Caleb; 5) son of Uzzi (譯作: Elah.)
H426: אלה | 意義: 1) god,  God; 1a) god,  heathen deity; 1b) God (of Israel) (譯作: God, god.)
H427: אלה | 意義: 1) oak; 2) terebinth (譯作: oak.)
H428: אלה | 意義: 1) these; 1a) used before antecedent; 1b) used following antecedent (譯作: an-(the) other; one sort, so, some, such, them, these (same), they, this, those, thus, which, who(-m).)
H429: אלה | 意義: 1) these (譯作: these.)
H430: אלהים | 意義: 1) (plural); 1a) rulers,  judges; 1b) divine ones; 1c) angels; 1d) gods; 2) (plural intensive-singular meaning); 2a) god,  goddess; 2b) godlike one; 2c) works or special possessions of God; 2d) the (true) God; 2e) God (譯作: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.)
H431: אלו | 意義: 1) behold!,  lo! (譯作: behold.)

H433: אלוה | 意義: 1) God; 2) false god (譯作: God, god. See <w src="430" lemma="אֱלֹהִים" xlit="ʼĕlôhîym" POS="el-o-heem'"/>.)
H434: אלול | 意義: 1) worthless,  something worthless,  ineffective; 2) worthless gods,  idols (譯作: thing of nought.)
H435: אלול | 意義: Elul = "nothingness"; 1) sixth Jewish month corresponding to modern Aug. or Sep. (譯作: Elul.)
H436: אלון | 意義: 1) tree,  great tree,  terebinth; 2) plain (譯作: plain. See also <w src="356" lemma="אֵילוֹן" xlit="ʼÊylôwn" POS="ay-lone'"/>.)
H437: אלון | 意義: 1) oak,  great tree (譯作: oak.)
H438: אלון | 意義: Allon = "great tree" or "oak"; 1) city in Naphtali; 2) a Simeonite (譯作: Allon.)
H439: אלון בכות | 意義: Allon Bachuth = "oak of weeping"; 1) site of Deborah's (Rebekah's nurse) grave near Bethel (譯作: Allon-bachuth.)
H440: אלוני | 意義: Elonite = "might" or "terebinth: a plain"; 1) one of the clan of Elon (譯作: Elonites.)
H441: אלוף | 意義: 1) tame,  docile; 2) friend,  intimate; 3) chief (譯作: captain, duke, (chief) friend, governor, guide, ox.)
H442: אלוש | 意義: Alush = "I will knead (bread)"; 1) a wilderness encampment following the Exodus (譯作: Alush.)
H443: אלזבד | 意義: Elzabad = "God has given"; 1) a Gadite warrior who aided David; 2) a Korhite Levite (譯作: Elzabad.)
H444: אלח | 意義: 1) (Niphal) to be corrupt morally,  tainted (譯作: become filthy.)
H445: אלחנן | 意義: Elhanan = "God has been gracious"; 1) Jair's son who fought the Gittites; 2) Dodo's son who was a chief of David (譯作: Elkanan.)
H446: אליאב | 意義: Eliab = "my God is father" or "God is father"; 1) son of Helon,  leader of Zebulun in the wilderness; 2) a Reubenite chief,  father of Dathan and Abiram; 3) David's oldest brother; 4) a Levite musician; 5) a Gadite warrior for David; 6) a Kohathite (譯作: Eliab.)
H447: אליאל | 意義: Eliel = "my God is God" or "El is God"; 1) an ancestor of Samuel; 2) chief in David's army (might be two or three different men); 3) a Levite with David in moving the ark; 4) a chief of Manasseh; 5) two chiefs of Benjamin; 6) a chief Kohathite; 7) a Levite (譯作: Eliel.)
H448: אליאתה | 意義: Eliathah = "God has come"; 1) a Hemanite musician in David's court (譯作: Eliathah.)
H449: אלידד | 意義: Elidad = "my God has loved"; 1) a Benjamite chief who helped apportion his tribe's allotment to the Promised Land (譯作: Elidad.)
H450: אלידע | 意義: Eliadah or Eliada = "God knows"; 1) a son of David; 2) a Benjamite warrior chief; 3) an Aramean,  the father of an enemy of Solomon (譯作: Eliada.)
H451: אליה | 意義: 1) tail,  fat-tail (of sheep-an Eastern delicacy) (譯作: rump.)
H452: אליה | 意義: Elijah or Eliah = "my God is Jehovah" or "Yah(u) is God"; 1) the great prophet of the reign of Ahab; 2) Benjamite son of Jeroham; 3) a son of Elam with foreign wife during exile; 4) a son of Harim,  and priest,  with foreign wife during exile (譯作: Elijah, Eliah.)
H453: אליהו | 意義: Elihu = "He is my God"; 1) the younger man who rebuked Job and his three friends; 2) an Ephraimite,  Samuel's great grandfather; 3) a Manassite warrior chief for David; 4) son of Shemaiah and Korhite gatekeeper; 5) David's brother (譯作: Elihu.)
H454: אליהועיני | 意義: Elioenai or Elihoenai = "unto Jehovah are my eyes"; 1) a Korahite temple doorkeeper,  son of Meshelemiah; 2)  two men with foreign wife during the exile; one a priest; 3) a son of Neariah; 4) a Simeonite; 5) a Benjamite,  son of Becher (譯作: Elihoenai, Elionai.)
H455: אליחבא | 意義: Eliahba = "God hides"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Eliahbah.)
H456: אליחרף | 意義: Elihoreph = "God of winter (harvest-time)"; 1) a scribe in Solomon's court (譯作: Elihoreph.)
H457: אליל | 意義: 1) of nought,  good for nothing,  worthless; 1a) of physicians,  a shepherd,  a divination; 1b) of false gods (譯作: idol, no value, thing of nought.)
H458: אלימלך | 意義: Elimelech = "my God is king"; 1) Naomi's husband (譯作: Elimelech.)
H459: אלין | 意義: 1) these,  those (譯作: the, these.)
H460: אליסף | 意義: Eliasaph = "God has added"; 1) a Gadite chief in the wilderness census; 2) a head of the Gershonites (譯作: Eliasaph.)
H461: אליעזר | 意義: Eliezer = "God is help"; 1) Abraham's Damascene servant; 2) a son of Moses; 3) a Benjamite; 4) a priest who helped move the ark; 5) a Reubenite; 6) a prophet who spoke to Jehoshaphat; 7) a Levite chief; 8) son of Harim; 9) priest with foreign wife (譯作: Eliezer.)
H462: אליעיני | 意義: Elienai = "unto God are my eyes"; 1) a Benjamite (譯作: Elienai.)
H463: אליעם | 意義: Eliam = "God of the people" or "God is kinsman"; 1) Bathsheba's father; 2) a Gilonite warrior of David (譯作: Eliam.)
H464: אליפז | 意義: Eliphaz = "my God is (fine) gold"; 1) Esau's son,  father of Teman; 2) the Temanite friend of Job (譯作: Eliphaz.)
H465: אליפל | 意義: Eliphal = "my God is supplication"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Eliphal.)
H466: אליפלהו | 意義: Elipheleh = "my God sets him apart" or "my God distinguishes him"; 1) a Levite gatekeeper and musician for David (譯作: Elipheleh.)
H467: אליפלט | 意義: Elpalet or Eliphalet or Eliphelet = "God is deliverance"; 1) David's youngest son; 2) one of David's mighty warriors; 3) a Benjamite descendant of Jonathan; 4) a leader of the clan of Adonikam; 5) one of the line of Hashum (譯作: Eliphalet, Eliphelet, Elpalet.)
H468: אליצור | 意義: Elizur = "my God is a rock" or "Rock is God"; 1) a chief of Reuben in the wilderness (譯作: Elizur.)
H469: אליצפן | 意義: Elizaphan or Elzaphan = "my God has protected"; 1) a Kohathite chief in the wilderness; 2) a Zebulunite chief; 3) Uzziel's son,  Mishael's brother in time of Moses (譯作: Elizaphan, Elzaphan.)
H470: אליקא | 意義: Elika = "my God rejects"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Elika.)

H1023: בית המרחק | 意義: Beth Ham-merchaq = "remote house"; 1) house or settlement on the bank of Kidron (譯作: place that was far off.)
H1024: בית המרכבות | 意義: Beth-marcaboth = "house of the chariots"; 1) a place in Simeon (譯作: Bethmarcaboth.)
H1025: בית העמק | 意義: Beth-emek = "house of the valley"; 1) a place on the border of Asher (譯作: Beth-emek.)
H1026: בית הערבה | 意義: Beth-arabah = "house of the desert valley" or "place of the depression"; 1) a place in Judah or in Benjamin, site unknown (譯作: Beth-arabah.)
H1027: בית הרם | 意義: Beth-aram = "place of the height"; 1) a place in Gad (譯作: Beth-aram.)
H1028: בית הרן | 意義: Beth-haran = "house of their mount: house of the joyful shouter"; 1) a place in Gad,  possibly "Beth Harran",  one hour east of Jordan, opposite Jericho (譯作: Beth-haran.)
H1029: בית השטה | 意義: Beth-shittah = "house of the acacia tree" or "place of the acacia"; 1) an unknown location, perhaps an acacia grove (譯作: Beth-shittah.)
H1030: בית השמשי | 意義: Bethshemite or Beth-shemeshite = "house of the sun"; 1) an inhabitant of Beth-shemesh (譯作: Bethshemite.)
H1031: בית חגלה | 意義: Beth-hoglah = "house of the partridge" or "place of partridge"; 1) a place in Benjamin on the border with Judah (譯作: Beth-hoglah.)
H1032: בית חורון | 意義: Beth-horon = "house of hollowness"; 1) two towns in Ephraim; 1a) Upper Beth-horon-town on the mountains of Ephraim; 1b) Lower Beth-horon-town located 800 feet (245 m) lower than Upper Beth-horon (譯作: Beth-horon.)
H1033: בית כר | 意義: Beth-car = "house of the ram" or "place of the lamb"; 1) a place apparently belonging to the Philistines (譯作: Beth-car.)
H1034: בית לבאות | 意義: Beth-lebaoth = "house of lionesses"; 1) a place in Simeon (譯作: Beth-lebaoth. Compare <w src="3822" lemma="לְבָאוֹת" xlit="Lᵉbâʼôwth" POS="leb-aw-oth'"/>.)
H1035: בית לחם | 意義: Beth-lehem = "house of bread (food)"; 1) a city in Judah,  birthplace of David; 2) a place in Zebulun (譯作: Bethlehem.)
H1036: בית לעפרה | 意義: Bethel-aphrah = "house belonging to Aphrah" or "house to (i.e. of) dust"; 1) a Philistine city (譯作: house of Aphrah.)
H1037: בית מלוא | 意義: Beth-millo = "house of Millo" or "house of the rampart"; 1) a place near Shechem,  site unknown; 2) a citadel in Jerusalem (譯作: house of Millo.)
H1038: בית מעכה | 意義: Beth-maachah = "house of pressure"; 1) a place in the northern kingdom (譯作: Beth-maachah.)
H1039: בית נמרה | 意義: Beth-Nimrah = "house of the leopard"; 1) a place east of the Jordan in Gad (譯作: Beth-Nimrah. Compare <w src="5247" lemma="נִמְרָה" xlit="Nimrâh" POS="nim-raw'"/>.)
H1040: בית עדן | 意義: Beth-eden = "house of delight"; 1) a city in Syria,  modern Juseih (cuneiform = Bit Adini) (譯作: Beth-eden.)
H1041: בית עזמות | 意義: Beth-azmaveth = "house of the strength of death"; 1) a place near Jerusalem (譯作: Bethaz-maveth. Compare <w src="5820" lemma="עַזְמָוֶת" xlit="ʻAzmâveth" POS="az-maw'-veth"/>.)
H1042: בית ענות | 意義: Beth-anoth = "house of responses (or afflictions)"; 1) a place in Judah (譯作: Beth-anoth.)
H1043: בית ענת | 意義: Beth-anath = "house of response (or affliction)"; 1) a place in Naphtali (譯作: Beth-anath.)
H1044: בית עקד | 意義: Beth-eged = "house of binding" i.e. "shearing house"; 1) a place in the northern kingdom (譯作: shearing house.)
H1045: בית עשתרות | 意義: Beth-ashtaroth = "house of Ashtaroth"; 1) a Philistine temple (譯作: house of Ashtaroth. Compare <w src="1203" lemma="בְּעֶשְׁתְּרָה" xlit="Bᵉʻeshtᵉrâh" POS="beh-esh-ter-aw'"/>, <w src="6252" lemma="עַשְׁתָּרוֹת" xlit="ʻAshtârôwth" POS="ash-taw-roth'"/>.)
H1046: בית פלט | 意義: Beth-palet = "house of escape" or "place of escape"; 1) a place in southern Judah (譯作: Beth-palet.)
H1047: בית פעור | 意義: Beth-peor = "house of Peor"; 1) a place east of the Jordan,  in the land of the Amorites,  allotted to the tribe of Reuben (譯作: Bethpeor.)
H1048: בית פצץ | 意義: Beth-pazzez = "house of dispersion"; 1) a place in Issachar (譯作: Beth-pazzez.)
H1049: בית צור | 意義: Beth-zur = "house of the rock"; n pr loc; 1) a place in Judah; n pr m; 2) the son of Maon (譯作: Beth-zur.)
H1050: בית רחוב | 意義: Beth-rehob = "house of the street"; 1) a place in Dan on road to Hamath (譯作: Beth-rehob.)
H1051: בית רפא | 意義: Beth-rapha = "house of healing"; 1) the son of Eshton (譯作: Beth-rapha.)
H1052: בית שאן | 意義: Beth-shean or Beth-Shan = "house of ease"; 1) a place in Manasseh,  west of the Jordan (譯作: Beth-shean, Beth-Shan.)
H1053: בית שמש | 意義: Beth-shemesh = "house of the sun" or "sun-temple"; 1) a town in southwest Judah; 2) a town in Naphtali; 3) a town in Issachar; 4) a town in Egypt (譯作: Beth-shemesh.)
H1054: בית תפוח | 意義: Beth-tappuah = "house of the apple" of "place of apples"; 1) a town in Judah (譯作: Beth-tappuah.)
H1055: ביתן | 意義: 1) house,  palace (譯作: palace.)
H1056: בכא | 意義: Baca = "weeping"; 1) a valley in Palestine (譯作: Baca.)
H1057: בכא | 意義: 1) balsam tree-a shrub which drips sap when it is cut; 2) possible name of a vale of balsam trees in Ps 84:6 (譯作: mulberry tree.)
H1058: בכה | 意義: 1) to weep,  bewail,  cry,  shed tears; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to weep (in grief,  humiliation,  or joy); 1a2) to weep bitterly (with cognate acc.); 1a3) to weep upon (embrace and weep); 1a4) to bewail; 1b) (Piel) participle; 1b1) lamenting; 1b2) bewailing (譯作: [idiom] at all, bewail, complain, make lamentation, [idiom] more, mourn, [idiom] sore, [idiom] with tears, weep.)
H1059: בכה | 意義: 1) a weeping (譯作: [idiom] sore.)
H1060: בכור | 意義: 1) firstborn,  firstling; 1a) of men and women; 1b) of animals; 1c) noun of relation (fig.) (譯作: eldest (son), firstborn(-ling).)
H1061: בכור | 意義: 1) first-fruits; 1a) the first of the crops and fruit that ripened,  was gathered, and offered to God according to the ritual of Pentecost; 1b) the bread made of the new grain offered at Pentecost; 1c) the day of the first-fruits (Pentecost) (譯作: first fruit (-ripe (figuratively)), hasty fruit.)
H1062: בכורה | 意義: 1) birthright,  primogeniture,  right of the first-born (譯作: birthright, firstborn(-ling).)
H1063: בכורה | 意義: 1) first-ripe fig,  early fig; 2) (TWOT) firstfruits (譯作: firstripe (fruit).)
H1064: בכורת | 意義: Bechorath = "first-born"; 1) a Benjamite ancestor of Saul (譯作: Bechorath.)
H1065: בכי | 意義: 1) a weeping,  weeping (譯作: overflowing, [idiom] sore, (continual) weeping, wept.)
H1066: בכים | 意義: Bochim = "weeping"; 1) a place near Gilgal (or Bethel),  where sons of Israel wept (譯作: Bochim.)
H1067: בכירה | 意義: 1) firstborn daughter,  firstborn (of women); 1a) always used of women (譯作: firstborn.)
H1068: בכית | 意義: 1) weeping (譯作: mourning.)
H1069: בכר | 意義: 1) to be born first; 1a) (Piel); 1a1) to bear early,  new fruit; 1a2) to give the right of the firstborn; 1a2a) to make as firstborn; 1a2b) to constitute as firstborn; 1b) (Pual); 1b1) to be born a firstling; 1b2) to be made a firstling; 1c) (Hiphil) one bearing her first child (譯作: make firstborn, be firstling, bring forth first child (new fruit).)
H1070: בכר | 意義: 1) young camel,  dromedary (譯作: dromedary.)
H1071: בכר | 意義: Becher = "young camel"; 1) a son of Ephraim; 2) a son of Benjamin (譯作: Becher.)
H1072: בכרה | 意義: 1) a young female camel,  young camel,  dromedary (譯作: dromedary.)
H1073: בכרה | 意義: 1) first ripe fig,  early fig; 2) (TWOT) firstfruits (譯作: firstripe.)
H1074: בכרו | 意義: Bocheru = "firstborn"; 1) a Benjamite (譯作: Bocheru.)
H1075: בכרי | 意義: Bichri = "youthful"; n pr m; 1) a Benjamite,  father of Sheba; adj; 2) (BDB) the Bichrites (譯作: Bichri.)
H1076: בכרי | 意義: Bachrites = "a dromedary: first-born"; 1) one of the family of Becher (譯作: Bachrites.)
H1077: בל | 意義: 1) not,  hardly,  else (譯作: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.)
H1078: בל | 意義: Bel = "lord"; 1) a chief Babylonian deity (譯作: Bel.)
H1079: בל | 意義: 1) mind,  heart (譯作: heart.)
H1080: בלא | 意義: 1) (Pael) to wear away,  wear out; 1a) to harass constantly (fig.) (譯作: wear out.)
H1081: בלאדן | 意義: Baladan = "Bel (is his) lord)"; 1) the father of Merodach-baladan to whom Hezekiah revealed the riches of his treasures (譯作: Baladan.)
H1082: בלג | 意義: 1) to gleam,  smile; 1a) (Hiphil) only; 1a1) to show a smile,  look pleasant; 1a2) to cause to burst (譯作: comfort, (recover) strength(-en).)
H1083: בלגה | 意義: Bilgah = "cheerfulness"; 1) a priest of the 15th course,  in David's time; 2) a priest accompanying Zerubbabel (譯作: Bilgah.)
H1084: בלגי | 意義: Bilgai = "my cheerfulness"; 1) a priest who covenanted with Nehemiah (譯作: Bilgai.)
H1085: בלדד | 意義: Bildad = "confusing (by mingling) love"; 1) the second friend of Job (譯作: Bildad.)
H1086: בלה | 意義: 1) to wear out,  become old; 1a) (Qal) to wear out; 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to wear out; 1b2) to wear out by use,  use up completely; 1b3) to enjoy,  use to the full (譯作: consume, enjoy long, become (make, wax) old, spend, waste.)
H1087: בלה | 意義: 1) worn out,  old (譯作: old.)
H1088: בלה | 意義: Balah = "waxed old"; 1) a place in Simeon (譯作: Balah.)
H1089: בלה | 意義: 1) (Piel) to trouble (譯作: trouble.)
H1090: בלהה | 意義: Bilhah = "troubled"; n pr f; 1) Rachel's handmaid whom she gave to Jacob as a concubine,  mother to two of Jacob's children,  Dan and Naphtali; n prloc; 2) a city in Simeon (譯作: Bilhah.)
H1091: בלהה | 意義: 1) terror,  destruction,  calamity,  dreadful event (譯作: terror, trouble.)
H1092: בלהן | 意義: Bilhan = "their decrepitude"; 1) a descendant of Esau; 2) a Benjamite (譯作: Bilhan.)
H1093: בלו | 意義: 1) tribute (譯作: tribute.)
H1094: בלוא | 意義: 1) worn out things,  rags (譯作: old.)
H1095: בלטשאצר | 意義: Belteshazzar = "lord of the straitened's treasure"; 1) the 4th of the greater prophets,  taken as hostage in the first deportation to Babylon; because of the gift of God of the interpretation of dreams,  he became the 2nd in command of the Babylon empire and lasted through the end of the Babylonian empire and into the Persian empire.  His prophecies are the key to the understanding of end time events.  Noted for his purity and holiness by contemporary prophet,  Ezekiel; 1a) also, 'Daniel' ( H01840 or  H01841) (譯作: Belteshazzar.)
H1096: בלטשאצר | 意義: Belteshazzar = "lord of the straitened's treasure"; 1) the 4th of the greater prophets,  taken as hostage in the first deportation to Babylon; because of the gift of God of the interpretation of dreams,  he became the 2nd in command of the Babylon empire and lasted through the end of the Babylonian empire and into the Persian empire.  His prophecies are the key to the understanding of end time events.  Noted for his purity and holiness by contemporary prophet,  Ezekiel; 1a) also, 'Daniel' ( H01840 or  H01841) (譯作: Belteshazzar.)
H1097: בלי | 意義: subst; 1) wearing out; adv of negation; 2) without,  no,  not (譯作: corruption, ig(norantly), for lack of, where no...is, so that no, none, not, un(awares), without.)
H1098: בליל | 意義: 1) fodder (譯作: corn, fodder, provender.)
H1099: בלימה | 意義: 1) nothingness (譯作: nothing.)
H1100: בליעל | 意義: 1) worthlessness; 1a) worthless,  good for nothing,  unprofitable,  base fellow; 1b) wicked; 1c) ruin,  destruction (construct) (譯作: Belial, evil, naughty, ungodly (men), wicked.)
H1101: בלל | 意義: 1) to mix,  mingle,  confuse,  confound; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to mingle, confuse; 1a2) to mix; 1a3) to give provender,  feed (animals); 1b) (Hithpoel) to mix oneself (among others); 1c) (Hiphil) to fade away (譯作: anoint, confound, [idiom] fade, mingle, mix (self), give provender, temper.)
H1102: בלם | 意義: 1) (Qal) to curb,  hold in,  restrain (譯作: be held in.)
H1103: בלס | 意義: 1) (Qal) to gather figs,  tend sycamore trees (譯作: gatherer.)
H1104: בלע | 意義: 1) to swallow down,  swallow up,  engulf,  eat up; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to swallow down; 1a2) to swallow up, engulf; 1b) (Niphal) to be swallowed up; 1c) (Piel); 1c1) to swallow; 1c2) to swallow up,  engulf; 1c3) squandering (fig.); 1d) (Pual) to be swallowed up; 1e) (Hithpael) to be ended (譯作: cover, destroy, devour, eat up, be at end, spend up, swallow down (up).)
H1105: בלע | 意義: 1) a swallowing,  devouring (fig. for ruin); 2) a thing swallowed (譯作: devouring, that which he hath swallowed up.)
H1106: בלע | 意義: Bela = "destruction"; n pr m; 1) a king of Edom; 2) first son of Benjamin; 3) a son of Ahaz,  a Reubenite; n pr loc; 4) one of the five cities of the plain which was spared at the intercession of Lot,  and received the name of Zoar (譯作: Bela.)
H1107: בלעדי | 意義: 1) apart from,  except, without,  besides (譯作: beside, not (in), save, without.)
H1108: בלעי | 意義: Belaites = "swallowing"; 1) descendants of Bela (譯作: Belaites.)
H1109: בלעם | 意義: Balaam = "not of the people"; n pr m; 1) the son of Beor,  a man endowed with the gift of prophecy; n pr loc; 2) a town in Manasseh (譯作: Balaam, Bileam.)
H1110: בלק | 意義: 1) to waste,  lay waste,  devastate; 1a) (Poel) to make waste; 1b) (Pual) devastated (participle) (譯作: (make) waste.)
H1111: בלק | 意義: Balak = "devastator"; 1) a king of Moab who hired Balaam to curse Israel (譯作: Balak.)
H1112: בלשאצר | 意義: Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"; 1) king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel interpreted the writing on the wall (譯作: Belshazzar.)
H1113: בלשאצר | 意義: Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"; 1) king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel interpreted the writing on the wall (譯作: Belshazzar.)
H1114: בלשן | 意義: Bilshan = "in slander"; 1) an exile who returned with Zerubbabel (譯作: Bilshan.)
H1115: בלתי | 意義: subst; 1) not,  except; adv; 2) not; 3) except (after preceding negation); conj; 4) except (after an implied or expressed negation); with prep; 5) so as not,  in order not; 6) an account of not,  because...not; 7) until not (譯作: because un(satiable), beside, but, [phrase] continual, except, from, lest, neither, no more, none, not, nothing, save, that no, without.)
H1116: במה | 意義: 1) high place,  ridge,  height,  bamah (technical name for cultic platform); 1a) high place,  mountain; 1b) high places,  battlefields; 1c) high places (as places of worship); 1d) funeral mound? (譯作: height, high place, wave.)
H1117: במה | 意義: Bamah = "high place"; 1) a place in Palestine (of places of idolatrous worship) (譯作: Bamah. See also <w src="1120" lemma="בָּמוֹת" xlit="Bâmôwth" POS="baw-moth'"/>.)
H1118: במהל | 意義: Bimhal = "in circumcision: in weakness (by mixture)"; 1) a descendant of Asher (譯作: Bimhal.)
H1119: במו | 意義: 1) in,  at,  by (譯作: for, in into, through.)
H1120: במות | 意義: Bamoth = "high places" or "great high place"; 1) a town on the river Arnon in Moab (譯作: Bamoth, Bamoth-baal.)
H1121: בן | 意義: 1) son,  grandson,  child,  member of a group; 1a) son,  male child; 1b) grandson; 1c) children (pl. - male and female); 1d) youth,  young men (pl.); 1e) young (of animals); 1f) sons (as characterisation,  i.e. sons of injustice [for un- righteous men] or sons of God [for angels]; 1g) people (of a nation) (pl.); 1h) of lifeless things,  i.e. sparks,  stars,  arrows (fig.); 1i) a member of a guild,  order,  class (譯作: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch, breed, [phrase] (young) bullock, [phrase] (young) calf, [idiom] came up in, child, colt, [idiom] common, [idiom] corn, daughter, [idiom] of first, [phrase] firstborn, foal, [phrase] very fruitful, [phrase] postage, [idiom] in, [phrase] kid, [phrase] lamb, ([phrase]) man, meet, [phrase] mighty, [phrase] nephew, old, ([phrase]) people, [phrase] rebel, [phrase] robber, [idiom] servant born, [idiom] soldier, son, [phrase] spark, [phrase] steward, [phrase] stranger, [idiom] surely, them of, [phrase] tumultuous one, [phrase] valiant(-est), whelp, worthy, young (one), youth.)
H1122: בן | 意義: Ben = "son"; 1) a Levite,  one of the porters appointed by David for the ark (譯作: Ben.)
H1123: בן | 意義: 1) son,  child (譯作: child, son, young.)
H1124: בנא | 意義: 1) to build; 1a) (P'al) to build; 1b) (Ithp'il) to be built (譯作: build, make.)
H1125: בןאבינדב | 意義: Ben-Abinadab = "son of Abinadab"; 1) an officer of Solomon (譯作: the son of Abinadab.)
H1126: בןאוני | 意義: Ben-oni = "son of my sorrow"; 1) the name given to Benjamin by Rachel (譯作: Ben-oni.)
H1127: בןגבר | 意義: Ben-geber = "the son of Geber" or "the son of a man"; 1) an officer of Solomon (譯作: the son of Geber.)
H1128: בןדקר | 意義: Ben-dekar = "son of stabbing" or "son of Dekar"; 1) an officer of Solomon (譯作: the son of Dekar.)
H1129: בנה | 意義: 1) to build,  rebuild,  establish,  cause to continue; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to build,  rebuild; 1a2) to build a house (ie,  establish a family); 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be built; 1b2) to be rebuilt; 1b3) established (of restored exiles) (fig.); 1b4) established (made permanent); 1b5) to be built up (of childless wife becoming the mother of a family through the children of a concubine) (譯作: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.)
H1130: בןהדד | 意義: Ben-hadad = "son of [the false god] Hadad"; 1) the king of Syria,  contemporary with Asa of Judah; 2) the son of Hazael, also king of Syria (譯作: Benhadad.)
H1131: בנוי | 意義: Binnui = "built up"; 1) an exile returnee with Zerubbabel,  son of Henadad,  who assisted at the reparation of the wall of Jerusalem,  under Nehemiah; 2) a Levite in time of Ezra,  father of Noadiah; 3) another Levite in time of Ezra,  who took a foreign wife; 4) still another Levite in time of Ezra,  who took a foreign wife (譯作: Binnui.)
H1132: בןזוחת | 意義: Ben-zoheth = "son of Zoheth"; 1) one of the tribe of Judah (譯作: Ben-zoketh.)
H1133: בןחור | 意義: Ben-hur = "son of whiteness" or "son of Chur"; 1) a man who was commissariat officer for Solomon in Mount Ephraim (譯作: the son of Hur.)
H1134: בןחיל | 意義: Ben-hail = "son of strength" or "son (man) of might"; 1) a ruler (prince) under Jehoshaphat (譯作: Ben-hail.)
H1135: בןחנן | 意義: Ben-hanan = "son of favour"; 1) one of the tribe of Judah (譯作: Ben-hanan.)
H1136: בןחסד | 意義: Ben-hesed = "son of mercy"; 1) an officer of Solomon (譯作: the son of Hesed.)
H1137: בני | 意義: Bani = "built"; 1) a Gadite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 2) a Levite of the line of Merari,  and forefather to Ethan; 3) a man of Judah of the line of Pharez; 4) "children of Bani" returned from captivity with Zerubbabel; 5)  one or up to three Levites in Nehemiah's time (譯作: Bani.)
H1138: בני | 意義: Bunni = "built"; 1) a Levite in the time of Nehemiah; 2) another Levite of earlier date (譯作: Bunni.)
H1139: בניברק | 意義: Bene-barak = "sons of lightning"; 1) a city in Dan (譯作: Bene-barak.)
H1140: בניה | 意義: 1) structure,  building (譯作: building.)
H1141: בניה | 意義: Benaiah = "Jehovah has built" or "Yahweh has built up"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors,  son of Jehoiada the chief priest,  a Levite,  set by David over his bodyguard,  later having remained faithful to Solomon during Adonijah's attempt on the crown,  was raised into the place of Joab as commander-in-chief of the army; 2) the Pirathonite,  an Ephraimite,  one of David's thirty mighty warriors, and the captain of the eleventh monthly course; 3) a Simeonite,  a prince of the families of Simeon; 4) a Levite in the time of David who played with a psaltery on Alamoth; 5) a priest in the time of David,  appointed to blow the trumpet before the ark; 6) a Levite of the sons of Asaph; 7) a Levite in the time of Hezekiah; 8) Four Israelites in the time of Ezra who had taken strange wives; 9) the father of Pelatiah (譯作: Benaiah.)
H1142: בני יעקן | 意義: Bene-jaakan = "sons of twisting"; 1) an Israelite place of encampment in the wilderness (same as  H0885) (譯作: Bene-jaakan.)
H1143: בנים | 意義: 1) between,  space between two armies; 1a) man of the space between armies,  i.e. champion (of Goliath) (meton) (譯作: [phrase] champion.)
H1144: בנימין | 意義: Benjamin = "son of the right hand"; 1) Jacob's and Rachel's youngest son,  Joseph's full brother; 2) son of Bilhan,  great-grandson of Benjamin; 3) a Benjamite,  one of the sons of Harim,  in the time of Ezra who had taken a strange wife; 4) the tribe descended from Benjamin,  the son of Jacob (譯作: Benjamin.)
H1145: בןימיני | 意義: Benjamite = "a son of the right hand"; 1) one of the tribe of Benjamin (譯作: Benjamite, of Benjamin.)
H1146: בנין | 意義: 1) structure,  building (譯作: building.)
H1147: בנין | 意義: 1) a building,  structure (譯作: building.)
H1148: בנינו | 意義: Beninu = "our son"; 1) a returning Levite exile who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah (譯作: Beninu.)
H1149: בנס | 意義: 1) (P'al) to be angry (譯作: be angry.)
H1150: בנעא | 意義: Binea or Bineah = fountain; 1) a descendant of Jonathan (譯作: Binea, Bineah.)
H1151: בןעמי | 意義: Ben-ami = "son of my people"; 1) son of Lot,  born to his second daughter,  progenitor of the Ammonites (譯作: Ben-ammi.)
H1152: בסודיה | 意義: Besodeiah = "with the counsel of Jehovah" or "in the secret of the Lord"; 1) father of one of the repairers of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Besodeiah.)
H1153: בסר | 意義: Besai = "my treading"; 1) a temple slave (or group of slaves) who returned with Zerubbabel (譯作: Besai.)
H1154: בסר | 意義: 1) unripe or sour grapes (譯作: unripe grape.)
H1155: בסר | 意義: 1) unripe grapes,  sour grapes (譯作: sour grape.)
H1156: בעא | 意義: 1) to ask,  seek,  request,  desire,  pray,  make petition; 1a) (P'al); 1a1) to ask,  request; 1a2) to seek (for favour) (譯作: ask, desire, make (petition), pray, request, seek.)
H1157: בעד | 意義: 1) behind,  through,  round about,  on behalf of,  away from,  about; 1a) through (of action); 1b) behind (with verbs of shutting); 1c) about (with verbs of fencing); 1d) on behalf of (metaph. especially with Hithpael) (譯作: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.)
H1158: בעה | 意義: 1) to seek out,  swell,  cause to swell,  boil up,  enquire; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to seek,  enquire; 1a2) to cause to boil up; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be searched out; 1b2) to be swelling,  bulging,  swelling out (譯作: cause, inquire, seek up, swell out.)
H1159: בעו | 意義: 1) petition,  request; 2) prayer (always in Jewish liturgy) (譯作: petition.)
H1160: בעור | 意義: Beor = "burning"; 1) father of Balaam; 2) father of Bela,  king of Edom (譯作: Beor.)
H1161: בעותים | 意義: 1) terrors,  alarms (occasioned by God) (譯作: terrors.)
H1162: בעז | 意義: Boaz = "fleetness"; 1) ancestor of David,  kinsman-redeemer to Ruth,  daughter-in-law of Naomi; 2) name of the left of two brazen pillars,  18 cubits high,  erected in the porch of Solomon's temple (譯作: Boaz.)
H1163: בעט | 意義: 1) to kick,  kick at; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to kick; 1a2) to kick at; 1a3) to desire (fig.) (譯作: kick.)
H1164: בעי | 意義: 1) ruin,  heap of ruins (譯作: grave.)
H1165: בעיר | 意義: 1) beasts,  cattle (譯作: beast, cattle.)
H1166: בעל | 意義: 1) to marry,  rule over,  possess,  own; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to marry,  be lord (husband) over; 1a2) to rule over; 1b) (Niphal) to be married (譯作: have dominion (over), be husband, marry(-ried, [idiom] wife).)
H1167: בעל | 意義: 1) owner,  husband,  lord; 1a) owner; 1b) a husband; 1c) citizens,  inhabitants; 1d) rulers,  lords; 1e) (noun of relationship used to characterise-ie,  master of dreams); 1f) lord (used of foreign gods) (譯作: [phrase] archer, [phrase] babbler, [phrase] bird, captain, chief man, [phrase] confederate, [phrase] have to do, [phrase] dreamer, those to whom it is due, [phrase] furious, those that are given to it, great, [phrase] hairy, he that hath it, have, [phrase] horseman, husband, lord, man, [phrase] married, master, person, [phrase] sworn, they of.)
H1168: בעל | 意義: Baal = "lord"; n pr m; 1) supreme male divinity of the Phoenicians or Canaanites; 2) a Reubenite; 3) the son of Jehiel and grandfather of Saul; n pr loc; 4) a town of Simeon,  probably identical to Baalath-beer (譯作: Baal, (plural) Baalim.)
H1169: בעל | 意義: 1) owner,  lord (譯作: [phrase] chancellor.)
H1170: בעל ברית | 意義: Baal-berith = "lord of the covenant"; 1) a god of the Philistines (譯作: Baal-berith.)
H1171: בעל גד | 意義: Baal-gad = "lord of fortune"; 1) a city noted for Baal-worship,  located at the most northern or northwestern point to which Joshua's victories extended (譯作: Baal-gad.)
H1172: בעלה | 意義: 1) mistress,  female owner; 2) sorceress,  necromancer (noun of relationship) (譯作: that hath, mistress.)
H1173: בעלה | 意義: Baalah = "mistress"; 1) another name for Kirjath-jearim or Kirjath-baal; modern Kuriet el Enab; 2) a town in the south of Judah,  also called Balah and Bilhah (譯作: Baalah.)
H1174: בעל המון | 意義: Baal-hamon = "lord (possessor) of abundance"; 1) the site of Solomon's vineyard (譯作: Baal-hamon.)
H1175: בעלות | 意義: Baalath or Bealoth = "mistresses"; 1) a town in south Judah (譯作: Bealoth, in Aloth (by mistake for a plural from <w src="5927" lemma="עָלָה" xlit="ʻâlâh" POS="aw-law'"/> with prepositional prefix).)
H1176: בעל זבוב | 意義: Baal-zebub = "lord of the fly"; 1) a Philistine deity worshipped at Ekron (譯作: Baal-zebub.)
H1177: בעל חנן | 意義: Baal-hanan = "Baal is gracious"; 1) an early king of Edom; 2) one of David's officers,  a Gederite,  who had the superintendence of his olive and sycamore plantations (譯作: Baal-hanan.)
H1178: בעל חצור | 意義: Baal-hazor = "lord of the village"; 1) a town on the border between Ephraim and Benjamin,  apparent location of a sheep farm of Absalom and location of Amnon's murder (譯作: Baal-hazor.)
H1179: בעל חרמון | 意義: Baal-hermon or Baal-chermon = "lord of destruction"; 1) a city near or on Mount Hermon,  named as a seat of Baal worship (譯作: Baal-hermon.)
H1180: בעלי | 意義: Baali = "my lord"; 1) a deity in the northern kingdom,  variation of the name 'Baal' (譯作: Baali.)
H1181: בעלי במות | 意義: Baale-bamoth = "the lords of the high places"; 1) the people of Arnon,  east of Jordan (譯作: lords of the high places.)
H1182: בעלידע | 意義: Beeliada = "the lord knows"; 1) a son of David,  born in Jerusalem,  elsewhere named 'Eliada' (譯作: Beeliada.)
H1183: בעליה | 意義: Bealiah = "Jehovah is master"; 1) a Benjamite who went over to David at Ziklag and was one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Bealiah.)
H1184: בעלי יהודה | 意義: Baale-Judah = "the lords of Judah"; 1) a place in Judah named for the Baalim,  also known as Kirjath-jearim, Kirjath-baal; modern Kuriet el Enab (譯作: Baale of Judah.)
H1185: בעליס | 意義: Baalis = "lord of the banner: in causing the joy"; 1) king of the Ammonites at the time of the destruction of Jerusalem by Nebuchadnezzar (譯作: Baalis.)
H1186: בעל מעון | 意義: Baal-meon = "lord of the habitation"; 1) a town in Reuben,  mentioned in connection with Nebo,  and in the time of Ezekiel,  Moabite (譯作: Baal-meon.)
H1187: בעל פעור | 意義: Baal-peor = "lord of the gap"; 1) the deity worshipped at Peor with probable licentious rites (譯作: Baal-peor.)
H1188: בעל פרצים | 意義: Baal-perazim = "lord of the breaks"; 1) the site of a victory of David over the Philistines,  and of a great destruction of their images; also called 'Mount Perazim' (譯作: Baal-perazim.)
H1189: בעל צפון | 意義: Baal Tsphon or Baal-zephon = "lord of the north"; 1) a place in Egypt near the Red Sea where Pharaoh and his army were destroyed during the Exodus (譯作: Baal-zephon.)
H1190: בעל שלשה | 意義: Baal-shalisha = "thrice-great lord"; 1) a place in Ephraim near Gilgal (譯作: Baal-shalisha.)
H1191: בעלת | 意義: Baalath = "mistress"; 1) a town in Dan (譯作: Baalath.)
H1192: בעלת באר | 意義: Baalath-beer = "mistress of the well"; 1) a town in the south part of Judah,  given to Simeon,  which also bore the name of 'Ramath-negeb' (譯作: Baalath-beer.)
H1193: בעל תמר | 意義: Baal-tamar = "lord of the palms"; 1) a place near Gibeah in Benjamin (譯作: Baal-tamar.)
H1194: בען | 意義: Beon = "in the dwelling: indwelling"; 1) a place or city in Reuben (譯作: Beon.)
H1195: בענא | 意義: Baana or Baanah = "in the affliction"; 1) the son of Ahilud,  Solomon's commissariat officer in Jezreel and the north of the Jordan valley; 2) another of Solomon's officers; 3) father of Zadok who assisted in rebuilding the wall of Jerusalem under Nehemiah (譯作: Baana, Baanah.)
H1196: בענה | 意義: Baana or Baanah = "in affliction"; 1) a Benjamite,  son Rimmon,  who with his brother Rechab murdered Ish-bosheth. For this,  killed by David,  mutilated bodies hung up over the pool at Hebron; 2) a Netophathite,  father of Heleb or Heled,  one of David's mighty warriors; 3) the head of a family of exiles returning with Zerubbabel; 4) a chief of the people (譯作: Baanah.)
H1197: בער | 意義: 1) to burn,  consume,  kindle,  be kindled; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to begin to burn,  be kindled,  start burning; 1a2) to burn,  be burning; 1a3) to burn,  consume; 1a4) Jehovah's wrath,  human wrath (fig.); 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to kindle,  burn; 1b2) to consume,  remove (of guilt) (fig.); 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to kindle; 1c2) to burn up; 1c3) to consume (destroy); 1d) (Pual) to burn; v denom; 2) to be stupid, brutish, barbarous; 2a) (Qal) to be stupid, dull-hearted, unreceptive; 2b) (Niphal) to be stupid, dull-hearted; 2c) (Piel) to feed, graze; 2d) (Hiphil) to cause to be grazed over (譯作: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.)
H1198: בער | 意義: 1) brutishness,  stupidity,  brutish (person) (譯作: brutish (person), foolish.)
H1199: בערא | 意義: Baara = "brutish"; 1) one of the wives of Shaharaim,  a Benjamite (譯作: Baara.)
H1200: בערה | 意義: 1) burning,  fire (譯作: fire.)
H1201: בעשא | 意義: Baasha = "wicked"; 1) third king of the northern kingdom of Israel and the founder of its second dynasty having killed the second king, Nadab (譯作: Baasha.)
H1202: בעשיה | 意義: Baaseiah = "in the service of Jehovah"; 1) a Gershonite Levite,  one of the forefathers of Asaph the singer (譯作: Baaseiah.)
H1203: בעשתרה | 意義: Beeshterah = "with increase"; 1) a Levitical city in Manasseh,  east of the Jordan; probably identical with 'Ashtaroth' (譯作: Beeshterah.)
H1204: בעת | 意義: 1) to terrify,  startle,  fall upon,  dismay,  be overtaken by sudden terror; 1a) (Niphal) to be terrified; 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to fall upon,  overwhelm; 1b2) to terrify (譯作: affright, be (make) afraid, terrify, trouble.)
H1205: בעתה | 意義: 1) terror,  dismay (譯作: trouble.)
H1206: בץ | 意義: 1) mire (譯作: mire.)
H1207: כצה | 意義: 1) swamp,  marsh (譯作: fen, mire(-ry place).)
H1208: בצור | 意義: 1) vintage; 2) (CLBL) inaccessible (譯作: vintage (by confusion with <w src="1210" lemma="בָּצִיר" xlit="bâtsîyr" POS="baw-tseer'"/>).)
H1209: בצי | 意義: Bezai = "conqueror"; 1) a chief of the returning exiles in the time of Ezra (譯作: Bezai.)
H1210: בציר | 意義: 1) vintage (譯作: vintage.)
H1211: בצל | 意義: 1) onion (譯作: onion.)
H1212: בצלאל | 意義: Bezaleel = "in the shadow (i.e. protection) of God"; 1) son of Uri and grandson of Hur; a skilled Judahite artisan in all works of metal,  wood,  and stone and one of the architects of the tabernacle; 2) an Israelite,  one of the sons of Pahath-moab,  in the time of Ezra who had taken a strange wife (譯作: Bezaleel.)
H1213: בצלות | 意義: Bazlith or Bazluth = "asking"; 1) a head of a family of exiles returning with Zerubbabel (譯作: Bazlith, Bazluth.)
H1214: בצע | 意義: 1) to cut off,  break off,  gain by unrighteous violence,  get,  finish, be covetous,  be greedy; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to cut off; 1a2) to stop; 1a3) to gain wrongfully or by violence; 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to cut off,  sever; 1b2) to finish,  complete,  accomplish; 1b3) to violently make gain of (譯作: (be) covet(-ous), cut (off), finish, fulfill, gain (greedily), get, be given to (covetousness), greedy, perform, be wounded.)
H1215: בצע | 意義: 1) profit,  unjust gain,  gain (profit) acquired by violence (譯作: covetousness, (dishonest) gain, lucre, profit.)
H1216: בצק | 意義: 1) (Qal) to swell,  become blistered (譯作: swell.)
H1217: בצק | 意義: 1) dough (unleavened) (譯作: dough, flour.)
H1218: בצקת | 意義: Bozkath or Boscath = "rocky height"; 1) a city in Judah in the lowlands toward the Philistines,  home of Josiah's mother (譯作: Bozcath, Boskath.)
H1219: בצר | 意義: 1) to gather,  restrain,  fence,  fortify,  make inaccessible,  enclose; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to cut off; 1a2) fortified,  cut off,  made inaccessible (pass participle); 1a3) secrets,  mysteries,  inaccessible things (subst); 1b) (Niphal) to be withheld; 1c) (Piel) to fortify (譯作: cut off, (de-) fenced, fortify, (grape) gather(-er), mighty things, restrain, strong, wall (up), withhold.)
H1220: בצר | 意義: 1) gold,  precious ore,  ring-gold (譯作: gold defence.)
H1221: בצר | 意義: Bezer = "gold ore" or "remote fortress"; n pr m; 1) son of Zophah,  one of the heads of the houses of Asher; n pr loc; 2) a city of refuge in Reuben in the downs on the east of the Jordan (譯作: Bezer.)
H1222: בצר | 意義: 1) precious ore,  gold,  ring-gold (譯作: gold.)
H1223: בצרה | 意義: 1) enclosure,  fold,  sheepfold (AV-Bozrah) (譯作: Bozrah.)
H1224: בצרה | 意義: Bozrah = "sheepfold" or "fortress"; 1) a town in Edom; 2) a town in Moab (譯作: Bozrah.)
H1225: בצרון | 意義: 1) stronghold (譯作: stronghold.)
H1226: בצרת | 意義: 1) dearth,  drought,  destitution (譯作: dearth, drought.)
H1227: בקבוק | 意義: Bakbuk = "bottle"; 1) a head of a family of temple-slaves returning from exile with Zerubbabel (譯作: Bakbuk.)
H1228: בקבק | 意義: 1) flask,  bottle (譯作: bottle, cruse.)
H1229: בקבקיה | 意義: Bakbukiah = "wasting of Jehovah"; 1) a Levite in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Bakbukiah.)
H1230: בקבקר | 意義: Bakbakkar = "searcher"; 1) a Levite,  apparently a descendant of Asaph (譯作: Bakbakkar.)
H1231: בקי | 意義: Bukki = "wasting"; 1) son of Abishua and father of Uzzi,  fifth from Aaron in the line of the high priests; 2) son of Jogli,  prince of the tribe of Dan,  one of the ten men chosen to apportion the land of Canaan between the tribes (譯作: Bukki.)
H1232: בקיה | 意義: Bukkiah = "Jehovah has emptied"; 1) a Kohathite Levite,  of the sons of Heman,  one of the musicians in the temple (譯作: Bukkiah.)
H1233: בקיע | 意義: 1) fissure,  breach,  cleft (譯作: breach, cleft.)
H1234: בקע | 意義: 1) to split,  cleave,  break open,  divide,  break through,  rip up,  break up,  tear; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to cleave,  cleave open; 1a2) to break through,  break into; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be cleft,  be rent open,  be split open; 1b2) to be broken into; 1c) (Piel); 1c1) to cleave,  cut to pieces,  rend open; 1c2) to break through,  break down; 1d) (Pual); 1d1) to be ripped open,  be torn open; 1d2) to be rent; 1d3) to be broken into; 1e) (Hiphil); 1e1) to break into; 1e2) to break through; 1f) (Hophal) to be broken into; 1g) (Hithpael) to burst (themselves) open,  cleave asunder (譯作: make a breach, break forth (into, out, in pieces, through, up), be ready to burst, cleave (asunder), cut out, divide, hatch, rend (asunder), rip up, tear, win.)
H1235: בקע | 意義: 1) half,  part also called "shekel of the sanctuary" or "holy shekel"; 2) half a shekel (meton) There appears to be at least three different shekels,  one of silver, gold and copper. See a Bible Dictionary for a complete treatment of the subject. (譯作: bekah, half a shekel.)
H1236: בקעא | 意義: 1) plain (譯作: plain.)
H1237: בקעה | 意義: 1) valley; 2) plain,  level valley (譯作: plain, valley.)
H1238: בקק | 意義: 1) to empty; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to empty,  lay waste; 1a2) to make void (fig.); 1b) (Niphal) to be emptied; 1c) (Polel) to empty out,  devastate (譯作: (make) empty (out), fail, [idiom] utterly, make void.)
H1239: בקר | 意義: 1) to seek,  enquire,  consider; 1a) (Piel); 1a1) to seek,  look for; 1a2) to consider,  reflect (譯作: (make) inquire (-ry), (make) search, seek out.)
H1240: בקר | 意義: 1) to seek,  enquire; 1a) (Pael) to enquire; 1b) (Ithpael) to let search be made (譯作: inquire, make search.)
H1241: בקר | 意義: 1) cattle,  herd,  oxen,  ox; 1a) cattle (generic pl. but sing. in form-coll); 1b) herd (particular one); 1c) head of cattle (individually) (譯作: beeve, bull ([phrase] -ock), [phrase] calf, [phrase] cow, great (cattle), [phrase] heifer, herd, kine, ox.)
H1242: בקר | 意義: 1) morning,  break of day; 1a) morning; 1a1) of end of night; 1a2) of coming of daylight; 1a3) of coming of sunrise; 1a4) of beginning of day; 1a5) of bright joy after night of distress (fig.); 1b) morrow,  next day,  next morning (譯作: ([phrase]) day, early, morning, morrow.)
H1243: בקרה | 意義: 1) a seeking,  a care,  concern (譯作: seek out.)
H1244: בקרת | 意義: 1) punishment (after judicial enquiry),  compensation (譯作: scourged.)
H1245: בקש | 意義: 1) to seek,  require, desire,  exact,  request; 1a) (Piel); 1a1) to seek to find; 1a2) to seek to secure; 1a3) to seek the face; 1a4) to desire,  demand; 1a5) to require,  exact; 1a6) to ask,  request; 1b) (Pual) to be sought (譯作: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).)
H1246: בקשה | 意義: 1) request,  entreaty,  petition (譯作: request.)
H1247: בר | 意義: 1) son (譯作: [idiom] old, son.)
H1248: בר | 意義: 1) son,  heir (譯作: son.)
H1249: בר | 意義: adj; 1) pure,  clear,  sincere; 2) clean,  empty; adv; 3) purely (譯作: choice, clean, clear, pure.)
H1250: בר | 意義: 1) corn,  grain (譯作: corn, wheat.)
H1251: בר | 意義: 1) field (譯作: field.)
H1252: בר | 意義: 1) cleanness,  pureness (譯作: cleanness, pureness.)
H1253: בר | 意義: 1) lye,  potash,  alkali used in smelting metal (譯作: [idiom] never so, purely.)
H1254: ברא | 意義: 1) to create,  shape,  form; 1a) (Qal) to shape,  fashion,  create (always with God as subject); 1a1) of heaven and earth; 1a2) of individual man; 1a3) of new conditions and circumstances; 1a4) of transformations; 1b) (Niphal) to be created; 1b1) of heaven and earth; 1b2) of birth; 1b3) of something new; 1b4) of miracles; 1c) (Piel); 1c1) to cut down; 1c2) to cut out; 2) to be fat; 2a) (Hiphil) to make yourselves fat (譯作: choose, create (creator), cut down, dispatch, do, make (fat).)
H1255: בראדך בלאדן | 意義: Berodach-baladan = "worshipper of Baal"; 1) king of Babylon in the days of Hezekiah (譯作: Berodach-baladan.Birliy.)
H1256: בראיה | 意義: Beraiah = "Jehovah has created"; 1) son of Shimhi,  a chief man of Benjamin (譯作: Beraiah.)
H1257: ברבר | 意義: 1) (CLBL) fowl,  birds; 2) (BDB/TWOT) birds fattened for table of Solomon (譯作: fowl.)

He prophesied in the spirit; 24) one of the sons of Jehoshaphat; 25) a prophet in the reign of Uzziah,  who appears to have acted as the king's counsellor,  but of whom nothing is known; 26) father of Abijah or Abi,  Hezekiah's mother; 27) one of the family of Asaph in the reign of Hezekiah; 28) one of the rulers of the temple in the reign of Josiah; 29) son of Jeberechiah who was taken by the prophet Isaiah as one of the 'faithful witnesses to record' when he wrote concerning Maher-shalal-hash-baz (譯作: Zachariah, Zechariah.)
