H2608: חנניה | 意義: Hananiah = "God has favoured"; 1) the godly friend of Daniel whom Nebuchadnezzar renamed Shadrach; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord. See also, 'Shadrach' ( H07714 or  H07715); 2) one of the 14 sons of Heman and chief of the 16th course; 3) a general in the army of King Uzziah; 4) father of Zedekiah in the time of Jehoiakim; 5) son of Azur,  a Benjamite of Gibeon and a false prophet in the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah; 6) grandfather of Irijah,  the captain of the ward at the gate of Benjamin who arrested Jeremiah on the charge of deserting to the Chaldeans; 7) a head of a Benjamite house; 8) son of Zerubbabel from whom Christ derived His descent also called 'Joanna' by Luke; 9) one of the sons of Bebai who returned with Ezra from Babylon; 10) a priest,  one of the makers of the sacred ointments and incense, who built a portion of the wall of Jerusalem in the days of Nehemiah; 11) head of the priestly course of Jeremiah in the days of Joiakim; 12) ruler of the palace at Jerusalem under Nehemiah and also,  along with Hanani,  the Tirshatha's brother,  entrusted with the arrangements of guarding the gates of Jerusalem; 13) Two post exilic Israelites (譯作: Hananiah.)

H2977: יאשיה | 意義: Josiah = "whom Jehovah heals"; 1) son of Amon by Jedidah who succeeded his father to the throne of Judah and reigned for 31 years; his reign is noteworthy for the great revivals back to the worship of Jehovah which he led; 2) a returned exile and son of Zephaniah at whose house took place the solemn and symbolical crowning of Joshua the high priest in the time of Zechariah the prophet (譯作: Josiah.)
H2978: יאתון | 意義: 1) entrance (譯作: entrance.)
H2979: יאתרי | 意義: Jeaterai = "whom Jehovah leads"; 1) a Gershonite Levite,  son of Zerah (譯作: Jeaterai.)
H2980: יבב | 意義: 1) (Piel) to cry,  cry shrilly (譯作: cry out.)
H2981: יבול | 意義: 1) produce,  fruit,  produce (of the soil) (譯作: fruit, increase.)
H2982: יבוס | 意義: Jebus = "threshing place"; 1) an early name for Jerusalem,  the city of the Jebusites; also 'Jebusi' (譯作: Jebus.)
H2983: יבוסי | 意義: Jebusite = "descendants of Jebus"; 1) descendants of the 3rd son of Canaan who lived in or around the site of Jebus,  the early name for Jerusalem (譯作: Jebusite(-s).)
H2984: יבחר | 意義: Ibhar = "Jehovah chooses"; 1) one of the sons of David,  born in Jerusalem (譯作: Ibhar.)
H2985: יבין | 意義: Jabin = "whom God observes"; 1) a king of Hazor who organised a confederacy of the northern princes against Joshua; confederacy routed by the waters of Merom; 2) another king of Hazor whose general,  Sisera,  was defeated by Barak (譯作: Jabin.)
H2986: יבל | 意義: 1) to bring,  lead,  carry,  conduct,  bear along; 1a) (Hiphil); 1a1) to bear along,  bring; 1a2) to carry away,  lead away; 1a3) to lead,  conduct; 1b) (Hophal); 1b1) to be borne along; 1b2) to be borne (to the grave); 1b3) to be brought,  be led,  be conducted (譯作: bring (forth), carry, lead (forth).)
H2987: יבל | 意義: 1) (Aphel) to bring,  carry,  bear along (譯作: bring, carry.)

H2992: יבם | 意義: 1) (Piel) to perform levirate marriage,  perform the duty of a brother-in-law; 1a) the duty due to a brother who died childless - to marry his widow and have a son for his name (譯作: perform the duty of a husband's brother, marry.)
H2993: יבם | 意義: 1) brother-in-law,  husband's brother (譯作: husband's brother.)

H2995: יבנאל | 意義: Jabneel = "God causes to build"; 1) a town in Judah on the northern boundary near the sea; 2) a town in Naphtali on the boundary in upper Galilee (譯作: Jabneel.)
H2996: יבנה | 意義: Jabneh = "building of God"; 1) a Philistine city (譯作: Jabneh.)

H3000: יברכיהו | 意義: Jeberechiah = "Jehovah blesses"; 1) father of a Zechariah,  in the reign of Ahaz and time of Isaiah (譯作: Jeberechiah.)
H3001: יבש | 意義: 1) to make dry,  wither,  be dry,  become dry,  be dried up,  be withered; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be dry,  be dried up,  be without moisture; 1a2) to be dried up; 1b) (Piel) to make dry,  dry up; 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to dry up,  make dry; 1c1a) to dry up (water); 1c1b) to make dry,  wither; 1c1c) to exhibit dryness (譯作: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).)
H3002: יבש | 意義: 1) dry; 2) dried (譯作: dried (away), dry.)
H3003: יבש | 意義: Jabesh = "dry"; n pr loc; 1) a town in the territory of Gilead; according to Eusebius,  it is beyond the Jordan,  6 miles (10 km) from Pella,  on the mountain road to Gerasa; site unknown but may be modern 'Wadi Yabes'; n pr m; 2) father of Shallum,  the 15th king of the northern kingdom (譯作: Jobesh (-Gilead).)
H3004: יבשה | 意義: 1) dry land,  dry ground (譯作: dry (ground, land).)
H3005: יבשם | 意義: Jibsam = "pleasant"; 1) one of the sons of Tola and a grandson of Issachar (譯作: Jibsam.)
H3006: יבשת | 意義: 1) dry land (譯作: dry land.)
H3007: יבשת | 意義: 1) the earth (as a planet); 2) dry land (譯作: earth.)
H3008: יגאל | 意義: Igal or Igeal = "He redeems"; 1) son of Joseph and a spy from the tribe of Issachar; 2) son of Nathan of Zobah,  one of David's mighty warriors; 3) a son of Shemaiah and descendant of Zerubbabel (譯作: Igal, Igeal.)
H3009: יגב | 意義: 1) (Qal) to till,  be a husbandman (譯作: husbandman.)
H3010: יגב | 意義: 1) field,  ploughed field (譯作: field.)
H3011: יגבהה | 意義: Jogbehah = "lofty"; 1) one of the cities east of the Jordan which was built and fortified by the tribe of Gad (譯作: Jogbehah.)
H3012: יגדליהו | 意義: Igdaliah = "Jehovah is great"; 1) a prophet or holy man and father of Hanan in the time of Josiah (譯作: Igdaliah.)
H3013: יגה | 意義: 1) to afflict,  grieve,  suffer,  cause grief; 1a) (Niphal) grieved,  grieving (participle); 1b) (Piel) to grieve; 1c) (Hiphil) to cause grief,  cause sorrow (譯作: afflict, cause grief, grieve, sorrowful, vex.)
H3014: יגה | 意義: 1) (Hiphil) to repel,  thrust away,  push away (譯作: be removed.)
H3015: יגון | 意義: 1) grief,  sorrow,  anguish (譯作: grief, sorrow.)
H3016: יגור | 意義: 1) (Qal) fearful,  fearing (譯作: afraid, fearest.)
H3017: יגור | 意義: Jagur = "he sojourns"; 1) a town of Judah,  one of those farthest to the south,  on the frontier of Edom (譯作: Jagur.)
H3018: יגיע | 意義: 1) toil,  work; 2) product,  produce,  acquired property (as a result of work) (譯作: labour, work.)
H3019: יגיע | 意義: 1) weary,  tired (譯作: weary.)
H3020: יגלי | 意義: Jogli = "he is exiled"; 1) a Danite and father of Bukki who was one of the 12 rulers charged with the conquest of Canaan (譯作: Jogli.)

H3022: יגע | 意義: 1) earnings,  gain (product of labour) (譯作: that which he laboured for.)
H3023: יגע | 意義: 1) weary,  wearisome (譯作: full of labour, weary.)
H3024: יגעה | 意義: 1) a wearing,  a tiring (譯作: weariness.)

H3029: ידא | 意義: 1) (Aphel) to praise,  give thanks (譯作: (give) thank(-s).)
H3030: ידאלה | 意義: Idalah = "memorial of God"; 1) a town in Zebulun between Shimron and Bethlehem,  site unknown (譯作: Idalah.)
H3031: ידבש | 意義: Idbash = "stout"; 1) one of the 3 sons of Abi-etam,  a descendant of Judah (譯作: Idbash.)

H3034: ידה | 意義: 1) to throw,  shoot,  cast; 1a) (Qal) to shoot (arrows); 1b) (Piel) to cast,  cast down,  throw down; 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to give thanks,  laud,  praise; 1c2) to confess,  confess (the name of God); 1d) (Hithpael); 1d1) to confess (sin); 1d2) to give thanks (譯作: cast (out), (make) confess(-ion), praise, shoot, (give) thank(-ful, -s, -sgiving).)
H3035: ידו | 意義: Iddo = "timely" or "lovely"; 1) son of Zechariah,  ruler of the tribe of Manasseh east of the Jordan in the time of David; 2) a man who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Iddo.)
H3036: ידון | 意義: Jadon = "thankful"; 1) a Meronothite and one of the builders of the walls of Jerusalem (譯作: Jadon.)
H3037: ידוע | 意義: Jaddua = "knowing"; 1) one of the chiefs of the people who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah; 2) son and successor in the high priesthood of Jonathan,  Jeshua, or Johanan; the last of the high priests mentioned in the OT,  probably living in the time of Alexander the Great (譯作: Jaddua.)
H3038: ידותון | 意義: Jeduthun = "praising"; 1) a Levite of the family of Merari and the chief of one of the 3 choirs of the temple whose descendants also formed one of the perpetual temple choirs; he is named at the beginning of 3 Psalms (Ps 39:1; 62:1; 77:1) either as the composer or the recipient of those Psalms but most likely as the leader of the choir by which those Psalms were to be sung (譯作: Jeduthun.)
H3039: ידיד | 意義: n m; 1) one beloved,  beloved; adj; 2) lovely (譯作: amiable, (well-) beloved, loves.)
H3040: ידידה | 意義: Jedidah = "beloved"; 1) the wife of king Amon and mother of king Josiah (譯作: Jedidah.)
H3041: ידידיה | 意義: Jedidiah = "beloved of Jehovah"; 1) the name given to Solomon through Nathan the prophet (譯作: Jedidiah.)
H3042: ידיה | 意義: Jedaiah = "praised of Jehovah"; 1) a Simeonite,  forefather of Ziza; 2) son of Harumaph and one who took part in rebuilding the walls of Jerusalem (譯作: Jedaiah.)
H3043: ידיעאל | 意義: Jediael = "God makes known"; 1) a chief patriarch of the tribe of Benjamin; maybe the same as 'Ashbel'; 2) the 2nd son of Meshelemiahand a Korahite gatekeeper; 3) son of Shimri and one of David's mighty warriors; 4) one of the chiefs of the thousands of Manasseh who joined David on his march to Ziklag; maybe the same man as 3 above (譯作: Jediael.)
H3044: ידלף | 意義: Jidlaph = "weeping"; 1) a son of Nahor (譯作: Jidlaph.)
H3045: ידע | 意義: 1) to know; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to know; 1a1a) to know,  learn to know; 1a1b) to perceive; 1a1c) to perceive and see,  find out and discern; 1a1d) to discriminate,  distinguish; 1a1e) to know by experience; 1a1f) to recognise,  admit,  acknowledge,  confess; 1a1g) to consider; 1a2) to know,  be acquainted with; 1a3) to know (a person carnally); 1a4) to know how,  be skilful in; 1a5) to have knowledge,  be wise; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be made known,  be or become known,  be revealed; 1b2) to make oneself known; 1b3) to be perceived; 1b4) to be instructed; 1c) (Piel) to cause to know; 1d) (Poal) to cause to know; 1e) (Pual); 1e1) to be known; 1e2) known,  one known,  acquaintance (participle); 1f) (Hiphil) to make known,  declare; 1g) (Hophal) to be made known; 1h) (Hithpael) to make oneself known,  reveal oneself (譯作: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare, be diligent, (can, cause to) discern, discover, endued with, familiar friend, famous, feel, can have, be (ig-) norant, instruct, kinsfolk, kinsman, (cause to let, make) know, (come to give, have, take) knowledge, have (knowledge), (be, make, make to be, make self) known, [phrase] be learned, [phrase] lie by man, mark, perceive, privy to, [idiom] prognosticator, regard, have respect, skilful, shew, can (man of) skill, be sure, of a surety, teach, (can) tell, understand, have (understanding), [idiom] will be, wist, wit, wot.)
H3046: ידע | 意義: 1) to know; 1a) (P'al) to know; 1b) (Aphel) to let someone know,  communicate,  inform,  cause to know (譯作: certify, know, make known, teach.)
H3047: ידע | 意義: Jada = "He knows"; 1) a Judahite,  son of Onam and brother of Shammai,  in the genealogy of the sons of Jerahmeel by his wife Atarah (譯作: Jada.)
H3048: ידעיה | 意義: Jedaiah = "Jehovah has known"; 1) a priest in Jerusalem; 2) a man who returned with Zerubbabel; 3) a ruler of the priests in the days of Jeshua; 4) a post exilic priest; 5) one honoured by Jehovah,  perhaps one of the above (譯作: Jedaiah.)
H3049: ידעני | 意義: 1) a knower,  one who has a familiar spirit; 1a) a familiar spirit,  soothsayer,  necromancer (meton) (譯作: wizard.)
H3050: יה | 意義: 1) Jah (Jehovah in the shortened form); 1a) the proper name of the one true God; 1b) used in many compounds; 1b1) names beginning with the letters 'Je'; 1b2) names ending with 'iah' or 'jah' (譯作: Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.')
H3051: יהב | 意義: 1) to give,  provide,  ascribe,  come; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to give; 1a2) to set,  place; 1a3) to provide (with reflexive); 1a4) to ascribe (glory); 1a5) to grant,  permit,  come now (譯作: ascribe, bring, come on, give, go, set, take.)
H3052: יהב | 意義: 1) to give,  provide; 1a) (P'al); 1a1) to give; 1a2) to place,  lay (foundations); 1b) (Hithp'al); 1b1) to be given; 1b2) to be paid (譯作: deliver, give, lay, [phrase] prolong, pay, yield.)
H3053: יהב | 意義: 1) burden,  lot (that which is given) (譯作: burden.)
H3054: יהד | 意義: 1) (Hithpael) to become a Jew (in fact or in fraud),  become Judaised (譯作: become Jews.)
H3055: יהד | 意義: Jehud = "beauty"; 1) a town in Dan,  located between Baalath and Bene-berak and 8 miles east of Joppa (譯作: Jehud.)
H3056: יהדי | 意義: Jahdai "whom he will place"; 1) one of the family of Caleb (譯作: Jehdai.)
H3057: יהדיה | 意義: adj f; 1) the Jewess; Jehudijah = Jewess; n pr f; 2) (CLBL) a Calebite,  the wife of one named Ezra (譯作: Jehudijah.)
H3058: יהוא | 意義: Jehu = "Jehovah is He"; 1) the king of the northern kingdom Israel who overthrew the dynasty of Omri; 2) son of Hanani and an Israelite prophet in the time of Baasha and Jehoshaphat; 3) the Antothite,  a Benjamite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 4) a descendant of Judah of the house of Hezron; 5) son of Josibiah and a chief of the tribe of Simeon (譯作: Jehu.)
H3059: יהואחז | 意義: Jehoahaz = "Jehovah has seized"; 1) a king of Judah and son of Josiah; 2) a king of the northern kingdom of Israel and son of Jehu; 3) a king of Judah and son of Jehoram (Ahaziah) (譯作: Jehoahaz. Compare <w src="3099" lemma="יוֹאָחָז" xlit="Yôwʼâchâz" POS="yo-aw-khawz'"/>.)
H3060: יהואש | 意義: Jehoash = "given by the Lord"; 1) son of king Ahaziah and the 8th king of Judah; 2) son of king Jehoahaz and the 12th king of the northern kingdom of Israel (譯作: Jehoash. Compare <w src="3101" lemma="יוֹאָשׁ" xlit="Yôwʼâsh" POS="yo-awsh'"/>.)
H3061: יהיד | 意義: 1) Judah-the territory of the tribe of Judah (譯作: Jewry, Judah, Judea.)
H3062: יהודאי | 意義: 1) Jew (譯作: Jew.)
H3063: יהודה | 意義: Judah = "praised"; 1) the son of Jacob by Leah; 2) the tribe descended from Judah the son of Jacob; 3) the territory occupied by the tribe of Judah; 4) the kingdom comprised of the tribes of Judah and Benjamin which occupied the southern part of Canaan after the nation split upon the death of Solomon; 5) a Levite in Ezra's time; 6) an overseer of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 7) a Levite musician in the time of Nehemiah; 8) a priest in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Judah.)
H3064: יהודי | 意義: 1) Jew (譯作: Jew.)
H3065: יהודי | 意義: Jehudi = "Jew"; 1) son of Nethaniah and servant of king Jehoiakim (譯作: Jehudi.)
H3066: יהודית | 意義: 1) in the Jewish language,  in Hebrew (譯作: in the Jews' language.)
H3067: יהודית | 意義: Judith = "Jewess" or "praised"; 1) the daughter of Beeri the Hittite and wife of Esau (譯作: Judith.)
H3068: יהוה | 意義: Jehovah = "the existing One"; 1) the proper name of the one true God; 1a) unpronounced except with the vowel pointings of  H0136 (譯作: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare <w src="3050" lemma="יָהּ" xlit="Yâhh" POS="yaw"/>, <w src="3069" lemma="יְהֹוִה" xlit="Yᵉhôvih" POS="yeh-ho-vee'"/>.)
H3069: יהוה | 意義: 1) Jehovah-used primarily in the combination 'Lord Jehovah'; 1a) equal to  H03068 but pointed with the vowels of  H0430 (譯作: God.)
H3070: יהוה יראה | 意義: Jehovah-jireh = "Jehovah sees"; 1) symbolic name given by Abraham to Mount Moriah in commemoration of the interposition of the angel of Jehovah who prevented the sacrifice of Isaac and provided a substitute (譯作: Jehovah-jireh.)
H3071: יהוה נסי | 意義: Jehovah-nissi = "Jehovah is my banner"; 1) the name given by Moses to the altar which he built in commemoration of the discomfiture of the Amalekites (譯作: Jehovah-nissi.)
H3072: יהוה צדקנו | 意義: Jehovah is our righteousness; 1) a sacred name symbolically applied to Jerusalem and the Messiah (譯作: the Lord our righteousness.)
H3073: יהוה שלום | 意義: Jehovah-shalom = "Jehovah is peace"; 1) the name of a sacred altar built by Gideon in Ophrah (譯作: Jehovah-shalom.)
H3074: יהוה שמה | 意義: Jehovah-shammah = "Jehovah is there"; 1) a symbolic name for Jerusalem (譯作: Jehovahshammah.)
H3075: יהוזבד | 意義: Jehozabad = "Jehovah has endowed"; 1) son of Shomer,  a Moabitish woman,  who murdered Joash,  king of Judah; 2) a Benjamite,  captain of 180,000 armed men,  in the days of Jehoshaphat; 3) a Korhite Levite,  2nd son of Obededom,  and one of the porters of the temple and of the storehouse there in the time of David (譯作: Jehozabad. Compare <w src="3107" lemma="יוֹזָבָד" xlit="Yôwzâbâd" POS="yo-zaw-bawd'"/>.)
H3076: יהוחנן | 意義: Jehohanan = "Jehovah has graced"; 1) a priest during the high priesthood of Joiakim who returned with Zerubbabel; 2) a high priest in the time of Ezra; 3) a Levite priest who took part in the dedication of the wall in the time of Nehemiah; 4) son of Tobiah; 5) a Korhite Levite and one of the doorkeepers to the tabernacle in the time of David; 6) a captain of Judah under king Jehoshaphat; 7) an Ephraimite; 8) an Israelite with a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 9) a Jewish captain after the fall of Jerusalem; 10) the eldest son of king Josiah; 11) a post-exilic prince of the line of David; 12) father of Azariah,  priest in Solomon's time; 13) a Benjamite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 14) a Gadite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 15) a returning exile (譯作: Jehohanan, Johanan. Compare <w src="3110" lemma="יוֹחָנָן" xlit="Yôwchânân" POS="yo-khaw-nawn'"/>.)
H3077: יהוידע | 意義: Jehoiada = "Jehovah knows"; 1) father of Benaiah,  David's mighty warrior; 2) leader of the priests who joined David at Hebron; 3) high priest at the time of Athaliah's usurpation of the throne of Judah; hid Joash,  the king's son,  for six years and eventually replaced him on the throne of Judah; 4) second priest,  or sagan,  to Seraiah the high priest (譯作: Jehoiada. Compare <w src="3111" lemma="יוֹיָדָע" xlit="Yôwyâdâʻ" POS="yo-yaw-daw'"/>.)
H3078: יהויכין | 意義: Jehoiachin = "Jehovah establishes"; 1) king of Judah,  son of Jehoiakim,  and the next to last king of Judah before the Babylonian captivity; kingship lasted for 3 months and 10 days before he surrendered to Nebuchadnezzar who took him to Babylon and imprisoned him for 36 years when he was finally released (譯作: Jehoiachin. Compare <w src="3112" lemma="יוֹיָכִין" xlit="Yôwyâkîyn" POS="yo-yaw-keen'"/>.)
H3079: יהויקים | 意義: Jehoiakim = "Jehovah raises up"; 1) son of Josiah and the third from the last king of Judah; subject vassel of Nebuchadnezzar who reigned for 11 years before he died a violent death either in combat or by the hands of his own subjects (譯作: Jehoiakim. Compare <w src="3113" lemma="יוֹיָקִים" xlit="Yôwyâqîym" POS="yo-yaw-keem'"/>.)
H3080: יהויריב | 意義: Jehoiarib = "Jehovah contends"; 1) A priest in Jerusalem; 2) the head of the 1st of the 24 courses of priests in David's time (譯作: Jehoiarib. Compare <w src="3114" lemma="יוֹיָרִיב" xlit="Yôwyârîyb" POS="yo-yaw-reeb'"/>.)
H3081: יהוכל | 意義: Jehucal = "Jehovah is able"; 1) a son of Shelemiah and a servant of king Zedekiah whom he sent to Jeremiah to entreat his prayers and advice (譯作: Jehucal. Compare <w src="3116" lemma="יוּכַל" xlit="Yûwkal" POS="yoo-kal'"/>.)
H3082: יהונדב | 意義: Jehonadab = "Jehovah is willing"; 1) a son of Rechab,  chief of the Rechabites,  in the time of Jehu and Ahab; 2) a nephew of David (譯作: Jehonadab, Jonadab. Compare <w src="3122" lemma="יוֹנָדָב" xlit="Yôwnâdâb" POS="yo-naw-dawb'"/>.)
H3083: יהונתן | 意義: Jonathan or Jehonathan = "Jehovah has given"; 1) a son of king Saul and a friend of David; 2) a son of the high priest Abiathar and the last descendant of Eli of whom we hear; 3) a nephew of David who like David slew a giant of Gath; 4) an uncle of David; 5) one of David's mighty warriors; 6) one of David's treasurers; 7) a scribe in the time of Jeremiah; 8) a Levite and father of Zechariah,  a priest who blew the trumpet at the dedication of the wall; 9) a son or descendant of Gershom,  the son of Moses,  and a priest to the tribe of Dan; 10) a son of Kareah and a brother of Johanan; a Judaite captain after the fall of Jerusalem; 11) another Judaite father of Peleth; 12) father of Ebed in the time of Ezra; 13) son of Asahel in the time of Ezra; 14) a priest of the family of Melicu in the time of Nehemiah; 15) son of Joiada and his successor to the high priesthood in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Jonathan. Compare <w src="3129" lemma="יוֹנָתָן" xlit="Yôwnâthân" POS="yo-naw-thawn'"/>.)
H3084: יהוסף | 意義: Joseph = "Jehovah has added"; 1) the eldest son of Jacob by Rachel (譯作: Joseph.)
H3085: יהועדה | 意義: Jehoadah = "Jehovah has adorned"; 1) a descendant of Saul through Jonathan (譯作: Jehoada.)
H3086: יהועדין | 意義: Jehoaddan = "Jehovah delights"; 1) wife of king Joash and mother of king Amaziah of Judah (譯作: Jehoaddan.)
H3087: יהוצדק | 意義: Jehozadak or Josedech = "Jehovah is righteous"; 1) grandson of the high priest Hilkiah; son of the high priest Seraiah; and father of the high priest Joshua; he never attained the office of high priest himself because he was carried captive to Babylon by Nebuchadnezzar (譯作: Jehozadek, Josedech. Compare <w src="3136" lemma="יוֹצָדָק" xlit="Yôwtsâdâq" POS="yo-tsaw-dawk'"/>.)
H3088: יהורם | 意義: Jehoram or Joram = "Jehovah is exalted"; 1) son of king Jehoshaphat of Judah and himself king of Judah for 8 years; his wife was the wicked Athaliah who was probably the instigator for his returning the nation of Judah to the worship of Baal; 2) son of king Ahab of the northern kingdom of Israel and king of Israel himself for 12 years; he was murdered by Jehu on the plot of land for which his father had murdered Naboth thus fulfilling the prophecy of Elijah to the very letter; 3) a priest in the reign of Jehoshaphat (譯作: Jehoram, Joram. Compare <w src="3141" lemma="יוֹרָם" xlit="Yôwrâm" POS="yo-rawm'"/>.)
H3089: יהושבע | 意義: Jehosheba = "Jehovah has sworn"; 1) daughter of king Joram of Judah and wife of the high priest Jehoiada; 1a) alternate spelling 'Jehoshabeath' - H03090 (譯作: Jehosheba. Compare <w src="3090" lemma="יְהוֹשַׁבְעַת" xlit="Yᵉhôwshabʻath" POS="yeh-ho-shab-ath'"/>.)
H3090: יהושבעת | 意義: Jehoshabeath = "Jehovah is an oath"; 1) daughter of king Joram of Judah and wife of the high priest Jehoiada; 1a) alternate spelling 'Jehosheba- H3089 (譯作: Jehoshabeath.)
H3091: יהושוע | 意義: Joshua or Jehoshua = "Jehovah is salvation"; n pr m; 1) son of Nun of the tribe of Ephraim and successor to Moses as the leader of the children of Israel; led the conquest of Canaan; 2) a resident of Beth-shemesh on whose land the Ark of the Covenant came to a stop after the Philistines returned it; 3) son of Jehozadak and high priest after the restoration; 4) governor of Jerusalem under king Josiah who gave his name to a gate of the city of Jerusalem (譯作: Jehoshua, Jehoshuah, Joshua. Compare <w src="1954" lemma="הוֹשֵׁעַ" xlit="Hôwshêaʻ" POS="ho-shay'-ah"/>, <w src="3442" lemma="יֵשׁוּעַ" xlit="Yêshûwaʻ" POS="yay-shoo'-ah"/>.)
H3092: יהושפט | 意義: Jehoshaphat = "Jehovah has judged"; n pr m; 1) son of king Asa and himself king of Judah for 25 years; one of the best,  most pious,  and prosperous kings of Judah; 2) son of Nimshi and father of king Jehu of the northern kingdom of Israel; 3) son of Ahilud and chronicler under David and Solomon; 4) son of Paruah and one of the 12 commissary officers under Solomon; 5) a priest and trumpeter in the time of David; n pr loc; 6) symbolical name of a valley near Jerusalem which is the place of ultimate judgment; maybe the deep ravine which separates Jerusalem from the Mount of Olives through which the Kidron flowed (譯作: Jehoshaphat. Compare <w src="3146" lemma="יוֹשָׁפָט" xlit="Yôwshâphâṭ" POS="yo-shaw-fawt'"/>.)
H3093: יהיר | 意義: 1) proud,  arrogant,  haughty (譯作: haughty, proud.)
H3094: יהללאל | 意義: Jehaleleel or Jehalelel = "God is praised"; 1) a Calebite descendant of Judah; 2) father of Azariah and a Merarite Levite in the time of Hezekiah (譯作: Jehalellel, Jehalelel.)
H3095: יהלם | 意義: 1) a precious stone (known for its hardness); 1a) perhaps the jasper,  onyx,  or diamond (譯作: diamond.)
H3096: יהץ | 意義: Jahaz or Jahazah or Jahzah = "trodden down"; 1) a place in Reuben east of the Dead Sea where Israel defeated Sihon king of the Amorites; site uncertain (譯作: Jahaz, Jahazah, Jahzah.)
H3097: יואב | 意義: Joab = "Jehovah is father"; 1) son of David's sister Zeruiah and general of David's army; 2) a Judaite descendant of Kenaz; 3) a post exilic family (譯作: Joab.)
H3098: יואח | 意義: Joah = "Jehovah is brother"; 1) son of Asaph and chronicler to Hezekiah; 2) a Gershonite son or grandson of Zimmah; 3) a Korhite,  3rd son of Obed-edom and doorkeeper in the time of David; 4) son of Joahaz and chronicler to king Josiah (譯作: Joah.)
H3099: יואחז | 意義: Joahaz or Jehoahaz = "Jehovah has grasped"; 1) the father of Joah,  Josiah's chronicler (譯作: Jehoahaz, Joahaz.)
H3100: יואל | 意義: Joel = "Jehovah is God"; 1) son of Pethuel and the 2nd of the 12 minor prophets with a book by his name; probably prophesied in the time of king Uzziah of Judah; 2) eldest son of Samuel the prophet and father of Heman the singer; 3) a Simeonite chief; 4) a Reubenite; 5) a chief of Gad; 6) son of Izrahiah and a chief of Issachar; 7) brother of Nathan of Zobah and one of David's mighty warriors; 8) son of Pedaiah and a chief of the half tribe of Manasseh west of the Jordan in the time of David; 9) a son of Nebo who returned with Ezra and had a foreign wife; 10) a Benjamite,  son of Zichri; 11) a Levite; 12) a Kohathite Levite in the reign of Hezekiah; 13) a Gershonite Levite chief in the time of David; 14) a Gershonite Levite,  son of Jehiel and a descendant of Laadan; maybe same as 13 (譯作: Joel.)
H3101: יואש | 意義: Joash = "given by the Lord"; 1) son of king Ahaziah and the 8th king of Judah; 2) son of king Jehoahaz and the 12th king of the northern kingdom of Israel; 3) father of Gideon; 4) a son of king Ahab; 5) a descendant of Shelah the son of Judah; either the son of Shelah or the son of Jokim; 6) son of Shemaah of Gibeah who resorted to David at Ziklag (譯作: Joash.)
H3102: יוב | 意義: Job = "persecuted"; 1) the 3rd son of Issachar also called 'Jashub' (譯作: Job.)
H3103: יובב | 意義: Jobab = "a desert"; 1) the last in order of the sons of Joktan,  a descendant of Shem; 2) one of the kings of Edom; 3) the king of Madon,  located in northern Canaan,  and one of the kings who opposed Joshua during the conquest and who were routed at Meron; 4) head of a Benjamite house; 5) another Benjamite (譯作: Jobab.)
H3104: יובל | 意義: 1) ram,  ram's horn,  trumpet,  cornet; 1a) ram (only in combination); 1a1) ram's horn,  trumpet; 1b) jubilee year (marked by the blowing of cornets) (meton) (譯作: jubile, ram's horn, trumpet.)
H3105: יובל | 意義: 1) stream (譯作: river.)
H3106: יובל | 意義: Jubal = "stream"; 1) the son of Lamech by Adah and the inventor of musical instruments (譯作: Jubal.)
H3107: יוזבד | 意義: Jozabad or Josabad = "Jehovah has endowed"; 1) a Korhite Levite,  2nd son of Obededom,  and one of the porters of the temple and of the storehouse there in the time of David; 2) one of David's mighty warriors; 3) another of David's mighty warriors; 4) four other priests or Levites (譯作: Josabad, Jozabad.)
H3108: יוזכר | 意義: Jozachar = "Jehovah remembers"; 1) a servant of king Joash of Judah and one of his murderers; 1a) also called 'Zabad' (譯作: Jozachar.)
H3109: יוחא | 意義: Joha = "Jehovah gives life"; 1) one of the sons of Beriah the Benjamite; 2) the Tizite,  one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Joha.)
H3110: יוחנן | 意義: Johanan = "Jehovah has graced"; 1) a priest during the high priesthood of Joiakim who returned with Zerubbabel; 2) a Jewish captain after the fall of Jerusalem; 3) the eldest son of king Josiah; 4) a post-exilic prince of the line of David; 5) father of Azariah,  priest in Solomon's time; 6) a Benjamite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 7) a Gadite,  one of David's mighty warriors; 8) a returning exile (譯作: Johanan.)
H3111: יוידע | 意義: Joiada or Jehoiada = "Jehovah knows"; 1) son of Paseah,  who assisted to repair the old gate of Jerusalem; 2) son of the high priest Eliashib in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Jehoiada, Joiada.)
H3112: יויכין | 意義: Jehoiachin = "Jehovah establishes"; 1) king of Judah,  son of Jehoiakim,  and the next to last king of Judah before the Babylonian captivity; kingship lasted for 3 months and 10 days before he surrendered to Nebuchadnezzar who took him to Babylon and imprisoned him for 36 years when he was finally released (譯作: Jehoiachin.)
H3113: יויקים | 意義: Joiakim or Jehoiakim = "Jehovah raises up"; 1) a priest and son of Jeshua the high priest (譯作: Joiakim. Compare <w src="3137" lemma="יוֹקִים" xlit="Yôwqîym" POS="yo-keem'"/>.)
H3114: יויריב | 意義: Joiarib = "Jehovah contends"; 1) the head of the 1st of the 24 courses of priests in David's time; 2) a teacher in the time of Ezra; 3) a Judaite in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Joiarib.)
H3115: יוכבד | 意義: Jochebed = "Jehovah is glory"; 1) the daughter of Levi,  wife and at the same time aunt of Amram,  and the mother of Moses,  Aaron, and Miriam (譯作: Jochebed.)
H3116: יוכל | 意義: Jucal = "Jehovah is able"; 1) a son of Shelemiah and a servant of king Zedekiah whom he sent to Jeremiah to entreat his prayers and advice (譯作: Jucal.)
H3117: יום | 意義: 1) day,  time,  year; 1a) day (as opposed to night); 1b) day (24 hour period); 1b1) as defined by evening and morning in Genesis 1; 1b2) as a division of time; 1b2a) a working day,  a day's journey; 1c) days,  lifetime (pl.); 1d) time,  period (general); 1e) year; 1f) temporal references; 1f1) today; 1f2) yesterday; 1f3) tomorrow (譯作: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (for) ever(-lasting, -more), [idiom] full, life, as (so) long as (... live), (even) now, [phrase] old, [phrase] outlived, [phrase] perpetually, presently, [phrase] remaineth, [idiom] required, season, [idiom] since, space, then, (process of) time, [phrase] as at other times, [phrase] in trouble, weather, (as) when, (a, the, within a) while (that), [idiom] whole ([phrase] age), (full) year(-ly), [phrase] younger.)
H3118: יום | 意義: 1) day; 2) day always refers to a twenty-four hour period when the word is modified by a definite or cardinal number (譯作: day (by day), time.)
H3119: יומם | 意義: adv; 1) by day,  in the daytime; subst; 2) daytime (譯作: daily, (by, in the) day(-time).)
H3120: יון | 意義: Javan = "Ionia" or "Greece"; n pr m; 1) a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah; n pr loc; 2) Greece, Ionia, Ionians; 2a) location of descendants of Javan (譯作: Javan.)
H3121: יון | 意義: 1) mire,  mirer (譯作: mire, miry.)
H3122: יונדב | 意義: Jonadab or Jehonadab = "Jehovah is willing"; 1) a son of Rechab,  chief of the Rechabites,  in the time of Jehu and Ahab; 2) a nephew of David (譯作: Jonadab.)
H3123: יונה | 意義: 1) dove,  pigeon (譯作: dove, pigeon.)
H3124: יונה | 意義: Jonah = "dove"; 1) son of Amittai and a native of Gath-hepher; 5th of the minor prophets who prophesied during the reign of Jeroboam II and whom God sent also to prophecy to Nineveh (譯作: Jonah.)
H3125: יוני | 意義: 1) Grecian,  Ionian (譯作: Grecian.)
H3126: יונק | 意義: 1) sucker,  suckling,  sapling,  young plant (譯作: tender plant.)
H3127: יונקת | 意義: 1) young plant,  twig,  young shoot (譯作: (tender) branch, young twig.)
H3128: יונת אלם רחקים | 意義: Jonath-elem-recho-kim = "the silent dove of far-off places"; 1) meaning uncertain; 1a) probably name of melody; 1b) only used in title of Ps 56:1 (譯作: Jonath-elem-rechokim.)
H3129: יונתן | 意義: Jonathan or Jehonathan = "Jehovah has given"; 1) a son of king Saul and a friend of David; 2) a son of the high priest Abiathar and the last descendant of Eli of whom we hear; 3) one of David's mighty warriors; 4) a Levite and father of Zechariah,  a priest who blew the trumpet at the dedication of the wall; 5) a son of Kareah and a brother of Johanan; a Judaite captain after the fall of Jerusalem; 6) another Judaite; 7) father of Ebed in the time of Ezra; 8) son of Asahel in the time of Ezra; 9) a priest of the family of Melicu in the time of Nehemiah; 10) son of Joiada and his successor to the high priesthood in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Jonathan.)
H3130: יוסף | 意義: Joseph = "Jehovah has added"; 1) the eldest son of Jacob by Rachel; 2) father of Igal,  who represented the tribe of Issachar among the spies; 3) a son of Asaph; 4) a man who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 5) a priest of the family of Shebaniah in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Joseph. Compare <w src="3084" lemma="יְהוֹסֵף" xlit="Yᵉhôwçêph" POS="yeh-ho-safe'"/>.)
H3131: יוספיה | 意義: Josiphiah = "Jehovah adds"; 1) father or ancestor of Shelomith who returned with Ezra (譯作: Josiphiah.)
H3132: יועאלה | 意義: Joelah = "may he avail"; 1) son of Jeroham of Gedor and one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Joelah.)
H3133: יועד | 意義: Joed = "Jehovah is witness"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Pedaiah (譯作: Joed.)
H3134: יועזר | 意義: Joezer = "Jehovah is help"; 1) a Korhite,  one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag (譯作: Joezer.)
H3135: יועש | 意義: Joash = "Jehovah hastens"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Becher; 2) one of the officers in David's court (譯作: Joash.)
H3136: יוצדק | 意義: Jozadak = "Jehovah is righteous"; 1) grandson of the high priest Hilkiah; son of the high priest Seraiah; and father of the high priest Joshua; he never attained the office of high priest himself because he was carried captive to Babylon by Nebuchadnezzar (譯作: Jozadak.)
H3137: יוקים | 意義: Jokim = "Jehovah raises up"; 1) a descendant of Judah (譯作: Jokim.)
H3138: יורה | 意義: 1) early rain,  autumn shower; 1a) rain which falls in Palestine from late October until early December (譯作: first rain, former (rain).)
H3139: יורה | 意義: Jorah = "he instructs"; 1) the head or ancestor of a family who returned from Babylon with Ezra (譯作: Jorah.)
H3140: יורי | 意義: Jorai = "Jehovah has taught me"; 1) one of the Gadites dwelling at Gilead in Bashan in the reign of king Jotham of Judah (譯作: Jorai.)
H3141: יורם | 意義: Joram = "Jehovah is exalted"; 1) son of king Jehoshaphat of Judah and himself king of Judah for 8 years; his wife was the wicked Athaliah who was probably the instigator for his returning the nation of Judah to the worship of Baal; 2) son of king Ahab of the northern kingdom of Israel and king of Israel himself for 12 years; he was murdered by Jehu on the plot of land for which his father had murdered Naboth thus fulfilling the prophecy of Elijah to the very letter; 3) a Levite in the time of David and an ancestor of Shelomith; 4) son of Toi,  king of Hamath (譯作: Joram.)
H3142: יושב חסד | 意義: Jushab-hesed = "whose love is returned"; 1) son of Zerubbabel (譯作: Jushab-hesed.)
H3143: יושביה | 意義: Josibiah = "Jehovah causes to dwell"; 1) a Simeonite,  father of Jehu (譯作: Josibiah.)
H3144: יושה | 意義: Joshah = "Jehovah makes equal"; 1) a prince of the house of Simeon (譯作: Joshah.)
H3145: יושויה | 意義: Joshaviah = "Jehovah makes equal"; 1) son of Elnaam and one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Joshaviah. Compare <w src="3144" lemma="יוֹשָׁה" xlit="Yôwshâh" POS="yo-shaw'"/>.)
H3146: יושפט | 意義: Joshaphat or Jehoshaphat = "Jehovah judges"; n pr m; 1) one of David's mighty warriors; 2) a priest and trumpeter in the time of David (譯作: Joshaphat.)
H3147: יותם | 意義: Jotham = "Jehovah is perfect"; 1) son of king Uzziah of Judah by Jerushah; king of Judah for 16 years and contemporary with Isaiah and king Pekah of Israel; 2) son of Jahdai and a descendant of Caleb and Judah; 3) youngest son of Gideon who escaped from the massacre of his brothers (譯作: Jotham.)
H3148: יותר | 意義: n m; 1) superiority,  advantage,  excess; adv; 2) excess,  better; conj; 3) besides,  moreover,  more (譯作: better, more(-over), over, profit.)
H3149: יזואל | 意義: Jeziel = "the assembly of God"; 1) a Benjamite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag (譯作: Jeziel (from the margin).)
H3150: יזיה | 意義: Jeziah = "Jehovah sprinkles"; 1) a descendant of Parosh who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Jeziah.)
H3151: יזיז | 意義: Jaziz = "He makes prominent"; 1) a Hagarite,  officer of David in charge of the flocks (譯作: Jaziz.)
H3152: יזליאה | 意義: Jezliah = "whom God will preserve"; 1) a Benjamite of the sons of Elpaal (譯作: Jezliah.)
H3153: יזניה | 意義: Jezaniah = "Jehovah has listened"; 1) son of Hoshaiah the Maachathite and one of the captains who escaped from Jerusalem during the last siege of the Babylonians; one of the first to return to Gedaliah at Mizpah where he took a prominent part after the assassination of Gedaliah (譯作: Jezaniah.)
H3154: יזע | 意義: 1) sweat,  perspiration (譯作: any thing that causeth sweat.)
H3155: יזרח | 意義: Izrahite = "descendant of Zerah"; 1) a descendant of Zerah of Judah (譯作: Izrahite.)
H3156: יזרחיה | 意義: Izrahiah or Jezrahiah = "Jehovah will shine"; 1) a chieftain of Issachar; 2) a Levite and leader of the chorus at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem under Nehemiah (譯作: Izrahiah, Jezrahiah.)
H3157: יזרעאל | 意義: Jezreel = "God sows"; n pr m; 1) a descendant of the father or founder of Etam of Judah; 2) first son of Hosea the prophet; n pr loc; 3) a city in the Nekeb of Judah; 4) a city in Issachar on the northwest spur of Mount Gilboa (譯作: Jezreel.)
H3158: יזרעאלי | 意義: Jezreelite = see Jezreel "sown of God"; 1) an inhabitant of Jezreel (譯作: Jezreelite.)
H3159: יזרעאלית | 意義: Jezreelitess = see Jezreel "sown of God"; 1) a female inhabitant of Jezreel; 1a) used only of Ahinoam,  a wife of David (譯作: Jezreelitess.)
H3160: יחבה | 意義: Jehubbah = "hidden"; 1) a man of Asher,  son of Shomer or Shamer of the house of Beriah (譯作: Jehubbah.)
H3161: יחד | 意義: 1) to join,  unite,  be joined,  be united; 1a) (Qal) to be united; 1b) (Piel) to unite (譯作: join, unite.)
H3162: יחד | 意義: n m; 1) union,  unitedness; adv; 2) together,  altogether,  all together,  alike (譯作: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.)
H3163: יחדו | 意義: Jahdo = "His unity"; 1) a Gileadite,  son of Buz and father of Jeshishai (譯作: Jahdo.)
H3164: יחדיאל | 意義: Jahdiel = "my unity is God"; 1) a chief of Manasseh on the east of the Jordan (譯作: Jahdiel.)
H3165: יחדיהו | 意義: Jehdeiah = "Jehovah is unity"; 1) a Levite in the time of David; 2) a Meronothite,  officer of David in charge of the she-asses (譯作: Jehdeiah.)
H3166: יחזיאל | 意義: Jahaziel = "beheld of God"; 1) a Benjamite warrior who joined David at Ziklag; 2) a priest in the reign of David who helped move the ark; 3) a Kohathite Levite,  3rd son of Hebron; 4) a Levite,  son of Zechariah,  of the sons of Asaph,  in the reign of Jehoshaphat; 5) an ancestor of one of the families who returned from exile with Ezra (譯作: Jahaziel, Jahziel.)
H3167: יחזיה | 意義: Jahaziah = "Jehovah views"; 1) son of Tikvah,  apparently a priest and leader during the time of Ezra (譯作: Jahaziah.)
H3168: יחזקאל | 意義: Ezekiel or Jehezekel = "God strengthens"; 1) son of Buzi and a priest and prophet; author of the book by his name; taken captive with Jehoiachin and exiled in Babylon where he prophesied for the next 22 years; 2) a priest in charge of the 20th course in the time of David (譯作: Ezekiel, Jehezekel.)
H3169: יחזקיה | 意義: Hezekiah or Jehizkiah = "Jehovah has made strong"; 1) son of king Ahazby Abi or Abijah and the 12th king of Judah; his reign was characterised by his godly conduct; reigned for 29 years; 2) head of a family of returning exiles in the time of Nehemiah; 3) an Ephraimite in the time of Ahaz (譯作: Hezekiah, Jehizkiah. Compare <w src="2396" lemma="חִזְקִיָּה" xlit="Chizqîyâh" POS="khiz-kee-yaw'"/>.)
H3170: יחזרה | 意義: Jahzerah = "whom God leads back"; 1) a priest of the house of Immer (譯作: Jahzerah.)
H3171: יחיאל | 意義: Jehiel = "God lives"; 1) a Levite and one of the chief musicians in the time of David; 2) a Gershonite Levite who had charge of the treasures in the time of David; 3) son of Hachmoni and an officer of David and tutor of David's sons; 4) a son of king Jehoshaphat of Judah put to death by his brother Jehoram; 5) Hemanite who took part in the restoration of king Hezekiah; 6) a Levite and overseer in the time of Hezekiah; 7) a ruler of the temple during the reforms of Josiah; 8) father of Obadiah of the sons of Joab in the time of Ezra; 9) father of Shechaniah of the sons of Elam in the time of Ezra; 10) a son of Elam who put away his foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 11) a priest of the sons of Harim who also had to put away his foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Jehiel.)
H3172: יחיאלי | 意義: Jehieli = "God shall save alive" or "swept away of God"; 1) a Gershonite Levite of the family of Laadan (譯作: Jehieli.)
H3173: יחיד | 意義: adj; 1) only,  only one,  solitary,  one; 1a) only,  unique,  one; 1b) solitary; 1c)(TWOT) only begotten son; subst; 2) one (譯作: darling, desolate, only (child, son), solitary.)
H3174: יחיה | 意義: Jehiah = "Jehovah lives"; 1) doorkeeper of the ark at the time of its establishment in Jerusalem (譯作: Jehiah.)
H3175: יחיל | 意義: 1) waiting,  hoping (譯作: should hope.)
H3176: יחל | 意義: 1) to wait,  hope,  expect; 1a) (Niphal) to wait; 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to wait,  await,  tarry; 1b2) to wait for,  hope for; 1c) (Hiphil) to wait,  tarry,  wait for,  hope for (譯作: (cause to, have, make to) hope, be pained, stay, tarry, trust, wait.)
H3177: יחלאל | 意義: Jahleel = "God waits"; 1) the 3rd of the 3 sons of Zebulun; founder of the family of the Jahleelites (譯作: Jahleel.)
H3178: יחלאלי | 意義: Jahleelites = "the hope of God"; 1) descendants of Jahleel of the tribe of Zebulun (譯作: Jahleelites.)
H3179: יחם | 意義: 1) to be hot,  conceive; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be hot,  become hot; 1a2) to mate (of animals); 1a3) to be or become hot (fig. of anger); 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to conceive (sexually); 1b2) to be in heat (of animals) (譯作: get heat, be hot, conceive, be warm.)
H3180: יחמור | 意義: 1) roebuck; 1a) a kind of deer,  reddish in colour; 1b) perhaps an extinct animal,  exact meaning unknown (譯作: fallow deer.)
H3181: יחמי | 意義: Jahmai = "whom Jehovah guards"; 1) a man of Issachar and one of the heads of the family of Tola (譯作: Jahmai.)
H3182: יחף | 意義: 1) barefoot; 1a) bareness,  being unshod (subst) (譯作: barefoot, being unshod.)
H3183: יחצאל | 意義: Jahzeel = "God divides"; 1) the 1st of the 4 sons of Naphtali and founder of the family of Jahzeelites (譯作: Jahzeel. Compare <w src="3185" lemma="יַחְצִיאֵל" xlit="Yachtsîyʼêl" POS="yakh-tsee-ale'"/>.)
H3184: יחצאלי | 意義: Jahzeelites = see Jahzeel "God divides"; 1) the descendants of Jahzeel,  the 1st son of Naphtali (譯作: Jahzeelites.)
H3185: יחציאל | 意義: Jahziel = "God divides"; 1) the 1st of the 4 sons of Naphtali and founder of the family of Jahzeelites (譯作: Jahziel. Compare <w src="3183" lemma="יַחְצְאֵל" xlit="Yachtsᵉʼêl" POS="yakh-tseh-ale'"/>.)
H3186: יחר | 意義: 1) (Qal) to delay,  tarry,  defer (譯作: tarry longer.)
H3187: יחש | 意義: 1) (Hithpael) to reckon genealogically,  enrol on a genealogy,  enrol, be enrolled (譯作: (number after, number throughout the) genealogy (to be reckoned), be reckoned by genealogies.)
H3188: יחש | 意義: 1) genealogy (譯作: genealogy.)
H3189: יחת | 意義: Jahath = "He will snatch up"; 1) son of Reaiah and grandson of Shobal of the tribe of Judah; 2) a son of Libni and grandson of Gershom and great grandson of Levi; 3) a Gershonite Levite; the eldest son of Shimei and the grandson of Laadan; founder of the house of Jahath; 4) a Levite and son of Shelomoth; 5) a Merarite Levite in the reign of Josiah (譯作: Jahath.)
H3190: יטב | 意義: 1) to be good,  be pleasing,  be well,  be glad; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be glad,  be joyful; 1a2) to be well placed; 1a3) to be well for,  be well with,  go well with; 1a4) to be pleasing,  be pleasing to; 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to make glad,  rejoice; 1b2) to do good to,  deal well with; 1b3) to do well,  do thoroughly; 1b4) to make a thing good or right or beautiful; 1b5) to do well,  do right (譯作: be accepted, amend, use aright, benefit, be (make) better, seem best, make cheerful, be comely, [phrase] be content, diligent(-ly), dress, earnestly, find favour, give, be glad, do (be, make) good(-ness), be (make) merry, please ([phrase] well), shew more (kindness), skilfully, [idiom] very small, surely, make sweet, thoroughly, tire, trim, very, be (can, deal, entreat, go, have) well (said, seen).)
H3191: יטב | 意義: 1) (P'al) to be good,  do good,  be pleasing (譯作: seem good.)
H3192: יטבה | 意義: Jotbah = "pleasing"; 1) a city in Judah,  hometown of Meshullemeth,  wife of king Manasseh; 1a) site unknown (譯作: Jotbah.)
H3193: יטבתה | 意義: Jotbath or Jotbathah = "pleasantness"; 1) a stopping place in the wilderness; site unknown (譯作: Jotbath, Jotbathah.)
H3194: יטה | 意義: Juttah = "stretched out"; 1) a town in the mountains of Judah,  in the neighbourhood of Maon and Carmel; modern 'Yutta' (譯作: Juttah.)
H3195: יטור | 意義: Jetur = "enclosed"; 1) a son of Ishmael whose descendants warred with Israel east of the Jordan; 1a) also called 'Ituraea' (譯作: Jetur.)
H3196: יין | 意義: 1) wine (譯作: banqueting, wine, wine(-bibber).)
H3197: יך | 意義: 1) hand,  (way)side (譯作: (way-) side.)
H3198: יכח | 意義: 1) to prove,  decide,  judge,  rebuke,  reprove, correct,  be right; 1a) (Hiphil); 1a1) to decide,  judge; 1a2) to adjudge,  appoint; 1a3) to show to be right,  prove; 1a4) to convince,  convict; 1a5) to reprove,  chide; 1a6) to correct,  rebuke; 1b) (Hophal) to be chastened; 1c) (Niphal) to reason,  reason together; 1d) (Hithp) to argue (譯作: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.)
H3199: יכין | 意義: Jachin = "He will establish"; n pr m; 1) the 4th son of Simeon and founder of the family of Jachinites; 2) a priest and the head of the 21st coursein the time of David; 3) a post-exilic priest in the time of Nehemiah; n pr; 4) name of the right-hand pillar before the temple (譯作: Jachin.)

H3201: יכל | 意義: 1) to prevail,  overcome, endure,  have power,  be able; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be able,  be able to gain or accomplish,  be able to endure, be able to reach; 1a2) to prevail,  prevail over or against,  overcome,  be victor; 1a3) to have ability,  have strength (譯作: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.)

H3204: יכניה | 意義: Jeconiah = "Jehovah will establish"; 1) son of king Jehoiakim of Judah and king of Judah for 3 months and 10 days before he surrendered to Nebuchadnezzar and was taken captive to Babylon where he was imprisoned for the next 36 years; released at the death of Nebuchadnezzar and lived in Babylon until his death; 1a) primary spelling 'Jehoiachin' (譯作: Jeconiah. H3207: ילדה | 意義: 1) girl,  damsel,  marriageable girl (譯作: damsel, girl.)

H3226: ימין | 意義: Jamin = "right hand"; 1) the 2nd son of Simeon; founder of the family of Jaminites; 2) a Judaite,  the 2nd son of Ram the Jerahmeelite; 3) a Levite who helped Ezra interpret the Law (譯作: Jamin. See also <w src="1144" lemma="בִּנְיָמִין" xlit="Binyâmîyn" POS="bin-yaw-mene'"/>.)

H3368: יקר | 意義: 1) valuable,  prized,  weighty,  precious,  rare, splendid; 1a) precious; 1a1) costly; 1a2) precious,  highly valued; 1a3) precious stones or jewels; 1b) rare; 1c) glorious,  splendid; 1d) weighty,  influential (譯作: brightness, clear, costly, excellent, fat, honourable women, precious, reputation.)
H3369: יקש | 意義: 1) to lure,  entice,  snare,  lay a snare or lure,  set a trap; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to lay snares (fig. of devices of wicked); 1a2) fowlers (participle); 1b) (Niphal) to be ensnared,  be caught by a bait; 1c) (Pual) to be entrapped (譯作: fowler (lay a) snare.)
H3370: יקשן | 意義: Jokshan = "snarer"; 1) a son of Abraham by Keturah and father of Sheba and Dedan (譯作: Jokshan.)
H3371: יקתאל | 意義: Joktheel = "the blessedness of God"; 1) a city in the low country of Judah named next to Lachish; 2) the name given to the cliff which was the stronghold of Edom by king Amaziah after capturing it; also called 'Selah' and 'Petra' (譯作: Joktheel.)
H3372: ירא | 意義: 1) to fear,  revere,  be afraid; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to fear,  be afraid; 1a2) to stand in awe of,  be awed; 1a3) to fear,  reverence,  honour,  respect; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be fearful,  be dreadful,  be feared; 1b2) to cause astonishment and awe,  be held in awe; 1b3) to inspire reverence or godly fear or awe; 1c) (Piel) to make afraid,  terrify; 2) (TWOT) to shoot,  pour (譯作: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).)
H3373: ירא | 意義: 1) fearing,  reverent,  afraid (譯作: afraid, fear (-ful).)
H3374: יראה | 意義: 1) fear,  terror,  fearing; 1a) fear,  terror; 1b) awesome or terrifying thing (object causing fear); 1c) fear (of God),  respect,  reverence,  piety; 1d) revered (譯作: [idiom] dreadful, [idiom] exceedingly, fear(-fulness).)
H3375: יראון | 意義: Iron = "fearing"; 1) a city of Naphtali; site unknown (譯作: Iron.)
H3376: ירא ייה | 意義: Irijah = "Jehovah sees me"; 1) son of Shelemiah,  a captain of the guard who arrested Jeremiah (譯作: Irijah.)
H3377: ירב | 意義: Jareb = "contender"; 1) an epithet given to the king of Assyria (譯作: Jareb. Compare <w src="3402" lemma="יָרִיב" xlit="Yârîyb" POS="yaw-rebe'"/>.)
H3378: ירבעל | 意義: Jerubbaal = "let Baal contend"; 1) name given to Gideon by his father when he destroyed the altar of Baal (譯作: Jerubbaal.)
H3379: ירבעם | 意義: Jeroboam = "the people will contend"; 1) the first king of the northern kingdom of Israel when the kingdom split at the death of Solomon and the 10 tribes split off from Judah and Benjamin and the kingdom under Solomon's son Rehoboam; idolatry was introduced at the beginning of his reign; 2) the 8th king of the northern kingdom of Israel,  son of Joash,  and 4th in the dynasty of Jehu; during his reign the Syrian invaders were repelled and the kingdom restored to its former borders but the idolatry of the kingdom was maintained (譯作: Jeroboam.)
H3380: ירבשת | 意義: Jerubbesheth = "shame will contend"; 1) a variant name of Jerubbaal (the other name of Gideon [ H03378]) substituting the word 'shame' for the name of the pagan god 'Baal' (譯作: Jerubbesheth.)
H3381: ירד | 意義: 1) to go down,  descend,  decline,  march down,  sink down; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to go or come down; 1a2) to sink; 1a3) to be prostrated; 1a4) to come down (of revelation); 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to bring down; 1b2) to send down; 1b3) to take down; 1b4) to lay prostrate; 1b5) to let down; 1c) (Hophal); 1c1) to be brought down; 1c2) to be taken down (譯作: [idiom] abundantly, bring down, carry down, cast down, (cause to) come(-ing) down, fall (down), get down, go(-ing) down(-ward), hang down, [idiom] indeed, let down, light (down), put down (off), (cause to, let) run down, sink, subdue, take down.)
H3382: ירד | 意義: Jered or Jared = "descent"; 1) son of Mahalaleel and father of Enoch in the 4th generation from Seth; 2) a descendant of Judah and father of Gedor (譯作: Jared.)
H3383: ירדן | 意義: Jordan = "descender"; 1) the river of Palestine running from the roots of Anti-Lebanon to the Dead Sea a distance of approx 200 miles (320 km) (譯作: Jordan.)
H3384: ירה | 意義: 1) to throw,  shoot,  cast,  pour; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to throw,  cast; 1a2) to cast,  lay,  set; 1a3) to shoot arrows; 1a4) to throw water,  rain; 1b) (Niphal) to be shot; 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to throw,  cast; 1c2) to shoot; 1c3) to point out,  show; 1c4) to direct,  teach,  instruct; 1c5) to throw water,  rain (譯作: ([phrase]) archer, cast, direct, inform, instruct, lay, shew, shoot, teach(-er,-ing), through.)
H3385: ירואל | 意義: Jeruel = "taught by God"; 1) a place in the wilderness of southern Judah (譯作: Jeruel.)
H3386: ירוח | 意義: Jaroah = "new moon"; 1) a chief man of the tribe of Gad (譯作: Jaroah.)
H3387: ירוק | 意義: 1) greens,  green plants,  green thing (譯作: green thing.)
H3388: ירושא | 意義: Jerushah or Jerusha = "dispossessor"; 1) the wife of king Uzziah and mother of king Jotham of Judah (譯作: Jerusha, Jerushah.)
H3389: ירושלם | 意義: Jerusalem = "teaching of peace"; 1) the chief city of Palestine and capital of the united kingdom and the nation of Judah after the split (譯作: Jerusalem.)
H3390: ירושלם | 意義: Jerusalem = "teaching of peace"; 1) the chief city of Palestine and capital of the united kingdom and the nation of Judah after the split (譯作: {Jerusalem})
H3391: ירח | 意義: 1) month (lunar cycle),  moon; 1a) month; 1b) calendar month (譯作: month, moon.)
H3392: ירח | 意義: Jerah = "new moon"; 1) a 4th son of Joktan and a progenitor of an Arabian tribe (譯作: Jerah.)
H3393: ירח | 意義: 1) month (譯作: month.)
H3394: ירח | 意義: 1) moon (譯作: moon. Yrechow. See <w src="3405" lemma="יְרִיחוֹ" xlit="Yᵉrîychôw" POS="yer-ee-kho'"/>.)
H3395: ירחם | 意義: Jeroham = "showing pity"; 1) father of Elkanah and grandfather of Samuel of the house of Kohath; 2) a Benjamite and the founder of a family of Benjamites; 3) father or progenitor of Ibneiah and a Benjamite; maybe same as 2; 4) a descendant of Aaron and a priest of the family of Immer; son of Pashur and father of Adaiah; 5) another priest; maybe same as 4; 6) a resident of Gedor and father of one of David's mighty warriors; 7) a Danite whose son or descendant Azareel was head of the tribe in the time of David; 8) father of Azariah one of the captains with Jehoiada in the time of Athaliah (譯作: Jeroham.)
H3396: ירחמאל | 意義: Jerahmeel = "may God have pity"; 1) the 1st son of Hezron,  grandson of Pharez,  and great grandson of Judah and the founder of the family of Jerahmeelites; 2) officer sent by king Jehoiakim of Judah to arrest Baruch; 3) a Merarite Levite the representative of the family of Kish,  the son of Mahli (譯作: Jerahmeel.)
H3397: ירחמאלי | 意義: Jerahmeelites = see Jerahmeel "may God have pity"; 1) the descendants of Jerahmeel,  the great grandson of Judah (譯作: Jerahmeelites.)
H3398: ירחע | 意義: Jarha = "the month of sweeping away"; 1) the Egyptian slave of Sheshan,  about the time of Eli,  to whom his master gave his daughter or heir as wife (譯作: Jarha.)
H3399: ירט | 意義: 1) to precipitate,  be precipitate,  push headlong,  drive recklessly; 1a) (Qal) to precipitate,  wring out,  be precipitate (譯作: be perverse, turn over.)
H3400: יריאל | 意義: Jeriel = "taught by God"; 1) one of the 6 heads of the house of Tola of the tribe of Issachar (譯作: Jeriel. Compare <w src="3385" lemma="יְרוּאֵל" xlit="Yᵉrûwʼêl" POS="yer-oo-ale'"/>.)
H3401: יריב | 意義: 1) contender,  opponent,  adversary (譯作: that content(-eth), that strive.)
H3402: יריב | 意義: Jarib = "he contends"; 1) a son of Simeon; 2) one of the chief men of Israel who returned from exile with Ezra; 3) son of Jozadak and a priest of the house of Jeshua who married a foreign wife and was compelled by Ezra to put her away (譯作: Jarib.)
H3403: יריבי | 意義: Jeribai = "my contentions"; 1) a descendant of Elnaam and one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Jeribai.)
H3404: יריה | 意義: Jerijah or Jeriah = " taught by Jehovah"; 1) a Kohathite Levite and chief of the house of Hebron when David organised the service (譯作: Jeriah, Jerijah.)
H3405: יריחו | 意義: Jericho = "its moon"; 1) a city 5 miles (8 km) west of the Jordan and 7 miles (11.5 km) north of the Dead Sea and the first city conquered by the Israelites upon entering the promised land of Canaan (譯作: Jericho.)
H3406: ירימות | 意義: Jerimoth or Jeremoth = "He is Most High"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Bela and head of a house of Benjamite; 2) a Benjamite,  son of Becher and head of a house of Benjamite; 3) a Benjamite,  son of Beriah and grandson of Elpaal; 4) a Merarite Levite,  son of Mushi; 5) one of the men that joined David in the wilderness; 6) a Levite,  son of Heman and head of the 15th course of musicians; 7) a Levite in the reign of Hezekiah; 8) a son of Azriel,  ruler of the tribe of Naphtali in the reign of David; 9) a son of king David and the father of the wife of Rehoboam; 10) a son of Elam,  a man with a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 11) a son of Zattu,  a man with a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Jermoth, Jerimoth, and Ramoth (from the margin).)
H3407: יריעה | 意義: 1) curtain,  drape (譯作: curtain.)
H3408: יריעות | 意義: Jerioth = "curtains"; 1) the wife or concubine of Caleb,  the son of Hezron of the descendants of Judah (譯作: Jerioth.)
H3409: ירך | 意義: 1) thigh,  side,  loin,  base; 1a) thigh; 1a1) outside of thigh (where sword was worn); 1a2) loins (as the seat of procreative power); 1b) side (flank) (of object); 1c) base (譯作: [idiom] body, loins, shaft, side, thigh.)
H3410: ירכא | 意義: 1) thigh,  loin,  flank,  side,  recess (譯作: thigh.)
H3411: ירכה | 意義: 1) flank,  side,  extreme parts,  recesses; 1a) side; 1b) sides,  recesses (dual) (譯作: border, coast, part, quarter, side.)
H3412: ירמות | 意義: Jarmuth = "heights"; 1) a Canaanitish city in the lowlands of Judah with a king and located between Hebron and Lachish; 2) a Levitical city of Issachar allocated to the Gershonite Levites (譯作: Jarmuth.)
H3413: ירמי | 意義: Jeremai = "my exaltations"; 1) a descendant of Hashum who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra and was compelled to put her away (譯作: Jeremai.)
H3414: ירמיה | 意義: Jeremiah = "whom Jehovah has appointed"; 1) the major prophet,  son of Hilkiah of the priestly family in Anathoth; author of the prophetic book bearing his name; 2) a man of Libnah and father of Hamutal the wife of king Josiah; 3) a Gadite who joined David at Ziklag; 4) a Manassehite,  one of the mighty men of valour of the Transjordanic half tribe of Manasseh; 5) a Gadite and warrior of David; 6) a warrior of David; 7) a priest who joined Nehemiah in the covenant ceremony; 8) a priest also in the time of Nehemiah; maybe same as 7; 9) father of Jaazaniah the Rechabites (譯作: Jeremiah.)
H3415: ירע | 意義: 1) (Qal) to tremble,  quiver (譯作: be grevious (only Isaiah 15:4; the rest belong to <w src="7489" lemma="רָעַע" xlit="râʻaʻ" POS="raw-ah'"/>).)
H3416: ירפאל | 意義: Irpeel = "God will heal"; 1) a city in Benjamin; site unknown (譯作: Irpeel.)
H3417: ירק | 意義: 1) (Qal) to spit (譯作: [idiom] but, spit.)
H3418: ירק | 意義: 1) green,  greenness,  green plants,  greenery (譯作: grass, green (thing).)
H3419: ירק | 意義: 1) herbs,  herbage,  vegetables,  garden greens (譯作: green, herbs.)
H3420: ירקון | 意義: 1) mildew,  paleness,  lividness; 1a) mildew,  rust; 1b) paleness (譯作: greenish, yellow.)
H3421: ירקעם | 意義: Jorkoam = "the people empty"; 1) a Calebite descendant of Judah (譯作: Jorkeam.)
H3422: ירקרק | 意義: 1) greenish,  pale green,  greenish-yellow (譯作: greenish, yellow.)
H3423: ירש | 意義: 1) to seize,  dispossess,  take possession off,  inherit,  disinherit, occupy,  impoverish,  be an heir; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to take possession of; 1a2) to inherit; 1a3) to impoverish,  come to poverty,  be poor; 1b) (Niphal) to be dispossessed,  be impoverished,  come to poverty; 1c) (Piel) to devour; 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to cause to possess or inherit; 1d2) to cause others to possess or inherit; 1d3) to impoverish; 1d4) to dispossess; 1d5) to destroy,  bring to ruin,  disinherit (譯作: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poor, come to poverty, (give to, make to) possess, get (have) in (take) possession, seize upon, succeed, [idiom] utterly.)
H3424: ירשה | 意義: 1) possession,  property (譯作: possession.)
H3425: ירשה | 意義: 1) possession,  inheritance (譯作: heritage, inheritance, possession.)
H3426: יש | 意義: 1) being,  existence,  substance,  there is or are; 1a) substance; 1b) existence; 1c) there is or are (譯作: (there) are, (he, it, shall, there, there may, there shall, there should) be, thou do, had, hast, (which) hath, (I, shalt, that) have, (he, it, there) is, substance, it (there) was, (there) were, ye will, thou wilt, wouldest.)
H3427: ישב | 意義: 1) to dwell,  remain,  sit,  abide; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to sit,  sit down; 1a2) to be set; 1a3) to remain,  stay; 1a4) to dwell,  have one's abode; 1b) (Niphal) to be inhabited; 1c) (Piel) to set,  place; 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to cause to sit; 1d2) to cause to abide,  set; 1d3) to cause to dwell; 1d4) to cause (cities) to be inhabited; 1d5) to marry (give an dwelling to); 1e) (Hophal); 1e1) to be inhabited; 1e2) to make to dwell (譯作: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurking, [idiom] marry(-ing), (bring again to) place, remain, return, seat, set(-tle), (down-) sit(-down, still, -ting down, -ting (place) -uate), take, tarry.)
H3428: ישבאב | 意義: Jeshebeab = "dwelling of the father"; 1) a Levite,  head of the 14th course of the priests (譯作: Jeshebeab.)
H3429: ישב בשבת | 意義: Josheb-basshebeth = "dwelling in rest"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: that sat in the seat.)
H3430: ישבו בנב | 意義: Ishbi-benob = "his dwelling is in Nob"; 1) son of Rapha,  one of the nation of Philistine giants who attacked David in battle and was slain by Abishai (譯作: Ishbi-benob (from the margin).)
H3431: ישבח | 意義: Ishbah = "he will praise"; 1) father of Eshtemoa and descendant of Judah (譯作: Ishbah.)
H3432: ישבי | 意義: Jashubites = see Jashub "he will return"; 1) descendants of Jashub of the tribe of Issachar (譯作: Jashubites.)
H3433: ישבי לחם | 意義: Jashubi-lehem = "returner of bread"; 1) a descendant of Shelah,  the son of Judah by Bath-shua the Canaanitess (譯作: Jashubi-lehem. (Prob. the text should be pointed <w lemma="יֹשְׁבֵי לֶחֶם" xlit="Yôshᵉbêy Lechem" POS="yo-sheh-bay' leh'-khem"/> and rendered '(they were) inhabitants of Lechem,' i.e. of Bethlehem (by contraction). Compare <w src="3902" lemma="לַחְמִי" xlit="Lachmîy" POS="lakh-mee'"/>).)
H3434: ישבעם | 意義: Jashobeam = "the people will return"; 1) a Hachmonite,  the leader of the 30 mighty warriors of David; he joined David at Ziklag and was best known as the man who slew 800 or 300 men at one time; also called 'Adino the Eznite'; 2) a Korahite,  another of David's mighty warriors; same as 1? (譯作: Jashobeam.)
H3435: ישבק | 意義: Ishbak = "he releases"; 1) a son of Abraham by Keturah and progenitor of an Arabian tribe (譯作: Ishbak.)
H3436: ישבקשה | 意義: Joshbekashah = "seated in hardness"; 1) son of Heman and the leader of the 17th course of musicians (譯作: Joshbekashah.)
H3437: ישוב | 意義: Jashub = "he will return"; 1) the 3rd son of Issachar and founder of the family of Jashubites; 2) one of the sons of Bani who had to put away a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Jashub.)
H3438: ישוה | 意義: Ishuai or Isuah = "he will resemble"; 1) the 2nd son of Asher (譯作: Ishvah, Isvah.)
H3439: ישוחיה | 意義: Jeshohaiah = "Jehovah humbles"; 1) a descendant of Shimei and a chief of the Simeonites (譯作: Jeshoaiah.)
H3440: ישוי | 意義: Ishui or Ishuai or Isui or Jesui = "he resembles me"; 1) the 2nd son of Saul by his wife Ahinoam; 2) the 3rd son of Asher and founder of the family of Ishuaites (譯作: Ishuai, Ishvi, Isui, Jesui.)
H3441: ישוי | 意義: Jesuites = see Jesui "he will justify me"; 1) the descendants of Jesui ( H03440-2) (譯作: Jesuites.)
H3442: ישוע | 意義: Jeshua = "he is saved"; n pr m; 1) son of Nun of the tribe of Ephraim and successor to Moses as the leader of the children of Israel; led the conquest of Canaan; 2) son of Jehozadak and high priest after the restoration; 3) a priest in the time of David who had charge of the 9th course; 4) a Levite in the reign of Hezekiah; 5) head of a Levitical house which returned from captivity in Babylon; 6) father of a builder of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; n pr loc; 7) a town in southern Judah reinhabited by the people of Judah after the return from captivity (譯作: Jeshua.)
H3443: ישוע | 意義: Jeshua = "he is saved"; 1) an exilic priest who returned with Zerubbabel (譯作: Jeshua.)
H3444: ישועה | 意義: 1) salvation,  deliverance; 1a) welfare,  prosperity; 1b) deliverance; 1c) salvation (by God); 1d) victory (譯作: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.)
H3445: ישח | 意義: 1) a sinking feeling,  emptiness (譯作: casting down.)
H3446: ישחק | 意義: Isaac = "he laughs"; 1) son of Abraham by Sarah his wife and father of Jacob and Esau (譯作: Isaac. Compare <w src="3327" lemma="יִצְחָק" xlit="Yitschâq" POS="yits-khawk'"/>.)
H3447: ישט | 意義: 1) (Hiphil) to hold out,  extend (譯作: hold out.)
H3448: ישי | 意義: Jesse = "I possess"; 1) son of Boaz and the father of king David (譯作: Jesse.)
H3449: ישיה | 意義: Ishiah or Ishijah or Jesiah = "Jehovah will lend"; 1) a Korhite,  one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag; 2) the 5th of 5 sons of Izrahiah and one of the heads of the tribe of Issachar in the time of David; 3) a Levite,  the 2nd son of Uzziel and grandson of Kohath; 4) another Levite,  son of Rehabiah; 5) a descendant of Harim who had a foreign wife (譯作: Ishiah, Isshiah, Ishijah, Jesiah.)
H3450: ישימאל | 意義: Jesimiel = "God will place"; 1) a Simeonite chief of the family of Shimei (譯作: Jesimael.)
H3451: ישימה | 意義: 1) desolation (譯作: let death seize (from the margin).)
H3452: ישימון | 意義: 1) waste,  wilderness,  desert,  desolate place (譯作: desert, Jeshimon, solitary, wilderness.)
H3453: ישיש | 意義: 1) aged,  old man,  aged one (譯作: (very) aged (man), ancient, very old.)
H3454: ישישי | 意義: Jeshishai = "my old one"; 1) a Gadite from Gilead (譯作: Jeshishai.)
H3455: ישם | 意義: 1) to put,  place,  set,  appoint,  make; 1a) (Qal) to put,  place (譯作: be put (set).)
H3456: ישם | 意義: 1) (Qal) to ruin,  be desolate (譯作: be desolate.)
H3457: ישמא | 意義: Ishma = "desolation"; 1) a Judaite descended from Hur (譯作: Ishma.)
H3458: ישמעאל | 意義: Ishmael = "God will hear"; 1) son of Abraham and Sarah's handmaid Hagar and the progenitor of the Arabian peoples; 2) son of Nethaniah and the murderer of Gedaliah; 3) a Benjamite,  one of the sons of Azel a descendant of Saul through Meribbaal or Mephibosheth; 4) a Judaite,  father of Zebadiah; 5) a Judaite,  son of Johanan and one of the captains who aided Jehoiada in restoring Joash to the throne; 6) a priest of the family of Pashur with a foreign wife whom he was forced to put away by Ezra (譯作: Ishmael.)
H3459: ישמעאלי | 意義: Ishmaelite = see Ishmael "God will hear"; 1) a descendant of Ishmael (譯作: Ishmaelite.)
H3460: ישמעיה | 意義: Ishmaiah = "Jehovah will hear"; 1) a Gibeonite and one of David's mighty warriors; 2) a son of Obadiah and the ruler of the tribe of Zebulun in the time of king David (譯作: Ishmaiah.)
H3461: ישמרי | 意義: Ishmerai = "He keeps me"; 1) a Benjamite of the family of Elpaal (譯作: Ishmerai.)
H3462: ישן | 意義: 1) to sleep,  be asleep; 1a) (Qal) to sleep,  go to sleep,  be asleep; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to remain a long time,  be stored up; 1b2) to be festering (of leprosy); 1c) (Piel) to cause to sleep,  entice to sleep (譯作: old (store), remain long, (make to) sleep.)
H3463: ישן | 意義: 1) sleeping (譯作: asleep, (one out of) sleep(-eth, -ing), slept.)
H3464: ישן | 意義: Jashen = "sleeping"; 1) the father of one or more of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Jashen.)
H3465: ישן | 意義: 1) old,  store,  storage (譯作: old.)

H3470: ישעיה | 意義: Isaiah or Jesaiah or Jeshaiah = "Jehovah has saved"; 1) the major prophet,  son of Amoz,  who prophesied concerning Judah and Jerusalem during the days of kings Uzziah,  Jotham,  Ahaz,  and Hezekiah of Judah; author of the prophetic book by his name; tradition has it that he was sawn asunder in the trunk of a carob tree by king Manasseh and that this is the incident referred to in Heb 11:37; 2) son of Hananiah,  brother of Pelatiah,  and grandson of Zerubbabel; 3) a Benjamite; 4) one of the 6 sons of Jeduthun; 5) son of Rehabiah,  a descendant of Moses through Gershom,  and an ancestor of a Levite treasurer in the time of David; 6) son of Athaliah and chief of the house of Elam who returned with Ezra; 7) a chief of the descendants of Merari who returned with Ezra (譯作: Isaiah, Jesaiah, Jeshaiah.)

H3478: ישראל | 意義: Israel = "God prevails"; 1) the second name for Jacob given to him by God after his wrestling with the angel at Peniel; 2) the name of the descendants and the nation of the descendants of Jacob; 2a) the name of the nation until the death of Solomon and the split; 2b) the name used and given to the northern kingdom consisting of the 10 tribes under Jeroboam; the southern kingdom was known as Judah; 2c) the name of the nation after the return from exile (譯作: Israel.)

H3882: לויתן | 意義: 1) leviathan,  sea monster,  dragon; 1a) large aquatic animal; 1b) perhaps the extinct dinosaur,  plesiosaurus,  exact meaning unknown; ++++; Some think this to be a crocodile but from the description in Job 41:1-34 this is patently absurd. It appears to ba a large fire breathing animal of some sort. Just as the bomardier beetle has an explosion producing mechanism,  so the great sea dragon may have an explosive producing mechanism to enable it to be a real fire breathing dragon. (譯作: leviathan, mourning.)

H3999: מבול | 意義: 1) flood,  deluge.; 1a) Noah's flood that submerged the entire planet earth under water for about a year; ++++; Some think Noah's flood was only local. However the description of it found in Gen. 6 through 8 makes this patently absurd. If it was local, Noah had 120 years to migrate out of the area to safe ground! Why waste all that effort building a ship? He only had to move less than 1500 feet a day to reach the farthest point on the globe! With the possible exception of Ps 29:10,  this word always refers to Noah's flood. The real reason for insisting on a local flood is the acceptance of evolution with its long geological ages. Most holding that view are not willing to allow a global world wide flood to have happened less than 5000 years ago. To admit such eliminates the need for the geological ages for most of the geological column would have been rapidly laid down by Noah's flood. (譯作: flood.)

H4317: מיכאל | 意義: Michael = "who is like God"; 1) one of,  the chief,  or the first archangel who is described as the one who stands in time of conflict for the children of Israel; 2) an Asherite,  father of Sethur,  one of the 12 spies of Israel; 3) one of the Gadites who settled in the land of Bashan; 4) another Gadite,  ancestor of Abihail; 5) a Gershonite Levite,  ancestor of Asaph; 6) one of the 5 sons of Izrahiah of the tribe of Issachar; 7) a Benjamite of the sons of Beriah; 8) one of the captains from Manasseh who joined David at Ziklag; 9) father or ancestor of Omri,  chief of the tribe of Issachar in the reign of David; 10) one of the sons of Jehoshaphat who were murdered by their elder brother,  Jehoram; 11) father or ancestor of Zebadiah,  of the sons of Shephatiah (譯作: Michael.)
H4318: מיכה | 意義: Micah or Micaiah or Michah = "who is like God"; 1) the 6th in order of the minor prophets; a native of Moresheth,  he prophesied during the reigns of Jotham,  Ahaz,  and Hezekiah of Judah, and was contemporary with the prophets Hosea,  Amos,  and Isaiah; 2) an Ephraimite during the period of the judges; 3) a descendant of Joel the Reubenite; 4) son of Meribbaal and grandson of Jonathan; 5) a Kohathite Levite,  the eldest son of Uzziel the brother of Amram; 6) father of Abdon,  a man of high station in the reign of Josiah; 7) son of Imlah and a prophet of Samaria who predicted the defeat and death of king Ahab of Israel (譯作: Micah, Micaiah, Michah.)
H4319: מיכהו | 意義: Michaiah = "who is like God"; 1) son of Imlah and a prophet of Samaria who predicted the defeat and death of king Ahab of Israel (譯作: Micaiah (2 Chronicles 18:8).)
H4320: מיכיה | 意義: Micah or Michaiah = "who is like God"; 1) the 6th in order of the minor prophets; a native of Moresheth,  he prophesied during the reigns of Jotham,  Ahaz,  and Hezekiah of Judah, and was contemporary with the prophets Hosea,  Amos,  and Isaiah; 2) father of Achbor,  a man of high station in the reign of Josiah; 3) one of the priests at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem (譯作: Micah, Michaiah. Compare <w src="4318" lemma="מִיכָה" xlit="Mîykâh" POS="mee-kaw'"/>.)
H4321: מיכיהו | 意義: Micah or Micaiah or Michaiah = "who is like God"; 1) an Ephraimite during the period of the judges; 2) son of Imlah and a prophet of Samaria who predicted the defeat and death of king Ahab of Israel; 3) son of Gemariah in the time of Jeremiah (譯作: Micah, Micaiah, Michaiah.)
H4322: מיכיהו | 意義: Michaiah = "who is like God"; n pr m; 1) one of the princes of Jehoshaphat whom he sent to teach the law of Jehovah in the cities of Judah; 2) daughter of Uriel of Gibeah,  wife of king Rehoboam of Judah, and mother of king Abijah of Judah (譯作: Michaiah.)
H4323: מיכל | 意義: 1) brook,  stream; 1a) meaning dubious (譯作: brook.)
H4324: מיכל | 意義: Michal = "who is like God"; 1) daughter of king Saul,  sister of Jonathan,  wife of king David,  and mother of five; given to David as wife for the bride price of 100 Philistine foreskins; while still married to David,  her father gave her in marriage to another,  Phaltiel; at the death of Saul,  David forced her to return (譯作: Michal.)
H4325: מים | 意義: 1) water,  waters; 1a) water; 1b) water of the feet,  urine; 1c) of danger,  violence,  transitory things,  refreshment (fig.) (譯作: [phrase] piss, wasting, water(-ing, (-course, -flood, -spring)).)
H4326: מימן | 意義: Miamin or Mijamin = "from the right hand"; 1) chief of the 6th course of priests established by David; 2) a priest who signed the covenant with Nehemiah; 3) a priest who went up with Zerubbabel; 4) a priest who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Miamin, Mijamin.)
H4327: מין | 意義: 1) kind,  sometimes a species (usually of animals); ++++; Groups of living organisms belong in the same created "kind" if they have descended from the same ancestral gene pool. This does not preclude new species because this represents a partitioning of the original gene pool. Information is lost or conserved not gained. A new species could arise when a population is isolated and inbreeding occurs. By this definition a new species is not a new "kind" but a further partitioning of an existing "kind". (譯作: kind. Compare <w src="4480" lemma="מִן" xlit="min" POS="min"/>.)
H4328: מיסדה | 意義: 1) to be founded,  be laid; 1a) foundation (participle) (譯作: foundation.)
H4329: מיסך | 意義: 1) covered structure,  covert (譯作: covert.)
H4330: מיץ | 意義: 1) squeezing,  pressing,  wringing (譯作: churning, forcing, wringing.)
H4331: מישא | 意義: Mesha = "freedom"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Shaharaim by his wife Hodesh who bore him in the land of Moab (譯作: Mesha.)
H4332: מישאל | 意義: Mishael = "who is what God is"; 1) the godly friend of Daniel who Nebuchadnezzar renamed Meshach; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord; 2) a son of Uzziel and a cousin of Moses and Aaron; 3) one of those who stood at the left hand of Ezra when he read the law to the people (譯作: Mishael.)

H5416: נתן | 意義: Nathan = "giver"; 1) a son of David by Bathsheba; 2) the eminent prophet in the time of David and Solomon; 3) a man of Zobah,  father of one of David's mighty warriors; 4) father of Azariah who was over the officers of Solomon; 5) son of Attai and father of Zabad of the tribe of Judah; 6) brother of Joel of the tribe of Judah; 7) one of the head men who returned from Babylon with Ezra; 8) a man with a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 9) head of a family of Israel who shall mourn when they look on Him whom they pierced (譯作: Nathan.)
H5417: נתנאל | 意義: Nethaneel = "given of God"; 1) son of Zuar and a chief of the tribe of Issachar at the exodus; 2) the 4th son of Jesse and a brother of David; 3) a priest in the reign of David who blew the trumpet before the ark when it was brought from the house of Obed-edom; 4) a representative of the priestly family of Jedaiah in the time of Joiakim; 5) a priest of the family of Pashur who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 6) a Levite,  father of Shemaiah the scribe in the reign of David; 7) a Levite,  son of Obed-edom; 8) a chief of the Levites in the reign of king Josiah of Judah; 9) a prince of Judah in the reign of king Jehoshaphat of Judah who was sent by the king to teach in the cities of the kingdom; 10) a Levite of the sons of Asaph who played a musical instrument at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem; 10a) perhaps the same as 5 (譯作: Nethaneel.)
H5418: נתניה | 意義: Nethaniah = "given of Jehovah"; 1) son of Elishama of the royal family of Judah and father of Ishmael who murdered Gedaliah; 2) father of Jehudi; 3) a Levite,  one of the 4 sons of Asaph the minstrel; 4) a Levite in the reign of king Jehoshaphat of Judah (譯作: Nethaniah.)
H5419: נתןמלך | 意義: Nathan-melech = "the gift of the king"; 1) an official of Judah in the time of king Josiah (譯作: Nathanmelech.)

H5644: סתרי | 意義: Zithri = "protection of Jehovah"; 1) son of Uzziel and grandson of Kohath the son of Levi; 1a) more properly 'Sithri' (譯作: Zithri. [)

H5651: עבד | 意義: Ebed = "servant"; 1) father of Gaal in the time of the judges; 2) son of Jonathan and one of the sons of Adin who returned from exile with Ezra (譯作: Ebed.)

H5654: עבד אדום | 意義: Obed-edom = "servant of Edom"; 1) a Levite and a Gittite who kept the ark after Uzzah was slain by God for touching the ark while it was being taken to Jerusalem; 2) a Merarite Levite and a singer and gatekeeper; 2a) the family descended from him (譯作: Obed-edom.)
