H5656: עבדה | 意義: 1) labour, service; 1a) labour,  work; 1b) labour (of servant or slave); 1c) labour,  service (of captives or subjects); 1d) service (of God) (譯作: act, bondage, [phrase] bondservant, effect, labour, ministering(-try), office, service(-ile, -itude), tillage, use, work, [idiom] wrought.)
H5657: עבדה | 意義: 1) service,  household servants (譯作: household, store of servants.)
H5658: עבדון | 意義: Abdon = "servile"; n pr m; 1) a judge of Israel in the time of the judges; perhaps the same as 'Bedan'; 2) a Benjamite,  son of Shashak; 3) a Gibeonite,  son of Jehiel and a grandson of Gideon; 4) son of Micah in the time of king Josiah of Judah; also 'Achbor'; n pr loc; 5) a city in Asher allotted to the Gershonite Levites; located 10 miles (16 km) north of Accho; modern 'Abdeh' (譯作: Abdon. Compare <w src="5683" lemma="עֶבְרֹן" xlit="ʻEbrôn" POS="eb-rone'"/>.)
H5659: עבדות | 意義: 1) servitude,  bondage (譯作: bondage.)
H5660: עבדי | 意義: Abdi = "servant of Jehovah"; 1) a Merarite Levite and ancestor of Ethan the singer; 2) a Merarite Levite,  father of Kish,  in the time of king Hezekiah of Judah; 3) one of the family of Elam who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Abdi.)
H5661: עבדיאל | 意義: Abdiel = "servant of God"; 1) a Gadite,  son of Guni and father of Ahi and one who settled in the land of Bashan in the time of king Jotham of Judah (譯作: Abdiel. Compare <w src="5655" lemma="עַבְדְּאֵל" xlit="ʻAbdᵉʼêl" POS="ab-deh-ale'"/>.)
H5662: עבדיה | 意義: Obadiah = "servant of Jehovah"; 1) the 4th of the 12 minor prophets; nothing personal is known of him but it is probable that he was contemporary with Jeremiah,  Ezekiel, and Daniel; 1a) the prophetic book by him; prophesies against Edom; 2) father of Ishmaiah,  one of the chiefs of Zebulun in the time of David; 3) a Merarite Levite overseer of the work of restoring the temple in the time of king Josiah of Judah; 4) chief of the household of king Ahab of Israel; an devout worshipper of Jehovah who at risk to his own life hid over 100 prophets during the persecution of Jezebel; 5) a descendant of David; 6) a chief of the tribe of Issachar; 7) a Benjamite,  one of the 6 sons of Azel and a descendant of king Saul; 8) a Levite,  son of Shemaiah and a descendant of Jeduthun; 9) a Gadite chief,  the 2nd of the lion-faced Gadites who joined David at Ziklag; 10) a prince of Judah in the time of king Jehoshaphat of Judah; 11) a priest,  son of Jehiel of the sons of Joab who returned from exile with Ezra; 12) a gatekeeper in the time of Nehemiah; 13) one of the men who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah; 13a) perhaps the same as 12 (譯作: Obadiah.)
H5663: עבד מלך | 意義: Ebed-melech = "servant of the king"; 1) an Ethiopian eunuch in the service of king Zedekiah,  through whose interference Jeremiah was released from prison (譯作: Ebed-melech.)
H5664: עבד נגו | 意義: Abed-nego = "servant of Nebo"; 1) the godly friend of Daniel who Nebuchadnezzar renamed Abednego; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord; 1a) also, 'Azariah' ( H05838 or  H05839) (譯作: Abed-nego.)
H5665: עבד נגוא | 意義: Abed-nego = "servant of Nebo"; 1) the godly friend of Daniel who Nebuchadnezzar renamed Abednego; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord; 1a) also, 'Azariah' ( H05838 or  H05839) (譯作: Abed-nego.)
H5666: עבה | 意義: 1) to be thick,  be fat,  be gross; 1a) (Qal) to be fat,  be thick,  be gross (譯作: be (grow) thick(-er).)
H5667: עבוט | 意義: 1) pledge,  a thing given as security,  article pledged as security for debt (譯作: pledge.)
H5668: עבור | 意義: prep; 1) for the sake of,  on account of,  because of, in order to; conj; 2) in order that (譯作: because of, for (...'s sake), (intent) that, to.)
H5669: עבור | 意義: 1) produce,  yield (譯作: old corn.)
H5670: עבט | 意義: 1) to take a pledge,  give a pledge (for a debt); 1a) (Qal) to take a pledge,  give a pledge (for a debt); 1b)(Piel) to interchange; 1c) (Hiphil) to cause to give a pledge (譯作: borrow, break (ranks), fetch (a pledge), lend, [idiom] surely.)
H5671: עבטיט | 意義: 1) weight of pledges,  heavy debts (譯作: thick clay (by a false etym.).)
H5672: עבי | 意義: 1) thickness (譯作: thick(-ness). Compare <w src="5645" lemma="עָב" xlit="ʻâb" POS="awb"/>.)
H5673: עבידה | 意義: 1) work,  service,  ritual,  worship; 1a) work,  administration; 1b) ritual,  service (譯作: affairs, service, work.)
H5674: עבר | 意義: 1) to pass over or by or through,  alienate,  bring,  carry,  do away,  take, take away,  transgress; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to pass over,  cross,  cross over,  pass over,  march over, overflow,  go over; 1a2) to pass beyond; 1a3) to pass through,  traverse; 1a3a) passers-through (participle); 1a3b) to pass through (the parts of victim in covenant); 1a4) to pass along,  pass by,  overtake and pass,  sweep by; 1a4a) passer-by (participle); 1a4b) to be past,  be over; 1a5) to pass on,  go on,  pass on before,  go in advance of,  pass along,  travel,  advance; 1a6) to pass away; 1a6a) to emigrate,  leave (one's territory); 1a6b) to vanish; 1a6c) to perish,  cease to exist; 1a6d) to become invalid,  become obsolete (of law,  decree); 1a6e) to be alienated,  pass into other hands; 1b) (Niphal) to be crossed; 1c) (Piel) to impregnate,  cause to cross; 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to cause to pass over,  cause to bring over,  cause to cross over,  make over to,  dedicate,  devote; 1d2) to cause to pass through; 1d3) to cause to pass by or beyond or under,  let pass by; 1d4) to cause to pass away,  cause to take away; 1e) (Hithpael) to pass over (譯作: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, gender, get over, (make) go (away, beyond, by, forth, his way, in, on, over, through), have away (more), lay, meddle, overrun, make partition, (cause to, give, make to, over) pass(-age, along, away, beyond, by, -enger, on, out, over, through), (cause to, make) [phrase] proclaim(-amation), perish, provoke to anger, put away, rage, [phrase] raiser of taxes, remove, send over, set apart, [phrase] shave, cause to (make) sound, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] sweet smelling, take (away), (make to) transgress(-or), translate, turn away, (way-) faring man, be wrath.)
H5675: עבר | 意義: 1) region beyond or across (譯作: beyond, this side.)
H5676: עבר | 意義: 1) region beyond or across,  side; 1a) region across or beyond; 1b) side,  opposite side (譯作: [idiom] against, beyond, by, [idiom] from, over, passage, quarter, (other, this) side, straight.)
H5677: עבר | 意義: Eber or Heber = "the region beyond"; 1) son of Salah,  great grandson of Shem,  father of Peleg and Joktan; 2) a Gadite chief; 3) a Benjamite,  son of Elpaal and descendant of Sharahaim; 4) a Benjamite,  son of Shashak; 5) a priest in the days of Joiakim the son of Jeshua (譯作: Eber, Heber.)
H5678: עברה | 意義: 1) outpouring,  overflow,  excess,  fury,  wrath,  arrogance; 1a) overflow,  excess,  outburst; 1b) arrogance; 1c) overflowing rage or fury (譯作: anger, rage, wrath.)
H5679: עברה | 意義: 1) ford (譯作: ferry, plain (from the margin).)
H5680: עברי | 意義: Hebrew = "one from beyond"; n pr; 1) a designation of the patriarchs and the Israelites; adj; 2) a designation of the patriarchs and the Israelites (譯作: Hebrew(-ess, woman).)
H5681: עברי | 意義: Ibri = "Hebrew"; 1) a Merarite Levite of the family of Jaaziah in the time of David (譯作: Ibri.)
H5682: עברים | 意義: Abarim = "regions beyond"; 1) a mountain or range of mountains on the east of the Jordan,  in the land of Moab,  opposite to Jericho; Mount Nebo is part of this range (譯作: Abarim, passages.)
H5683: עברן | 意義: Hebron = "alliance"; 1) a city of Judah located in the mountains 20 (32 km) miles south of Jerusalem and 20 (32 km) miles north of Beersheba (譯作: Hebron. Perhaps a clerical error for <w src="5658" lemma="עַבְדוֹן" xlit="ʻAbdôwn" POS="ab-dohn'"/>.)
H5684: עברנה | 意義: Ebronah = "passage"; 1) one of the stations of the Israelites in the wilderness immediately preceding Ezion-geber (譯作: Ebronah.)
H5685: עבש | 意義: 1) (Qal) to shrivel,  waste away (譯作: be rotten.)
H5686: עבת | 意義: 1) (Piel) to wind,  weave,  weave together (譯作: wrap up.)
H5687: עבת | 意義: 1) having interwoven foliage,  leafy,  dense with foliage (譯作: thick.)
H5688: עבת | 意義: 1) cord, rope,  cordage,  foliage,  interwoven foliage; 1a) cord,  rope,  cordage,  chain; 1b) interwoven foliage (譯作: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain).)
H5689: עגב | 意義: 1) (Qal) to have inordinate affection or lust; 1a) lust (participle); 1b) paramours (participle as subst) (譯作: dote, lover.)
H5690: עגב | 意義: 1) (sensuous) love (譯作: much love, very lovely.)
H5691: עגבה | 意義: 1) lustfulness (譯作: inordinate love.)
H5692: עגה | 意義: 1) disc or cake (of bread); 1a) cake of hot stones (cake baked on hot stones) (譯作: cake (upon the hearth).)
H5693: עגור | 意義: 1) name of a bird; 1a) perhaps a thrush,  swallow,  crane (譯作: swallow.)
H5694: עגיל | 意義: 1) hoop,  ring,  earring; 1a) adornment for men or women (譯作: earring.)
H5695: עגל | 意義: 1) calf,  bull-calf (譯作: bullock, calf.)
H5696: עגל | 意義: 1) round (譯作: round.)
H5697: עגלה | 意義: 1) heifer (譯作: calf, cow, heifer.)
H5698: עגלה | 意義: Eglah = "a heifer"; 1) a wife of David and mother of Ithream (譯作: Eglah.)
H5699: עגלה | 意義: 1) cart,  wagon (譯作: cart, chariot, wagon)
H5700: עגלון | 意義: Eglon = "calf-like"; n pr m; 1) king of Moab who oppressed the children of Israel for 18 years before he was killed by the judge Ehud; n pr loc; 2) a royal city in Canaan that opposed the conquest; located in the low lands of Judah (譯作: Eglon.)
H5701: עגם | 意義: 1) (Qal) to be grieved (譯作: grieve.)
H5702: עגן | 意義: 1) (Niphal) to shut oneself in or off or up (譯作: stay.)
H5703: עד | 意義: 1) perpetuity,  for ever,  continuing future; 1a) ancient (of past time); 1b) for ever (of future time); 1b1) of continuous existence; 1c) for ever (of God's existence) (譯作: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, [phrase] world without end.)
H5704: עד | 意義: prep; 1) as far as,  even to,  until,  up to,  while,  as far as; 1a) of space; 1a1) as far as,  up to,  even to; 1b) in combination; 1b1) from...as far as,  both...and (with 'min' -from); 1c) of time; 1c1) even to,  until,  unto,  till,  during,  end; 1d) of degree; 1d1) even to,  to the degree of,  even like; conj; 2) until,  while,  to the point that,  so that even (譯作: against, and, as, at, before, by (that), even (to), for(-asmuch as), (hither-) to, [phrase] how long, into, as long (much) as, (so) that, till, toward, until, when, while, ([phrase] as) yet.)
H5705: עד | 意義: prep; 1) even to, until, up to,  during; conj; 2) until,  up to the time that,  ere that (譯作: [idiom] and, at, for, (hither-) to, on till, (un-) to, until, within.)
H5706: עד | 意義: 1) booty,  prey (譯作: prey.)
H5707: עד | 意義: 1) witness; 1a) witness,  testimony,  evidence (of things); 1b) witness (of people) (譯作: witness.)
H5708: עד | 意義: 1) menstruation; 1a) filthy rag,  stained garment (fig. of best deeds of guilty people) (譯作: filthy.)
H5709: עדא | 意義: 1) to pass on, pass away; 1a)(P'al); 1a1) to pass on,  pass over; 1a2) to pass away; 1b) (Aphel) to take away,  remove,  depose (譯作: alter, depart, pass (away), remove, take (away).)
H5710: עדה | 意義: 1) to pass on,  advance,  go on,  pass by,  remove; 1a) (Qal) to pass on,  put on; 1b) (Hiphil) to remove (譯作: adorn, deck (self), pass by, take away.)
H5711: עדה | 意義: Adah = "ornament"; 1) the 1st of the 2 wives of Lamech and mother of Jabal and Jubal; 2) a Hittitess,  1 of the 3 wives of Esau and mother of Eliphaz; 2a) also called 'Bashemath' (譯作: Adah.)
H5712: עדה | 意義: 1) congregation,  gathering (譯作: assembly, company, congregation, multitude, people, swarm. Compare <w src="5713" lemma="עֵדָה" xlit="ʻêdâh" POS="ay-daw'"/>.)
H5713: עדה | 意義: 1) testimony,  witness; 1a) always plural and always of laws as divine testimonies (譯作: testimony, witness. Compare <w src="5712" lemma="עֵדָה" xlit="ʻêdâh" POS="ay-daw'"/>.)
H5714: עדו | 意義: Iddo = "His witness"; 1) father of Abinadab,  an officer of Solomon; 2) grandfather of the prophet Zechariah; 3) a Gershonite Levite,  son of Joah; 4) a priest in the time of Nehemiah; 5) a seer in the time of king Jeroboam of the northern kingdom of Israel; 6) son of Zechariah,  ruler of the tribe of Manasseh in the time of David; 7) a chief of the temple slaves who assembled at Casiphia at the time of the 2nd caravan from Babylon (譯作: Iddo. Compare <w src="3035" lemma="יִדּוֹ" xlit="Yiddôw" POS="yid-do'"/>, <w src="3260" lemma="יֶעְדִּי" xlit="Yeʻdîy" POS="yed-ee'"/>.)
H5715: עדות | 意義: 1) testimony (譯作: testimony, witness.)
H5716: עדי | 意義: 1) ornaments; 1a) ornaments; 1b) trappings (of horses) (譯作: [idiom] excellent, mouth, ornament.)
H5717: עדיאל | 意義: Adiel = "ornament of God"; 1) a prince of the Simeon of the family of Shimei in the time of king Hezekiah of Judah; 2) a priest,  ancestor of Maasiai; 3) ancestor of Azmaveth,  the treasurer of David (譯作: Adiel.)
H5718: עדיה | 意義: Adaiah = "Jehovah has adorned Himself"; 1) maternal grandfather of king Josiah of Judah and native of Boscath in the lowlands of Judah; 2) a Gershonite Levite and ancestor of Asaph; 3) a Benjamite,  son of Shimhi; 4) a priest,  son of Jehoram; 5) ancestor of Maaseiah,  one of the captains who supported Jehoiada; 6) a descendant of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 7) a descendant of another Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 8) a descendant of Pharez of the tribe of Judah (譯作: Adaiah.)
H5719: עדין | 意義: 1) voluptuous (譯作: given to pleasures.)
H5720: עדין | 意義: Adin = "dainty" or "delicate"; 1) ancestor of a family of exiles who returned with Zerubbabel; 2) a chief among the returned exiles who signed the covenant with Nehemiah (譯作: Adin.)
H5721: עדינא | 意義: Adina = "slender"; 1) a chief of the Reubenites,  and a captain of David (譯作: Adina.)
H5722: עדינו | 意義: Adino = "his ornament"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Adino.)
H5723: עדיתים | 意義: Adithaim = "double ornament"; 1) a town in the lowland of Judah (譯作: Adithaim.)
H5724: עדלי | 意義: Adlai = "justice of Jehovah"; 1) ancestor of Shaphat,  the overseer of David's herds (譯作: Adlai.)
H5725: עדלם | 意義: Adullam = "justice of the people"; 1) a town of the Canaanites allotted to Judah and lying in the lowlands; site of the cave where David hid (譯作: Adullam.)
H5726: עדלמי | 意義: Adullamite = see Adullam "justice of the people"; 1) an inhabitant of Adullam (譯作: Adullamite.)
H5727: עדן | 意義: 1) (Hithpael) to luxuriate,  delight oneself (譯作: delight self.)
H5728: עדן | 意義: 1) hitherto,  still,  yet (譯作: yet.)
H5729: עדן | 意義: Eden = "pleasure"; 1) a place conquered by Assyria; probably located in the northwest of Mesopotamia (譯作: Eden.)
H5730: עדן | 意義: 1) luxury,  dainty,  delight,  finery; 2) delight (譯作: delicate, delight, pleasure. See also <w src="1040" lemma="בֵּית עֵדֶן" xlit="Bêyth ʻÊden" POS="bayth ay'-den"/>.)
H5731: עדן | 意義: Eden= "pleasure"; n pr m loc; 1) the first habitat of man after the creation; site unknown; n pr m; 2) a Gershonite Levite,  son of Joah in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah (譯作: Eden.)
H5732: עדן | 意義: 1) time; 1a) time (of duration); 1b) year (譯作: time.)
H5733: עדנא | 意義: Adna = "rest" or "pleasure"; 1) one of the family of Pahath-moab who returned with Ezra and married a foreign wife; 2) a priest,  descendant of Harim in the days of Joiakim,  the son of Jeshua (譯作: Adna.)
H5734: עדנה | 意義: Adnah = "pleasure"; 1) a Manassite who deserted from Saul and joined David at Ziklag; 2) a captain in charge of over 300,000 men of Judah in the time of Jehoshaphat (譯作: Adnah.)
H5735: עדעדה | 意義: Adadah = "festival" or "boundary"; 1) one of the towns in the extreme south of Judah (譯作: Adadah.)
H5736: עדף | 意義: 1) to remain over,  be in excess; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be in excess; 1a1a) excess (subst); 1a1b) surplus (participle); 1b) (Hiphil) to have a surplus (譯作: be more, odd number, be (have) over (and above), overplus, remain.)
H5737: עדר | 意義: 1) to help; 1a) (Qal) to help; 2) to hoe; 2a) (Niphal) to be hoed; 3) to be lacking,  fail; 3a)(Niphal); 3b1) to be lacking; 3b1) to leave lacking; 3b) (Piel) to leave lacking (譯作: dig, fail, keep (rank), lack.)
H5738: עדר | 意義: Ader = "flock"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Beriah,  chief of the inhabitants of Aijalon; 1a) also 'Eder' (譯作: Ader.)
H5739: עדר | 意義: 1) flock,  herd; 1a) flock; 1b) herds,  flocks and herds (譯作: drove, flock, herd.)
H5740: עדר | 意義: Eder = "a flock"; n pr m; 1) a Merarite Levite in the time of David; n pr loc; 2) a town in the extreme south of Judah on the border of Edom; site unknown (譯作: Edar, Eder.)
H5741: עדריאל | 意義: Adriel = "flock of God"; 1) son of Barzillai,  and the man to whom Saul gave his daughter Merab in marriage although she was already promised to David (譯作: Adriel.)
H5742: עדש | 意義: 1) lentil (譯作: lentile.)
H5743: עוב | 意義: 1) (Hiphil) to becloud (譯作: cover with a cloud.)
H5744: עובד | 意義: Obed = "serving"; 1) son of Boaz by Ruth and the grandfather of David; 2) a Judaite,  a descendant of Jarha, the Egyptian slave of Sheshan, in the line of Jerahmeel; 3) a Judaite,  father of Azariah,  one of the captains of hundreds who joined with Jehoiada in the revolution by which Athaliah fell; 4) one of David's mighty warriors; 5) son of Shemaiah and a gatekeeper of the temple (譯作: Obed.)
H5745: עובל | 意義: Obal = "stripped bare"; 1) a son of Joktan and the founder of an Arab tribe (譯作: Obal.)
H5746: עוג | 意義: 1) (Qal) to bake,  bake a cake (譯作: bake.)
H5747: עוג | 意義: Og = "long-necked"; 1) the Amorite king of Bashan and one of the last representatives of the giants of Rephaim (譯作: Og.)
H5748: עוגב | 意義: 1) a musical instrument; 1a) perhaps a flute, reed-pipe,  or panpipes (譯作: organ.)
H5749: עוד | 意義: 1) to return,  repeat,  go about,  do again; 1a) (Piel) to surround,  go round and round; 1b) (Pilel) to restore,  relieve; 1c) (Hithpalel) to be restored; 2) to bear witness; 2a) (Qal) to bear witness,  say again and again; 2b) (Hiphil); 2b1) to testify,  bear witness; 2b2) to cause to testify,  take or call as witness,  invoke; 2b3) to protest,  affirm solemnly,  warn,  exhort or enjoin solemnly, admonish,  charge; 2c) (Hophal) to protest,  give warning (譯作: admonish, charge, earnestly, lift up, protest, call (take) to record, relieve, rob, solemnly, stand upright, testify, give warning, (bear, call to, give, take to) witness.)
H5750: עוד | 意義: subst; 1) a going round,  continuance; adv; 2) still,  yet, again, besides; 2a) still,  yet (of continuance or persistence); 2b) still,  yet,  more (of addition or repetition); 2c) again; 2d) still,  moreover,  besides (譯作: again, [idiom] all life long, at all, besides, but, else, further(-more), henceforth, (any) longer, (any) more(-over), [idiom] once, since, (be) still, when, (good, the) while (having being), (as, because, whether, while) yet (within).)
H5751: עוד | 意義: 1) still,  while,  yet (譯作: while.)
H5752: עודד | 意義: Oded = "restorer"; 1) father of Azariah the prophet in the reign of king Asa of Judah; 2) a prophet of Jehovah in Samaria at the time of Pekah's invasion of Judah (譯作: Oded.)
H5753: עוה | 意義: 1) to bend,  twist,  distort; 1a) (Niphal) to be bent,  be bowed down,  be twisted,  be perverted; 1b) (Piel) to twist,  distort; 1c) (Hiphil) to do perversely; 2) to commit iniquity,  do wrong,  pervert; 2a) (Qal) to do wrong,  commit iniquity; 2b) (Hiphil) to commit iniquity (譯作: do amiss, bow down, make crooked, commit iniquity, pervert, (do) perverse(-ly), trouble, [idiom] turn, do wickedly, do wrong.)
H5754: עוה | 意義: 1) distortion,  ruin (譯作: [idiom] overturn.)
H5755: עוה | 意義: Ava or Ivah = "ruin"; 1) a city conquered by the Assyrians (譯作: Ava, Ivah.)
H5756: עוז | 意義: 1) (Hiphil) to take refuge,  bring to refuge,  seek refuge (譯作: gather (self, self to flee), retire.)
H5757: עוי | 意義: Avims or Avites = "perverters"; 1) inhabitants of Ava or Ivah (譯作: Avims, Avites.)
H5758: עויא | 意義: 1) perversity,  iniquity (譯作: iniquity.)
H5759: עויל | 意義: 1) young male or man or boy,  boy (譯作: young child, little one.)
H5760: עויל | 意義: 1) perverse one,  unjust one (譯作: ungodly.)
H5761: עוים | 意義: Avim = "ruins"; n pr m; 1) a people among the early inhabitants of Palestine located in the southwest corner of the seacoast; n pr loc; 2) a city in Benjamin (譯作: Avim.)
H5762: עוית | 意義: Avith = "ruins"; 1) the city of Hadad Ben-Bedad, one of the kings of Edom (譯作: Avith.)
H5763: עול | 意義: 1) to give suck,  suckle,  nurse; 1a) (Qal) giving suck (participle) (譯作: milch, (ewe great) with young.)
H5764: עול | 意義: 1) suckling,  sucking child (譯作: sucking child, infant.)

H5766: עול | 意義: 1) injustice,  unrighteousness,  wrong; 1a) violent deeds of injustice; 1b) injustice (of speech); 1c) injustice (generally) (譯作: iniquity, perverseness, unjust(-ly), unrighteousness(-ly); wicked(-ness).)
H5767: עול | 意義: 1) unjust one,  perverse one,  unrighteous one (譯作: unjust, unrighteous, wicked.)
H5768: עולל | 意義: 1) child,  boy (譯作: babe, (young) child, infant, little one.)
H5769: עולם | 意義: 1) long duration,  antiquity,  futurity,  for ever,  ever,  everlasting, evermore,  perpetual,  old,  ancient,  world; 1a) ancient time,  long time (of past); 1b) (of future); 1b1) for ever,  always; 1b2) continuous existence,  perpetual; 1b3) everlasting,  indefinite or unending future,  eternity (譯作: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of the) world ([phrase] without end). H5771: עון | 意義: 1) perversity, depravity, iniquity,  guilt or punishment of iniquity; 1a) iniquity; 1b) guilt of iniquity,  guilt (as great),  guilt (of condition); 1c) consequence of or punishment for iniquity (譯作: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.)
H5772: עונה | 意義: 1) cohabitation,  conjugal rights (譯作: duty of marriage.)
H5773: עועה | 意義: 1) distorting,  perverting,  warping (譯作: [idiom] perverse.)
H5774: עוף | 意義: v; 1) to fly,  fly about,  fly away; 1a)(Qal); 1a1) to fly,  hover; 1a2) to fly away; 1b) (Hiphil) to cause to fly,  light upon; 1c) (Polel); 1c1) to fly about or to and fro; 1c2) to cause to fly to and fro,  brandish; 1d) (Hithpolel) to fly away; 2) (Qal) to cover,  be dark; n f; 3) gloom (譯作: brandish, be (wax) faint, flee away, fly (away), [idiom] set, shine forth, weary.)
H5775: עוף | 意義: 1) flying creatures,  fowl,  insects,  birds; 1a) fowl,  birds; 1b) winged insects (譯作: bird, that flieth, flying, fowl.)
H5776: עוף | 意義: 1) fowl (譯作: fowl.)
H5777: עופרת | 意義: 1) lead (譯作: lead.)
H5778: עופי | 意義: Ephai = "gloomy"; 1) a Netophathite,  whose sons were among the captains of the forces left in Judah after the deportation to Babylon (譯作: Ephai (from margin).)
H5779: עוץ | 意義: 1) (Qal) to counsel,  plan (譯作: take advice ((counsel) together).)
H5780: עוץ | 意義: Uz = "wooded"; n pr m; 1) son of Aram and grandson of Seth; 2) son of Nahor by Milcah; 3) an Edomite,  son of Dishan and grandson of Seir; n pr loc; 4) the country of Job; probably east and southeast of Palestine somewhere in the Arabian desert (譯作: Uz.)
H5781: עוק | 意義: 1) (Hiphil) to totter,  cause to totter,  crush; 1a) meaning dubious (譯作: be pressed.)
H5782: עור | 意義: 1) to rouse oneself,  awake,  awaken,  incite; 1a) (Qal) to rouse oneself,  awake; 1b) (Niphal) to be roused; 1c) (Polel) to stir up,  rouse,  incite; 1d) (Hithpolel) to be excited,  be triumphant; 1e) (Hiphil); 1e1) to rouse,  stir up; 1e2) to act in an aroused manner,  awake (譯作: (a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).)
H5783: עור | 意義: 1) (Niphal) to be exposed,  be bared,  be laid bare (譯作: be made naked.)
H5784: עור | 意義: 1) chaff (譯作: chaff.)
H5785: עור | 意義: 1) skin,  hide; 1a) skin (of men); 1b) hide (of animals) (譯作: hide, leather, skin.)
H5786: עור | 意義: 1) (Piel) to blind,  make blind,  put out the eyes of (譯作: blind, put out. See also <w src="5895" lemma="עַיִר" xlit="ʻayir" POS="ah'-yeer"/>.)
H5787: עור | 意義: 1) blind; 1a) blind (physically); 1b) blind (fig.) (譯作: blind (men, people).)
H5788: עורון | 意義: 1) blindness (譯作: blind(-ness).)
H5789: עוש | 意義: 1) (Qal) to lend aid,  come to help,  hasten (譯作: assemble self.)
H5790: עות | 意義: 1) (Qal) to hasten to,  help,  succour; 1a) meaning dubious (譯作: speak in season.)
H5791: עות | 意義: 1) to be bent,  be crooked,  bend,  make crooked,  pervert; 1a)(Piel); 1a1) to make crooked,  falsify,  pervert,  subvert; 1a2) to bend,  make crooked; 1b) (Pual) thing bent (participle); 1c) (Hithpael) to bend oneself (譯作: bow self, (make) crooked., falsifying, overthrow, deal perversely, pervert, subvert, turn upside down.)
H5792: עותה | 意義: 1) subversion,  bending (譯作: wrong.)
H5793: עותי | 意義: Uthai = "helpful"; 1) son of Ammihud and a descendant of Pharez of Judah; 2) one of the sons of Bigvai who returned from exile with the 2nd caravan with Ezra (譯作: Uthai.)
H5794: עז | 意義: 1) strong,  mighty,  fierce (譯作: fierce, [phrase] greedy, mighty, power, roughly, strong.)
H5795: עז | 意義: 1) female goat,  she-goat,  goat,  kid (譯作: (she) goat, kid.)
H5796: עז | 意義: 1) she-goat (譯作: goat.)
H5797: עז | 意義: 1) might,  strength; 1a) material or physical; 1b) personal or social or political (譯作: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.)
H5798: עזא | 意義: Uzza or Uzzah = "strength"; n pr m; 1) a man slain by Jehovah for touching the sacred ark; 2) a Benjamite of the sons of Ehud; 3) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel; 4) a Merarite Levite; n pr loc; 5) the garden where kings Manasseh and Amon of Judah were buried (譯作: Uzza, Uzzah.)
H5799: עזאזל | 意義: 1) entire removal,  scapegoat; 1a) refers to the goat used for sacrifice for the sins of the people; 1b) meaning dubious (譯作: scapegoat.)
H5800: עזב | 意義: 1) to leave,  loose,  forsake; 1a) (Qal) to leave; 1a1) to depart from,  leave behind,  leave,  let alone; 1a2) to leave,  abandon,  forsake,  neglect,  apostatise; 1a3) to let loose,  set free,  let go,  free; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be left to; 1b2) to be forsaken; 1c) (Pual) to be deserted; 2) to restore,  repair; 2a) (Qal) to repair (譯作: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, [idiom] surely.)
H5801: עזבון | 意義: 1) wares,  goods (譯作: fair, ware.)
H5802: עזבוק | 意義: Azbuk = "strong devastation"; 1) father of Nehemiah,  leader of half the district of Beth Zur,  and a repairer of the walls of Jerusalem under another Nehemiah (譯作: Azbuk.)
H5803: עזגד | 意義: Azgad = "Gad is mighty"; 1) ancestor of a family of laymen who returned from exile with Zerubbabel; 2) a man who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah (譯作: Azgad.)
H5804: עזה | 意義: Azzah = "the strong"; 1) another name for 'Gaza',   a city of the Philistines located in the extreme southwest of Palestine close to the Mediterranean (譯作: Azzah, Gaza.)
H5805: עזובה | 意義: 1) forsakenness,  desolation (譯作: forsaking.)
H5806: עזובה | 意義: Azubah = "forsaken"; 1) wife of Caleb,  the son of Hezron; 2) daughter of Shilhi,  wife of king Asa,  and mother of king Jehoshaphat of Judah (譯作: Azubah.)
H5807: עזוז | 意義: 1) strength,  fierceness,  might (譯作: might, strength.)
H5808: עזוז | 意義: 1) powerful,  mighty (譯作: power, strong.)
H5809: עזור | 意義: Azur or Azzur = "he that assists"; 1) a Benjamite of Gibeon,  father of the false prophet Hananiah; 2) father of Jaazaniah,  one of the princes against whom Ezekiel was commanded to prophecy (譯作: Azur, Azzur.)
H5810: עזז | 意義: 1) to be strong; 1a) (Qal) to be strong,  prevail; 1b) (Hiphil) to make firm,  strengthen (譯作: harden, impudent, prevail, strengthen (self), be strong.)
H5811: עזז | 意義: Azaz = "strong"; 1) a Reubenite,  father of Bela (譯作: Azaz.)
H5812: עזזיהו | 意義: Azaziah = "Jehovah is mighty"; 1) a Levite musician in the reign of David who played the harp in the procession which brought the ark from Obed-edom to Jerusalem; 2) a Levite in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah in charge of the tithes; 3) father of Hoshea,  prince of the tribe of Ephraim when David took the census (譯作: Azaziah.)
H5813: עזי | 意義: Uzzi = "strong"; 1) a Levite,  son of Bukki and father of Zerahiah in the line of the high priest although apparently never high priest himself; 2) son of Tola and grandson of Issachar; 3) a Benjamite,  son of Bela and head of a family of Benjamin; 4) son of Michri and father of Elah and an ancestor of a family of returned exiles settling in Jerusalem. Maybe same as 3; 5) a Levite,  son of Bani,  and an overseer of the Levites in Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 6) a priest,  chief of the father's house of Jedaiah,  in the time of Joiakim the high priest; 7) one of the priests who helped Ezra in the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem. Maybe same as 6 (譯作: Uzzi.)
H5814: עזיא | 意義: Uzzia = "strength of Jehovah"; 1) one of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Uzzia.)
H5815: עזיאל | 意義: Aziel = "whom God comforts"; 1) a Levite; also 'Jaaziel' (譯作: Aziel. Compare <w src="3268" lemma="יַעֲזִיאֵל" xlit="Yaʻăzîyʼêl" POS="yah-az-ee-ale'"/>.)
H5816: עזיאל | 意義: Uzziel = "my strength is God"; 1) the 4th son of Kohath and grandson of Levi,  uncle of Moses and Aaron; 2) a Simeonite captain,  son of Ishi, in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah; 3) descendant of Bela,  head of a family in the tribe of Benjamin; 4) a musician of the sons of Heman in the time of David; 5) a Levite of the sons of Jeduthun in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah; 6) son of Harhaiah,  probably a priest and a goldsmith,  who took part in repairing the wall under Nehemiah (譯作: Uzziel.)
H5817: עזיאלי | 意義: Uzzielites = see Uzziel "my strength is God"; 1) descendants of Uzziel (譯作: Uzzielites.)
H5818: עזיה | 意義: Uzziah = "my strength is Jehovah"; 1) son of king Amaziah of Judah and king of Judah himself for 52 years; also 'Azariah'; 2) a Kohathite Levite and ancestor of Samuel; 3) a priest of the sons of Harim who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 4) a Judaite,  father of Athaiah or Uthai; 5) father of Jehonathan,  one of David's overseers (譯作: Uzziah.)
H5819: עזיזא | 意義: Aziza = "strong"; 1) a layman of the family of Zattu who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Aziza.)
H5820: עזמות | 意義: Azmaveth = "strong unto death"; n pr m; 1) one of David's mighty warriors; 2) a descendant of Mephibosheth,  the son of Jonathan and grandson of king Saul; 3) a Benjamite,  father of Jeziel and Pelet who were two of David's men who joined him at Ziklag; 4) overseer of the royal treasures in the reign of David; n pr loc; 5) a place in Benjamin; also 'Beth-azmeveth' (譯作: Azmaveth. See also <w src="1041" lemma="בֵּית עַזְמָוֶת" xlit="Bêyth ʻAzmâveth" POS="bayth az-maw'-veth"/>.)
H5821: עזן | 意義: Azzan = "very strong"; 1) father of Paltiel prince of the tribe of Issachar who represented his tribe in the division of the promised land (譯作: Azzan.)
H5822: עזניה | 意義: 1) an unclean bird of prey; 1a) osprey,  black eagle,  buzzard; 1b) perhaps an extinct bird,  exact meaning unknown (譯作: ospray.)
H5823: עזק | 意義: 1) (Piel) to dig about (譯作: fence about.)
H5824: עזקא | 意義: 1) signet-ring (譯作: signet.)
H5825: עזקה | 意義: Azekah = "dug over"; 1) a town in the lowlands of Judah (譯作: Azekah.)
H5826: עזר | 意義: 1) to help,  succour,  support; 1a) (Qal) to help; 1b) (Niphal) to be helped; 1c) (Hiphil) to help (譯作: help, succour.)
H5827: עזר | 意義: Ezer = "treasure"; 1) son of Ephraim who was slain by inhabitants of Gath; 2) a priest who helped at the dedication of the walls of Jerusalem under Nehemiah (譯作: Ezer. Compare <w src="5829" lemma="עֵזֶר" xlit="ʻÊzer" POS="ay'-zer"/>.)
H5828: עזר | 意義: 1) help,  succour; 1a) help,  succour; 1b) one who helps (譯作: help.)
H5829: עזר | 意義: Ezer = "treasure"; 1) father of Hushah of the sons of Hur; 2) a Gadite chief who fought with David; 3) a Levite who aided in repairing the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Ezer. Compare <w src="5827" lemma="עֶזֶר" xlit="ʻEzer" POS="eh'-zer"/>.)
H5830: עזרא | 意義: Ezra = "help"; 1) the priest and scribe who led the reforms of the returned exiles in Jerusalem; co-worker with Nehemiah; 2) a priest with Zerubbabel; 3) another post-exilic Jew (譯作: Ezra.)
H5831: עזרא | 意義: Ezra = "help"; 1) the priest and scribe who led the reforms of the returned exiles in Jerusalem; co-worker with Nehemiah (譯作: Ezra.)
H5832: עזראל | 意義: Azarael or Azareel = "God has helped"; 1) a Korhite warrior of David who joined him at Ziklag; 2) a Levite musician of the family of Heman in the time of David; 3) a Danite,  son of Jeroham and a prince of the tribe at the census of David; 4) one of the sons of Bani who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 5) a priest,  ancestor of Maasiai or Amashai,  a priest in Jerusalem after the return from exile; 6) a priest and musician in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Azarael, Azareel.)
H5833: עזרה | 意義: 1) help,  succour,  assistance; 1a) help,  succour; 1b) one who helps (譯作: help(-ed, -er).)
H5834: עזרה | 意義: Ezra = "help"; 1) a Judaite,  father of Jether,  Mered,  Epher,  and Jalon (譯作: Ezrah.)
H5835: עזרה | 意義: 1) enclosure; 1a) ledge (surrounding Ezekiel's altar); 1b) court (outer one of temple) (譯作: court, settle.)
H5836: עזרי | 意義: Ezri = "help of Jehovah"; 1) son of Chelub and superintendent of king David's farm labourers (譯作: Ezri.)
H5837: עזריאל | 意義: Azriel = "my help is God"; 1) a head of a house of the half-tribe of Manasseh beyond the Jordan; 2) a Naphtalite,  ancestor of Jerimoth,  the head of the tribe at the time of the census of David; 3) father of Seraiah,  an officer of king Jehoiakim of Judah (譯作: Azriel.)
H5838: עזריה | 意義: Azariah = "Jehovah has helped"; 1) son of king Amaziah of Judah and king of Judah himself for 52 years; also 'Uzziah'; 2) the godly friend of Daniel who Nebuchadnezzar renamed Abednego; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord; 2a) also, 'Abednego' ( H05664 or  H05665); 3) son of Nathan and an officer of Solomon; perhaps David's grandson and Solomon's nephew; 4) a prophet in the days of king Asa of Judah; 5) son of king Jehoshaphat of Judah and brother to 5; 6) another son of king Jehoshaphat of Judah and brother to 4; 7) a priest,  son of Ahimaaz,  grandson of Zadok and high priest in the reign of king Solomon; 8) the high priest in the reign of king Uzziah of Judah; 9) a priest who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah; probably same as 18; 10) a Kohathite Levite,  father of Joel in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah; 11) a Merarite Levite,  son of Jehalelel in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah; 12) a Kohathite Levite,  son of Zephaniah and ancestor of Samuel the prophet; 13) a Levite who helped Ezra in instructing the people in the law; 14) son of Jeroham and one of the temple captains of Judah in the time of queen Athaliah; probably the same as 21; 15) son of Maaseiah who repaired part of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 16) one of the leaders who returned from Babylon with Zerubbabel; 17) a man who assisted in the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; probably the same as 10; 18) son of Johanan,  one of the captains of Ephraim in the reign of king Ahaz of Judah; 19) a Judaite,  son of Ethan of the sons of Zerah; 20) a Judaite,  son of Jehu of the family of the Jerahmeelites and descended from Jarha the Egyptian slave of Sheshan; probably one of the captains of the time of queen Athaliah and the same as 15; 21) a priest,  son of Hilkiah; 22) a priest,  son of Johanan; 23) son of king Jehoram of Judah; probably clerical error for 'Ahaziah'; 24) son of Meraioth; 25) son of Hoshaiah and one of the proud men who confronted Jeremiah (譯作: Azariah.)
H5839: עזריה | 意義: Azariah = "Jehovah has helped"; 1) the godly friend of Daniel who Nebuchadnezzar renamed Abednego; one of the three friends who with Daniel refused to make themselves unclean by eating food from the king's table which went against the dietary laws which God had given the Jews; also one of the three who were thrown into the fiery furnace for refusing to bow down to a graven image of Nebuchadnezzar and who were saved by the angel of the Lord; 1a) also, 'Abednego' ( H05664 or  H05665) (譯作: Azariah.)
H5840: עזריקם | 意義: Azrikam = "help against the enemy"; 1) son of Neariah and descendant of Zerubbabel of the royal line of Judah; 2) a Benjamite, eldest son of Azel and descendant of Saul; 3) a Levite,  ancestor of Shemaiah in the time of Nehemiah; 4) governor of the palace of king Ahaz of Judah and victim of murder by Zichri (譯作: Azrikam.)
H5841: עזתי | 意義: Gazathites or Gazites = see Gaza "the strong"; 1) an inhabitant of the city of Gaza (譯作: Gazathite, Gazite.)
H5842: עט | 意義: 1) stylus; 1a) iron stylus with diamond tip used to write on stone or metal; 1b) reed pen used on a roll (譯作: pen.)
H5843: עטא | 意義: 1) counsel (譯作: counsel.)
H5844: עטה | 意義: 1) to cover,  enwrap,  wrap oneself,  envelop oneself; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to wrap,  envelop oneself; 1a2) to cover (the beard in mourning); 1a3) mourner,  one who covers (participle); 1b) (Hiphil) to cover,  enwrap,  envelop; 2) to grasp; 2a) (Qal) to grasp (譯作: array self, be clad, (put a) cover (-ing, self), fill, put on, [idiom] surely, turn aside.)
H5845: עטין | 意義: 1) bucket,  pail (譯作: breast.)
H5846: עטישה | 意義: 1) sneezing (譯作: sneezing.)
H5847: עטלף | 意義: 1) bat (譯作: bat.)
H5848: עטף | 意義: 1) to turn aside; 1a) (Qal) to turn aside,  turn (in order to cover); 2) to envelop oneself; 2a) (Qal) to envelop oneself,  cover; 3) to be feeble,  be faint,  grow weak; 3a) (Qal) to be feeble,  be faint; 3b) (Niphal) to faint; 3c) (Hiphil) to show feebleness; 3d) (Hithpael) to faint,  faint away (譯作: cover (over), fail, faint, feebler, hide self, be overwhelmed, swoon.)
H5849: עטר | 意義: 1) to surround; 1a) (Qal) to surround; 2) to crown,  give a crown; 2a) (Piel) to crown; 2b) (Hiphil) crown-bestower (participle) (譯作: compass, crown.)
H5850: עטרה | 意義: 1) crown,  wreath (譯作: crown.)
H5851: עטרה | 意義: Atarah = "a crown"; 1) wife of Jerahmeel and mother of Onam (譯作: Atarah.)
H5852: עטרות | 意義: Ataroth = "crowns"; 1) a town east of the Jordan in Gilead,  taken and built by the tribe of Gad; 2) a place on the boundary of Ephraim and Manasseh; 3) a place between Ephraim and Benjamin (譯作: Ataroth.)
H5853: עטרות אדר | 意義: Ataroth-adar or Ataroth-addar = "crowns of glory"; 1) a Gadite town on the west border of Benjamin (譯作: Ataroth-adar(-addar).)
H5854: עטרות בית יואב | 意義: Ataroth = "the crowns of"; 1) the house of Joab,  a place in Judah (譯作: Ataroth the house of Joab.)
H5855: עטרות שופן | 意義: Atroth-shophan = "crowns of their rapine"; 1) a town in the territory of Gad (譯作: Atroth, Shophan (as if two places).)
H5856: עי | 意義: 1) ruin,  heap of ruins (譯作: heap.)
H5857: עי | 意義: Ai or Aija or Aiath or Hai = "heap of ruins"; 1) a city lying east of Bethel and beside Bethaven near Jericho and the second city taken on the invasion of Canaan; 2) a city of the Ammonites on the east of the Jordan and apparently attached to Heshbon (譯作: Ai, Aija, Aijath, Hai.)
H5858: עיבל | 意義: Ebal = "stone" or "bare mountain"; n pr m; 1) a son of Shobal; n pr loc; 2) mountain of cursing,  north of Shechem and opposite Mount Gerizim (譯作: Ebal.)
H5859: עיון | 意義: Ijon = "a ruin"; 1) a place in the north of Palestine belonging to the tribe of Naphtali (譯作: Ijon.)
H5860: עיט | 意義: 1) to scream,  shriek; 1a) (Qal) to scream; 2) to dart greedily,  swoop upon,  rush upon; 2a) (Qal) to dart greedily (譯作: fly, rail.)
H5861: עיט | 意義: 1) bird of prey,  a swooper (譯作: bird, fowl, ravenous (bird).)
H5862: עיטם | 意義: Etam = "lair of wild beasts"; 1) a village of the tribe of Simeon; 2) a town in Judah fortified and garrisoned by king Rehoboam of Judah and located between Bethlehem and Tekoa; 3) a cliff; site uncertain (譯作: Etam.)
H5863: עיי העברים | 意義: Ije-abarim = "ruins of Abarim"; 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab; 2) a town in Judah (譯作: Ije-abarim.)
H5864: עיים | 意義: Iim = "ruins"; 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab; 2) a town in Judah (譯作: Iim.)

H5982: עמוד | 意義: 1) pillar,  column; 1a) pillar; 1b) column,  upright; 1c) column (of smoke) (譯作: [idiom] apiece, pillar.)

H5984: עמוני | 意義: Ammonite = see Ammon "tribal"; 1) descendants of Ammon and inhabitants of Ammon (譯作: Ammonite(-s).)
H5985: עמונית | 意義: Ammonitess = see Ammon "tribal"; 1) a woman of Ammon (譯作: Ammonite(-ss).)
H5986: עמוס | 意義: Amos = "burden"; 1) a prophet of the Lord who prophesied in the northern kingdom; native of Tekoa in Judah near Bethlehem and a shepherd by trade; author of the prophetic book by his name (譯作: Amos.)
H5987: עמוק | 意義: Amok = "to be deep"; 1) a priest who returned with Zerubbabel (譯作: Amok.)
H5988: עמיאל | 意義: Ammiel = "my kinsman is God"; 1) the spy from the tribe of Dan who perished in the plague for his evil report; 2) father of Machir of Lo-debar; 3) father of Bathsheba; also 'Eliam'; 4) the 6th son of Obed-edom and doorkeeper of the temple (譯作: Ammiel.)
H5989: עמיהוד | 意義: Ammihud = "my kinsman is majesty"; 1) an Ephraimite,  father of Elishama,  the chief of the tribe at the time of the exodus; 2) a Simeonite, father of Shemuel; 3) father of Pedahel,  prince of the tribe of Naphtali; 4) father of king Talmai of Geshur; 5) a descendant of Judah through his son Pharez (譯作: Ammihud.)
H5990: עמיזבד | 意義: Ammizabad = "my people have bestowed"; 1) son of Benaiah,  who commanded the 3rd division of David's army (譯作: Ammizabad.)
H5991: עמיחור | 意義: Ammihud = "people of majesty"; 1) a ruler of Syria (譯作: Ammihud (from the margin).)
H5992: עמינדב | 意義: Amminadab = "my kinsman is noble"; 1) son of Ram or Aram and father of Nahshon or Naasson and an ancestor of Jesus; father-in-law of Aaron; 2) a Kohathite Levite and chief of the sons of Uzziel; 3) a Levite,  son of Kohath; also 'Izhar' (譯作: Amminadab.)
H5993: עמי נדיב | 意義: Amminadib = "my people are willing"; 1) an unknown person noted for the swiftness of his chariots; 1a) possibly not a person but should be translated 'my willing people' (譯作: Amminadib.)
H5994: עמיק | 意義: adj; 1) deep; subst; 2) deep things,  deep mysteries (譯作: deep.)
H5995: עמיר | 意義: 1) swath,  a row of fallen grain (譯作: handful, sheaf.)
H5996: עמישדי | 意義: Ammishaddai = "my kinsman is Almighty"; 1) father of Ahiezer,  prince of the tribe of Dan at the time of the exodus (譯作: Ammishaddai.)
H5997: עמית | 意義: 1) relation,  neighbour,  associate,  fellow (譯作: another, fellow, neighbour.)
H5998: עמל | 意義: 1) to labour,  toil; 1a) (Qal) to labour (譯作: (take) labour (in).)
H5999: עמל | 意義: 1) toil,  trouble,  labour; 1a) trouble; 1b) trouble,  mischief; 1c) toil,  labour (譯作: grievance(-vousness), iniquity, labour, mischief, miserable(-sery), pain(-ful), perverseness, sorrow, toil, travail, trouble, wearisome, wickedness.)
H6000: עמל | 意義: Amal = "labour"; 1) an Asherite,  son of Helem (譯作: Amal.)
H6001: עמל | 意義: n m; 1) labourer,  sufferer,  wretched one; 1a) labourer,  workman; 1b) sufferer; adj v; 2) toiling (譯作: that laboureth, that is a misery, had taken (labour), wicked, workman.)
H6002: עמלק | 意義: Amalek = "dweller in a valley"; 1) son of Eliphaz by his concubine Timnah,  grandson of Esau,  and progenitor of a tribe of people in southern Canaan; 2) descendants of Amalek (譯作: Amalek.)
H6003: עמלקי | 意義: Amalekite = see Amalek "people of lapping"; 1) descendants of Amalek,  the grandson of Esau (譯作: Amalekite(-s).)
H6004: עמם | 意義: 1) to dim,  darken,  grow dark; 1a) (Qal) to dim,  eclipse,  be held dark; 1b) (Hophal) to be dimmed,  grow dark (譯作: become dim, hide.)
H6005: עמנואל | 意義: Immanuel = "God with us" or "with us is God"; 1) symbolic and prophetic name of the Messiah,  the Christ,  prophesying that He would be born of a virgin and would be 'God with us' (譯作: Immanuel.)
H6006: עמס | 意義: 1) to load,  carry,  carry a load; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to load; 1a2) to carry a load; 1b)(Hiphil) to lay a load on (譯作: be borne, (heavy) burden (self), lade, load, put.)
H6007: עמסיה | 意義: Amasiah = "Jehovah is strength"; 1) son of Zichri and captain of 200,000 warriors of Judah in the reign of king Jehoshaphat of Judah (譯作: Amasiah.)
H6008: עמעד | 意義: Amad = "enduring"; 1) a town in Asher on the border between Alammelech and Misheal (譯作: Amad.)
H6009: עמק | 意義: 1) to be deep,  be profound,  make deep; 1a) (Qal) to be deep; 1b) (Hiphil) to make deep,  make profound (譯作: (be, have, make, seek) deep(-ly), depth, be profound.)
H6010: עמק | 意義: 1) valley,  vale,  lowland,  open country (譯作: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also <w src="1025" lemma="בֵּית הָעֵמֶק" xlit="Bêyth hâ-ʻÊmeq" POS="bayth haw-Ay'-mek"/>.)
H6011: עמק | 意義: 1) depth (譯作: depth.)
H6012: עמק | 意義: 1) deep,  unfathomable; 1a) unintelligible (of speech) (譯作: deeper, depth, strange.)
H6013: עמק | 意義: 1) deep,  mysterious,  depths; 1a) deep; 1b) unsearchable (譯作: ([idiom] exceeding) deep (thing).)
H6014: עמר | 意義: 1) to bind sheaves; 1a) (Piel) to gather; 2) to manipulate,  deal tyrannically with; 2a) (Hithpael) to treat as a slave (譯作: bind sheaves, make merchandise of.)
H6015: עמר | 意義: 1) wool (譯作: wool.)
H6016: עמר | 意義: 1) omer; 1a) a dry measure of 1/10 ephah (about 2 litres); 2) sheaf (譯作: omer, sheaf.)
H6017: עמרה | 意義: Gomorrah = "submersion"; 1) the twin-city in evil with Sodom,  both destroyed in judgment by God with fire from heaven; 1a) of iniquity (fig.) (譯作: Gomorrah.)
H6018: עמרי | 意義: Omri = "pupil of Jehovah"; 1) king of the northern kingdom of Israel,  successor to king Elah for whom he was the captain of the army; ruled for 12 years and succeeded by his infamous son Ahab; 2) one of the sons of Becher the son of Benjamin; 3) a descendant of Pharez the son of Judah; 4) son of Michael and chief of the tribe of Issachar in the time of David (譯作: Omri.)
H6019: עמרם | 意義: Amram = "exalted people"; 1) a descendant of Kohath and Levi and father of Moses; 2) one of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Amram.)
H6020: עמרמי | 意義: Amramites = see Aram "exalted"; 1) a branch of the Kohathite family of the tribe of Levi and descendants of Amram,  the father of Moses (譯作: Amramite.)
H6021: עמשא | 意義: Amasa = "burden"; 1) son of Ithra or Jether by Abigail the sister of David and general of the army of Absalom; 2) son of Hadlai and a prince of Ephraim in the reign of king Ahaz (譯作: Amasa.)
H6022: עמשי | 意義: Amasai = "burdensome"; 1) a warrior and chief of the captains of Judah and Benjamin who joined David at Ziklag; 2) a Kohathite Levite,  father of Mahath and ancestor of Samuel; 3) a priest who blew the trumpet before the ark; 4) another Kohathite Levite in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah (譯作: Amasai.)
H6023: עמשסי | 意義: Amashai = "burdensome"; 1) a priest,  son of Azareel in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Amashai.)
H6024: ענב | 意義: Anab = "fruit"; 1) a city in the mountains of southern Judah,  18 miles southwest of Hebron (譯作: Anab.)
H6025: ענב | 意義: 1) grape(s) (譯作: (ripe) grape, wine.)
H6026: ענג | 意義: 1) to be soft,  be delicate,  be dainty; 1a) (Pual) to be delicate; 1b) (Hithpael); 1b1) to be of dainty habit,  be pampered; 1b2) to be happy about,  take exquisite delight; 1b3) to make merry over,  make sport of (譯作: delicate(-ness), (have) delight (self), sport self.)
H6027: ענג | 意義: 1) exquisite delight,  daintiness,  delight,  pleasantness (譯作: delight, pleasant.)

H6029: ענד | 意義: 1) to bind,  tie up,  bind around or upon; 1a) (Qal) to tie up (譯作: bind, tie.)
H6030: ענה | 意義: 1) to answer,  respond,  testify,  speak,  shout; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to answer,  respond to; 1a2) to testify,  respond as a witness; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to make answer; 1b2) to be answered,  receive answer; 2) (Qal) to sing,  utter tunefully; 3) (Qal) to dwell (譯作: give account, afflict (by mistake for <w src="6031" lemma="עָנָה" xlit="ʻânâh" POS="aw-naw'"/>), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for <w src="6031" lemma="עָנָה" xlit="ʻânâh" POS="aw-naw'"/>), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a) shout, sing (together by course), speak, testify, utter, (bear) witness. H6032: ענה | 意義: 1) to answer,  respond; 1a) (P'al); 1a1) to answer,  make reply; 1a2) to respond (譯作: answer, speak.)
H6033: ענה | 意義: v; 1) (P'al) to be humble,  be low; adj; 2) poor,  needy (譯作: poor.)
H6034: ענה | 意義: Anah = "answer"; n pr m; 1) son of Zibeon and father of Aholibamah,  a wife of Esau; 2) a Horite chief; n pr f; 3) daughter of Zibeon (譯作: Anah.)
H6035: ענו | 意義: 1) poor,  humble,  afflicted,  meek; 1a) poor,  needy; 1b) poor and weak; 1c) poor,  weak and afflicted; 1d) humble,  lowly,  meek (譯作: humble, lowly, meek, poor. Compare <w src="6041" lemma="עָנִי" xlit="ʻânîy" POS="aw-nee'"/>.)
H6036: ענוב | 意義: Anub = "confederate"; 1) son of Coz,  descendant of Judah and Caleb through Ashur,  the father of Tekoa (譯作: Anub.)

H6042: עני | 意義: Unni = "afflicted"; 1) a Levite doorkeeper in the time of David; 2) a Levite concerned in the sacred office after the return from exile in Babylon (譯作: Unni.)

H6048: ענמלך | 意義: Anammelech = "image of the king"; 1) an Assyrian false god introduced to Israel during the monarchy; worshipped with rites resembling those of Molech; companion god of 'Adrammelech' (譯作: Anammelech.)
H6049: ענן | 意義: 1) (Piel) to make appear,  produce,  bring (clouds); 2) (Poel) to practise soothsaying,  conjure; 2a) to observe times,  practice soothsaying or spiritism or magic or augury or witchcraft; 2b) soothsayer,  enchanter,  sorceress,  diviner,  fortuneteller, barbarian,  Meonenim (participle) (譯作: [idiom] bring, enchanter, Meonemin, observe(-r of) times, soothsayer, sorcerer.)
H6050: ענן | 意義: 1) cloud (譯作: cloud.)

H6062: ענקי | 意義: Anakims = "long-necked"; 1) a tribe of giants,  descendants of Anak,  which dwelled in southern Canaan (譯作: Anakim.)
H6063: ענר | 意義: Aner = "boy"; n pr m; 1) one of the Amorite chiefs who aided Abraham in the pursuit of the 4 invading kings; n pr loc; 2) a Levitical city west of the Jordan in Manasseh allotted to the Kohathite Levites (譯作: Aner.)
H6064: ענש | 意義: 1) to fine,  amerce,  punish,  condemn,  mulct; 1a) (Qal) to fine,  punish; 1b) (Niphal) to be fined,  be punished,  be mulcted (譯作: amerce, condemn, punish, [idiom] surely.)

H6069: ענתתי | 意義: Anethothite = see Anathoth "affliction"; 1) a descendant or inhabitant of Anathoth (譯作: of Anathoth, Anethothite, Anetothite, Antothite.)

H6078: עפני | 意義: Ophni = "mouldy"; 1) a town of Benjamin located 2.5  (4.5 km) miles northwest of Bethel; modern 'Jifna' (譯作: Ophni.)
H6079: עפעף | 意義: 1) eyelid; 1a) eyelid; 1b) of dawn,  rays of sun (fig.) (譯作: dawning, eye-lid.)
H6080: עפר | 意義: 1) (Piel) to dust,  powder (譯作: cast (dust).)
H6081: עפר | 意義: Epher = "a calf"; 1) the 2nd son of Midian; 2) a son of Ezra,  among the descendants of Judah; 3) one of the heads of the families of Manasseh on the east of the Jordan (譯作: Epher.)
H6082: עפר | 意義: 1) deer,  fawn,  stag,  young hart (譯作: young roe (hart).)

H6084: עפרה | 意義: Ophrah = "fawn"; n pr m; 1) a Judaite,  son of Meonothai; n pr loc; 2) a town of Benjamin approximately 5 miles (8 km) east of Bethel; 3) a place in Manasseh,  native place of Gideon; probably located close to Shechem (譯作: Ophrah.)
H6085: עפרון | 意義: Ephron = "fawn-like"; n pr m; 1) a Hittite,  son of Zohar and the one from whom Abraham bought the field and cave of Machpelah; n pr loc; 2) a city on the borders of Benjamin; 3) a mountain on the northern border of Judah (譯作: Ephron, Ephrain (from the margin).)
H6086: עץ | 意義: 1) tree, wood,  timber,  stock,  plank,  stalk,  stick,  gallows; 1a) tree,  trees; 1b) wood,  pieces of wood,  gallows,  firewood,  cedar-wood,  woody flax (譯作: [phrase] carpenter, gallows, helve, [phrase] pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood.)
H6087: עצב | 意義: 1) to hurt,  pain,  grieve,  displease,  vex,  wrest; 1a) (Qal) to hurt, pain; 1b)(Niphal) to be in pain,  be pained,  be grieved; 1c) (Piel) to vex,  torture; 1d) (Hiphil) to cause pain; 1e) (Hithpael) to feel grieved,  be vexed; 2) to shape,  fashion,  make,  form,  stretch into shape,  (TWOT) worship; 2a) (Piel) to shape,  form; 2b) (Hiphil) to form,  copy,  fashion (譯作: displease, grieve, hurt, make, be sorry, vex, worship, wrest.)

H6372: פינחס | 意義: Phinehas = "mouth of brass"; 1) son of Eleazar and grandson of Aaron; his zealousness for the Lord averted a plague on Israel and gained him the promise of the Lord of an everlasting priesthood in his family; 2) a priest and the son of the priest Eli; 3) the father of a helper of Ezra (譯作: Phinehas.)

H6379: פכה | 意義: 1) to trickle,  pour; 1a) (Piel) to trickle,  drop down (water) (譯作: run out.)
H6380: פכרת צביים | 意義: Pochereth of Zebaim = "here the cutting off"; 1) a servant of Solomon whose descendants returned from exile with Zerubbabel (譯作: Pochereth of Zebaim.)
H6381: פלא | 意義: 1) to be marvellous,  be wonderful,  be surpassing,  be extraordinary, separate by distinguishing action; 1a) (Niphal); 1a1) to be beyond one's power,  be difficult to do; 1a2) to be difficult to understand; 1a3) to be wonderful,  be extraordinary; 1a3a) marvellous (participle); 1b) (Piel) to separate (an offering); 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to do extraordinary or hard or difficult thing; 1c2) to make wonderful,  do wondrously; 1d) (Hithpael) to show oneself wonderful or marvellous (譯作: accomplish, (arise...too, be too) hard, hidden, things too high, (be, do, do a, shew) marvelous(-ly, -els, things, work), miracles, perform, separate, make singular, (be, great, make) wonderful(-ers, -ly, things, works), wondrous (things, works, -ly).)

H6406: פלטי | 意義: Palti or Phalti = "my deliverance"; 1) son of Raphu,  the spy chosen from the tribe of Benjamin; 2) son of Laish,  the man to whom king Saul gave his daughter Michal in marriage even though she was already married to David (譯作: Palti, Phalti.)
H6407: פלטי | 意義: Paltite = "escape"; 1) a descendant of Palti or an inhabitant of Beth-palet (譯作: Paltite.)
H6408: פלטי | 意義: Piltai = "my deliverances"; 1) a priest,  representative of the priestly house of Moadiah; an exile who returned with Zerubbabel (譯作: Piltai.)

H6432: פלתי | 意義: Pelethites = "couriers"; 1) a collective name for the guardsmen of David; 1a) probably descendants of an unknown person, perhaps Philistine mercenaries (譯作: Pelethites.)

H6466: פעל | 意義: 1) to do,  make; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to do; 1a2) to make (譯作: commit, (evil-) do(-er), make(-r), ordain, work(-er).)

H7417: רמון | 意義: Rimmon = "pomegranate"; n pr dei; 1) the deity of wind,  rain,  and storm,  worshipped by the Syrians of Damascus; n pr m; 2) a Benjamite of Beeroth,  the father of Rechab and Baanah,  the murderers of Ishbosheth; n pr loc; 3) the Rock; a cliff or inaccessible natural fastness in which the 600 Benjamites who escaped the slaughter of Gibeah took refuge; 4) a town in the southern portion of Judah allotted to Simeon; 5) a Levitical city in Zebulun located approximately 6 miles north of Nazareth (譯作: Remmon, Rimmon.)

H7967: שלום | 意義: Shallum = "retribution"; 1) son of Jabesh,  conspirator and slayer of king Zachariah of the northern kingdom of Israel ending the dynasty of Jehu; assumed the throne and became the 15th king of the northern kingdom; reigned for one month and was killed by Menahem; 2) the 3rd son of king Josiah of Judah and subsequent king of Judah; reigned for 3 months before he was taken captive to Egypt where he was placed in chains and later died; 2a) also 'Jehoahaz'; 3) husband of Huldah the prophetess in the reign of king Josiah of Judah. Maybe the same as 4; 4) uncle of Jeremiah the prophet. Maybe the same as 3; 5) a Simeonite,  son of Shaul and grandson of Simeon; 6) a Judaite,  son of Sisamai and father of Jekamiah in the family of Jerahmeel; 7) an Ephraimite,  father of Jehizkiah; 8) a son of Naphtali; 9) a Korahite Levite,  chief of a family of gatekeepers for the east gate of the temple; 9a) maybe same as 13; 10) son of Halohesh and ruler of a district of Jerusalem; also repairer of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 11) a priest,  of the family of Eleazar,  son of Zadok and father of Hilkiah in the family line of Ezra; 12) a Korahite Levite,  son of Kore,  father of Maaseiah,  and in charge of the work of the service. Maybe same as 9; 13) a Levite gatekeeper who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 14) a Levite and descendant of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Shallum.)

H8018: שלמיה | 意義: Shelemiah = "repaid by Jehovah"; 1) a son of Bani who put away his foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 2) another son of Bani who put away his foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 3) father of Hananiah who repaired part of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 4) a priest in the time of Nehemiah in charge of the treasury; 5) father of Jehucal or Jucal in the time of Zedekiah; 6) Levite upon whom the lot for the East Gate fell; in the time of David; 6a) also 'Meshelemiah' and 'Shallum'; 7) father of Nethaniah and grandfather of Jehudi,  who was the messenger sent to Baruch the scribe of Jeremiah; 8) son of Abdeel and one the men commanded by king Jehoiakim of Judah to seize the prophet Jeremiah and his scribe Baruch; 9) father of Irijah,  the captain of the guard who arrested Jeremiah (譯作: Shelemiah.)
H8019: שלמית | 意義: Shelomith = "peaceful"; n pr m; 1) a Gershonite Levite,  son of Zichri in the time of David; 1a) also 'Shelomoth'; same as  H08013; 2) son of king Rehoboam of Judah by Maacah the granddaughter of Absalom; 3) head of a family of exiles who returned with Ezra; n pr f; 4) a woman of Dan,  daughter of Dibri,  and mother of a son who blasphemed God and was stoned to death in the time of Moses; 5) daughter of Zerubbabel (譯作: Shelomith.)
H8020: שלמן | 意義: Shalman = "fire-worshipper"; 1) a contraction for Shalmaneser king of Assyria; 1a) maybe an obscure Assyrian king,  predecessor of Pul (譯作: Shalman. Compare <w src="8022" lemma="שַׁלְמַנְאֶסֶר" xlit="Shalmanʼeçer" POS="shal-man-eh'-ser"/>.)
H8021: שלמן | 意義: 1) reward,  bribe (譯作: reward.)
H8022: שלמנאסר | 意義: Shalmaneser = "fire-worshipper"; 1) Assyrian king who probably reigned between Tiglath-pileser and Sargon; invaded the northern kingdom of Israel when the last king Hoshea was on the throne; forced Hoshea to pay tribute but had to reinvade when Hoshea reneged; it is uncertain whether Shalmaneser or Sargon concluded the siege which finally ended the northern kingdom; 1a) maybe a common name for Assyrian kings in the 8th century BC (譯作: Shalmaneser. Comp <w src="8020" lemma="שַׁלְמַן" xlit="Shalman" POS="shal-man'"/>.)
H8023: שלני | 意義: Shiloni = see Shiloh "peace bringer"; 1) an inhabitant of Shiloh (譯作: Shiloni.)
H8024: שלני | 意義: Shelanites = see Shelah "quietness"; 1) a descendant of Shelah (譯作: Shelanites.)
H8025: שלף | 意義: 1) to draw out or off,  take off; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to draw out; 1a2) to draw off; 1a3) to shoot up,  draw out (of blade of grass on roof) (譯作: draw (off), grow up, pluck off.)
H8026: שלף | 意義: Sheleph = "a drawing forth"; 1) the 2nd son of Joktan and a descendant of Shem (譯作: Sheleph.)
H8027: שלש | 意義: 1) to do a third time, do three times, divide in three parts; 1a) (Piel) to do a third time,  divide into three parts; 1b) (Pual) to be three years of age,  be threefold (譯作: do the third time, (divide into, stay) three (days, -fold, parts, years old).)
H8028: שלש | 意義: Shelesh = "might"; 1) an Asherite,  son of Helem (譯作: Shelesh.)
H8029: שלש | 意義: 1) pertaining to the third,  third (generation) (譯作: third (generation).)
H8030: שלשה | 意義: Shilshah = "strong"; 1) an Asherite,  son of Zophah (譯作: Shilshah.)
H8031: שלשה | 意義: Shalisha = "thirs"; 1) a district near Mount Ephraim through which Saul passed as he searched for the asses (譯作: Shalisha.)

H8033: שם | 意義: 1) there,  thither; 1a) there; 1b) thither (after verbs of motion); 1c) from there,  thence; 1d) then (as an adverb of time) (譯作: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.)

H8035: שם | 意義: Shem = "name"; 1) the eldest son of Noah and progenitor of the Semitic tribes (譯作: Sem, Shem.)

H8037: שמא | 意義: Shamma = "desert"; 1) an Asherite,  son of Zophar (譯作: Shamma.)
H8038: שמאבר | 意義: Shemeber = "lofty flight"; 1) king of Zeboim and an ally of the king of Sodom (譯作: Shemeber.)

H8045: שמד | 意義: 1) to destroy,  exterminate,  be destroyed,  be exterminated; 1a) (Niphal); 1a1) to be annihilated,  be exterminated; 1a2) to be destroyed,  be devastated; 1b) (Hiphil); 1b1) to annihilate,  exterminate; 1b2) to destroy (譯作: destory(-uction), bring to nought, overthrow, perish, pluck down, [idiom] utterly.)

H8047: שמה | 意義: 1) waste,  horror,  appalment; 1a) a waste (of land,  city,  etc); 1b) appalment,  horror (譯作: astonishment, desolate(-ion), waste, wonderful thing.)
H8048: שמה | 意義: Shammah = "astonishment"; 1) son of Reuel,  grandson of Esau,  and a chief of Edom; 2) the 3rd son of Jesse and a brother of David; 3) son of Agee the Hararite and one of the 30 of David's mighty warriors; 4) the Harodite,  one of the 30 of David's mighty warriors; 5) another Hararite,  one of the 30 of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Shammah.)
H8049: שמהות | 意義: Shamhuth = "desolation"; 1) the 5th captain (of the military divisions) for the 5th month in the time of David; 1a) also 'Shammoth' ( H08054) and 'Shammah' ( H08048) (譯作: Shamhuth.)
H8050: שמואל | 意義: Samuel = "his name is El"; 1) son of Elkanah by his wife Hannah and judge or prophet of Israel during the days of Saul and David; 2) son Ammihud and the prince of the tribe of Simeon who was chosen to divide the land of Canaan between the tribes. Spelled 'Shemuel'; 3) son of Tola and grandson of Issachar. Spelled 'Shemuel' (譯作: Samuel, Shemuel.)
H8051: שמוע | 意義: Shammua = "renowned"; 1) son of Zaccur and the spy from the tribe of Reuben; 2) son of David by his wife Bathsheba; 2a) also 'Shammuah' and 'Shimea'; 3) aLevite,  son of Galal and father of Abda who lived in Jerusalem after the return from exile in the time of Nehemiah; 3a) also 'Shemaiah'; 4) a priest,  head of the family of Bilgah in the time of Joiakim after the return from exile (譯作: Shammua, Shammuah.)
H8052: שמועה | 意義: 1) report,  news,  rumour; 1a) report,  news,  tidings; 1b) mention (譯作: bruit, doctrine, fame, mentioned, news, report, rumor, tidings.)
H8053: שמור | 意義: Shamer or Shamir = "guardian"; 1) a Levite of the sons of Michah in the time of David (譯作: Shamir (from the margin).)
H8054: שמות | 意義: Shammoth = "desolations"; 1) the Harodite,  one of the 30 of David's mighty warriors (譯作: Shamoth.)

H8058: שמט | 意義: 1) to release,  let drop or loose or rest or fall; 1a) (Qal) to let drop or fall; 1b) (Niphal) to be made to fall down,  be thrown down; 1c) (Hiphil); 1c1) to cause to let drop; 1c2) to release,  let drop (譯作: discontinue, overthrow, release, let rest, shake, stumble, throw down.)

H8060: שמי | 意義: Shammai = "desolate"; 1) a Judaite,  son of Onam and descendant of Jerahmeel; 2) a Judaite,  son of Rekem,  father of Maon,  and descendant of Jerahmeel's brother,  Caleb; 3) a Judaite,  son of Mered and brother of Miriam and Ishbah (譯作: Shammai.)
H8061: שמידע | 意義: Shemida = "wise"; 1) a son of Gilead,  grandson of Manasseh,  and progenitor of a family in Manasseh (譯作: Shemida, Shemidah.)

H8065: שמין | 意義: 1) heaven,  heavens,  sky; 1a) visible sky; 1b) Heaven (as abode of God) (譯作: heaven.)

H8068: שמיר | 意義: 1) thorn(s),  adamant,  flint; 1a) thorns,  thorn-bushes; 1b) adamant (as sharp); 1c) a sharp stone,  flint; 1c1) perhaps a diamond (譯作: adamant (stone), brier, diamond.)
H8069: שמיר | 意義: Shamir = "a point" or "thorn"; n pr loc; 1) a town in the mountain district of Judah; 2) a town in Ephraim where the judge Tola lived and was buried (譯作: Shamir. Compare <w src="8053" lemma="שָׁמוּר" xlit="Shâmûwr" POS="shaw-moor'"/>.)
H8070: שמירמות | 意義: Shemiramoth = "name of heights"; 1) a Merarite Levite in the second rank in the choir of David; 2) a Levite in the time of king Jehoshaphat of Judah (譯作: Shemiramoth.)
H8071: שמלה | 意義: 1) wrapper,  mantle,  covering garment,  garments,  clothes,  raiment,  a cloth (譯作: apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare <w src="8008" lemma="שַׂלְמָה" xlit="salmâh" POS="sal-maw'"/>.)

H8073: שמלי | 意義: Shalmai = "my garments"; 1) a family,  descendants of Shamlai,  of temple slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel (譯作: Shalmai (from the margin).)
H8074: שמם | 意義: 1) to be desolate,  be appalled,  stun,  stupefy; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to be desolated,  be deflowered,  be deserted,  be appalled; 1a2) to be appalled,  be awestruck; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be desolated,  be made desolate; 1b2) to be appalled; 1c) (Polel); 1c1) to be stunned; 1c2) appalling,  causing horror (participle); 1c2a) horror-causer, appaller (subst); 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to devastate, ravage, make desolated; 1d2) to appal, show horror; 1e) (Hophal) to lay desolate, be desolated; 1f) (Hithpolel); 1f1) to cause to be desolate; 1f2) to be appalled, be astounded; 1f3) to cause oneself desolation, cause oneself ruin (譯作: make amazed, be astonied, (be an) astonish(-ment), (be, bring into, unto, lay, lie, make) desolate(-ion, places), be destitute, destroy (self), (lay, lie, make) waste, wonder.)

H8078: שממון | 意義: 1) horror,  dismay,  appalment (譯作: astonishment.)
H8079: שממית | 意義: 1) a kind of lizard (譯作: spider.)
H8080: שמן | 意義: 1) to be or become fat,  grow fat; 1a) (Qal) fat (subst); 1b) (Hiphil) to make fat,  show fatness (譯作: become (make, wax) fat.)
H8081: שמן | 意義: 1) fat,  oil; 1a) fat,  fatness; 1b) oil,  olive oil; 1b1) as staple,  medicament or unguent; 1b2) for anointing; 1c) fat (of fruitful land,  valleys) (metaph) (譯作: anointing, [idiom] fat (things), [idiom] fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, [phrase] pine.)
H8082: שמן | 意義: 1) fat,  rich,  robust; 1a) fat,  rich (of food); 1b) stout,  robust (of men) (譯作: fat, lusty, plenteous.)

H8085: שמע | 意義: v; 1) to hear,  listen to,  obey; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to hear (perceive by ear); 1a2) to hear of or concerning; 1a3) to hear (have power to hear); 1a4) to hear with attention or interest,  listen to; 1a5) to understand (language); 1a6) to hear (of judicial cases); 1a7) to listen,  give heed; 1a7a) to consent,  agree; 1a7b) to grant request; 1a8) to listen to,  yield to; 1a9) to obey,  be obedient; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be heard (of voice or sound); 1b2) to be heard of; 1b3) to be regarded,  be obeyed; 1c) (Piel) to cause to hear,  call to hear,  summon; 1d) (Hiphil); 1d1) to cause to hear,  tell,  proclaim,  utter a sound; 1d2) to sound aloud (musical term); 1d3) to make proclamation,  summon; 1d4) to cause to be heard; n m; 2) sound (譯作: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, make to) hear(-ken, tell), [idiom] indeed, listen, make (a) noise, (be) obedient, obey, perceive, (make a) proclaim(-ation), publish, regard, report, shew (forth), (make a) sound, [idiom] surely, tell, understand, whosoever (heareth), witness.)
H8086: שמע | 意義: 1) to hear; 1a) (P'al) to hear,  have a sense of hearing; 1b) (Ithpael) to show oneself obedient (譯作: hear, obey.)
H8087: שמע | 意義: Shema = "hear"; n pr m; 1) a Reubenite,  son of Joel,  father of Azaz,  and grandfather of Bela; 2) a Judaite,  son of Hebron and father of Raham; 3) a Benjamite,  son of Elpaal who along with his brother Beriah were heads of their fathers houses in Aijalon and who drove out the inhabitants of Gath. Probably the same as 'Shimhi'; 4) an Israelite who stood on the right hand of Ezra as he read the Law to the people (譯作: Shema.)
H8088: שמע | 意義: 1) report,  a hearing (譯作: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings.)
H8089: שמע | 意義: 1) report,  rumour,  news,  fame (譯作: fame.)
H8090: שמע | 意義: Shema = "hear"; 1) a town in Judah at the limits of the tribe toward Edom in the south; 1a) same as  H08088; this word 08090 not found in the Hebrew text (譯作: Shema.)
H8091: שמע | 意義: Shama = "obedient"; 1) son of Hotham the Aroerite,  brother of Jeiel,  both listed as mighty warriors of David (譯作: Shama.)
H8092: שמעא | 意義: Shimea = "fame"; 1) son of David by Bathsheba; 2) brother of David,  the 3rd son of Jesse; 2a) also 'Shammah',  'Shimma',   and 'Shimeah'; 3) a Gershonite Levite,  father of Berachiah,  and grandfather of Asaph; 4) a Merarite Levite,  son of Uzzah,  and father of Haggiah (譯作: Shimea, Shimei, Shamma.)
H8093: שמעה | 意義: Shimeah = "fame"; 1) brother of David,  the 3rd son of Jesse; 1a) also 'Shammah',   and 'Shimma' (譯作: Shimeah.)
H8094: שמעה | 意義: Shemaah = "the rumour"; 1) a Benjamite,  the Gibeathite,  father of Ahiezer and Joash,  both mighty warriors of David who joined him at Ziklag (譯作: Shemaah.)
H8095: שמעון | 意義: Simeon or Shimeon = "heard"; 1) the 2nd son of Jacob by his wife Leah and progenitor of the tribe of Simeon; 2) an Israelite of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Simeon.)
H8096: שמעי | 意義: Shimei or Shimhi or Shimi or Shimea = "renowned"; 1) a Benjamite,  son of Gera of the house of Saul in the time of David; 2) a Benjamite,  son of Elah and commissariat officer in the time of Solomon; 3) the Ramathite in charge of the vineyards of David; 4) son of Gershon and grandson of Levi; 5) a Levite,  son of Jeduthun and chief of the 10th division of singers in the time of David; 6) a Levite of the sons of Heman who took part in the purification of the temple in the time of king Hezekiah of Judah; 7) a Levite,  brother of Cononiah in charge of receiving the tithes and offerings in the reign of king Hezekiah of Judah; 8) a Levite who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 9) a Judaite,  son of Pedaiah and brother of Zerubbabel; 10) a Simeonite,  son of Zacchur; 11) a Reubenite,  son of Gog and father of Micah; 12) one of the sons of Hashum who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 13) one of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 14) a Benjamite,  son of Kish,  father of Jair,  and grandfather of Mordecai in the time of Esther; 15) a Levite,  son of Jahath,  grandson of Gershon,  and great grandson of Levi; 16) Benjamite,  father of Adaiah,  Beraiah,  and Shimrath. Spelled 'Shimhi' (譯作: Shimeah (from the margin), Shimei, Shimhi, Shimi.)
H8097: שמעי | 意義: Shimites = see Shimei "renowned"; 1) descendants of Shimei or Shimi (譯作: of Shimi, Shimites.)
H8098: שמעיה | 意義: Shemaiah = "heard by Jehovah"; 1) a prophet of the Lord in the reign of king Rehoboam of Judah; 2) the Nehelamite,  a false prophet in the time of the prophet Jeremiah; 3) father of Delaiah,  one of the princes of Judah in the time of the prophet Jeremiah; 4) an inhabitant of Kirjathjearim and father of Urijah,  a prophet of the Lord in the time of the prophet Jeremiah; 5) a Judaite,  son of Shechaniah,  father of Hattush,  and descendant of Zerubbabel; 6) a Simeonite,  father of Shimri; 7) a Reubenite,  son of Joel and father of Gog; 8) a Merarite Levite,  son of Hasshub in the time of Nehemiah; 9) a Levite,  son of Galal and father of Obadiah; 10) a Levite and head of the family of the sons of Elizaphan who were commissioned to bring the ark to Jerusalem in the time of David; 11) a Levite and scribe,  son of Nethaneel in the time of David; 12) a Levite,  1st son of Obed-Edom in the time of David; 13) a Levite,  descendant of Jeduthun the singer in the time of king Hezekiah of Judah; 14) a Levite,  one of the messengers of Ezra to Iddo; 15) a Levite in the time of king Jehoshaphat of Judah; 16) a Levite,  one of several in charge of distributing the free will offerings brought to God to their Levite brethren in the time of king Hezekiah of Judah; 17) a Levite in the time of king Josiah of Judah; 18) head of a family of exiles who returned with Ezra; 19) a priest,  of the sons of Harim who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 20) an Israelite of the sons of Harim who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 21) son of Delaiah,  grandson of Mehetabeel,  and a false prophet hired by Tobiah and Sanballat to give false guidance to Nehemiah; 22) a priest who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah and participated in the dedication of the wall; 23) a priest who returned from exile with Zerubbabel; 24) a leader of the people at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah; 25) grandfather of the priest Zechariah who participated in the dedication of the wall in the time of Nehemiah; 26) another of the priests who along with 25 took part in the dedication of the wall in the time of Nehemiah (譯作: Shemaiah.)
H8099: שמעני | 意義: Simeonites = see Simeon "harkening"; 1) descendants of Simeon (譯作: tribe of Simeon, Simeonites.)
H8100: שמעת | 意義: Shimeath = "report"; 1) an Ammonitess,  mother of Jozachar or Zabad,  one of the assassins of king Joash of Judah (譯作: Shimath.)
H8101: שמעתי | 意義: Shimeathites =see Shimeath "report"; 1) a family of scribes (譯作: Shimeathites.)

H8111: שמרון | 意義: Samaria = "watch mountain"; 1) the region of northern Palestine associated with the northern kingdom of the 10 tribes of Israel which split from the kingdom after the death of Solomon during the reign of his son Rehoboam and were ruled by Jeroboam; 2) the capital city of the northern kingdom of Israel located 30 miles (50 km) north of Jerusalem and 6 miles (10 km) northwest of Shechem (譯作: Samaria.)

H8113: שמרי | 意義: Shimri = "vigilant"; 1) a Simeonite,  son of Shemaiah and father of Jedaiah; 2) father of Jediael,  one of David's mighty warriors; 3) a Merarite Levite,  son of Hosah; 4) a Kohathite Levite of the sons of Elizaphan (譯作: Shimri.)
H8114: שמריה | 意義: Shemariah = "kept by Jehovah"; 1) a Benjamite,  one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag; 2) a son of king Rehoboam of Judah; 3) an Israelite of the sons of Harim who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra; 4) an Israelite of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra (譯作: Shamariah, Shemariah.)

H8202: שפט | 意義: Shaphat = "judged" or "he hath judged"; 1) son of Hori and the prince of Simeon chosen to spy out the promised land; 2) father of the prophet Elisha; 3) a Judaite,  son of Shemaiah and descendant of Zerubbabel in the royal line of Judah; 4) a chief of the tribe of Gad; 5) son of Adlai and chief herdsman for David over the herds in the valleys (譯作: Shaphat.)

H8204: שפטן | 意義: Shiphtan = "judicial"; 1) an Ephraimite,  father of Kemuel,  the leader of the tribe selected to divide the promised land between the tribes (譯作: Shiphtan.)

H8435: תולדה | 意義: 1) descendants,  results,  proceedings,  generations,  genealogies; 1a) account of men and their descendants; 1a1) genealogical list of one's descendants; 1a2) one's contemporaries; 1a3) course of history (of creation etc); 1b) begetting or account of heaven (metaph) (譯作: birth, generations.)

H8438: תולע | 意義: 1) worm,  scarlet stuff,  crimson; 1a) worm-the female 'coccus ilicis'; 1b) scarlet stuff,  crimson,  scarlet; 1b1) the dye made from the dried body of the female of the worm "coccus ilicis"; 2) worm,  maggot; 2a) worm,  grub; 2b) the worm "coccus ilicis"; ++++; When the female of the scarlet worm species was ready to give birth to her young,  she would attach her body to the trunk of a tree,  fixing herself so firmly and permanently that she would never leave again. The eggs deposited beneath her body were thus protected until the larvae were hatched and able to enter their own life cycle. As the mother died,  the crimson fluid stained her body and the surrounding wood. From the dead bodies of such female scarlet worms,  the commercial scarlet dyes of antiquity were extracted. What a picture this gives of Christ,  dying on the tree, shedding His precious blood that He might "bring many sons unto glory" (Heb 2:10)! He died for us,  that we might live through him! Ps 22:6 describes such a worm and gives us this picture of Christ. (cf. Isa 1:18) (from page 73, "Biblical Basis for Modern Science",  1985, Baker Book House,  by Henry Morris) (譯作: crimson, scarlet, worm.)
