H8597: תפארה | 意義: 1) beauty,  splendour, glory; 1a) beauty,  finery (of garments,  jewels); 1b) glory; 1b1) of rank,  renown; 1b2) as attribute of God; 1c) honour (or nation Israel); 1d) glorying,  boasting (of individual) (譯作: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.)
H8598: תפוח | 意義: 1) apple,  apple tree; 1a) apple tree; 1b) apples (譯作: apple (tree). See also <w src="1054" lemma="בֵּית תַּפּוּחַ" xlit="Bêyth Tappûwach" POS="bayth tap-poo'-akh"/>.)
H8599: תפוח | 意義: Tappuah = "the apple city"; n pr m; 1) a Judaite of the family of Caleb,  son of Hebron; n pr loc; 2) a town in the lowland of Judah; 3) a town on the border in Ephraim; 4) a territory within the boundaries of Manasseh (譯作: Tappuah.)
H8600: תפוצה | 意義: 1) dispersion (譯作: dispersion.)
H8601: תפין | 意義: 1) broken piece,  baked pieces,  pieces cooked; 1a) meaning dubious (譯作: baked piece.)
H8602: תפל | 意義: adj; 1) foolish,  insipid; 2) (BDB) tasteless,  unseasoned; n m; 3) whitewash; 2a) meaning uncertain (譯作: foolish things, unsavoury, untempered.)
H8603: תפל | 意義: Tophel = "white"; 1) a place southeast of the Dead Sea and in or near the 'Arabah' (譯作: Tophel.)
H8604: תפלה | 意義: 1) that which is empty,  folly,  silly,  foolish; 2) (BDB) unsavouriness,  unseemliness (moral) (譯作: folly, foolishly.)
H8605: תפלה | 意義: 1) prayer; 1a) prayer; 1b) pray a prayer; 1c) house of prayer; 1d) hear prayer; 1e) in Ps titles (of poetic or liturgical prayer) (譯作: prayer.)
H8606: תפלצת | 意義: 1) shuddering,  horror (譯作: terrible.)
H8607: תפסח | 意義: Tiphsah = "cross over"; 1) a place at the northeast limit of Solomon's empire; located on the Euphrates river; 2) a place in the northern kingdom of Israel which king Menahem attacked and where he ripped open all the pregnant women; 2a) might be the same as 1 (譯作: Tipsah.)
H8608: תפף | 意義: 1) to play or sound the timbrel,  beat,  play upon,  drum (on a timbrel or other object); 1a) (Qal) playing (participle); 1b) (Poel) beating (participle) (譯作: taber, play with timbrels.)
H8609: תפר | 意義: 1) to sew together; 1a) (Qal) to sew,  sew together; 1b) (Piel); 1b1) to sew; 1b2) sewing (participle) (譯作: (women that) sew (together).)
H8610: תפש | 意義: 1) to catch,  handle,  lay hold,  take hold of,  seize,  wield; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to lay hold of, seize,  arrest,  catch; 1a2) to grasp (in order to) wield,  wield,  use skilfully; 1b) (Niphal) to be seized,  be arrested,  be caught,  be taken,  captured; 1c) (Piel) to catch,  grasp (with the hands) (譯作: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, [idiom] surely, surprise, take.)
H8611: תפת | 意義: 1) act of spitting,  spit (譯作: tabret.)
H8612: תפת | 意義: Tophet or Topheth = "place of fire"; 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom south of Jerusalem. Same as  H08613 (譯作: Tophet, Topheth.)
H8613: תפתה | 意義: Tophet = "place of fire"; 1) a place in the southeast end of the valley of the son of Hinnom south of Jerusalem; 1a) same as  H08612 (譯作: Tophet.)
H8614: תפתי | 意義: 1) magistrate; 2) (BDB) name of a magistrate (譯作: sheriff.)
H8615: תקוה | 意義: 1) cord; 2) hope,  expectation; 2a) hope; 2b) ground of hope; 2c) things hoped for,  outcome (譯作: expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for.)
H8616: תקוה | 意義: Tikvath or Tikvah = "hope"; 1) father of Shallum,  the husband of the prophetess Huldah in the time of king Josiah of Judah; 2) father of Jahaziah (Tikvah) in the time of Ezra (譯作: Tikvah.)
H8617: תקומה | 意義: 1) standing,  ability or power to stand (譯作: power to stand.)
H8618: תקומם | 意義: 1) (Hithpol) a rising against (participle) (譯作: rise up against.)
H8619: תקוע | 意義: 1) a blast-(wind)-instrument,  trumpet (譯作: trumpet.)
H8620: תקוע | 意義: Tekoa or Tekoah = "a stockade"; n pr m; 1) a Judaite,  son of Ashur and grandson of Hezron; n pr loc; 2) a town in the hill country of Judah near Hebron built by king Rehoboam of Judah; birthplace of Amos; 3) a wilderness area where king Jehoshaphat of Judah defeated the people of Moab,  Ammon,  and Mount Seir (譯作: Tekoa, Tekoah.)
H8621: תקועי | 意義: Tekoite = see Tekoa "trumpet blast"; 1) an inhabitant of Tekoa (譯作: Tekoite.)
H8622: תקופה | 意義: 1) coming round,  circuit of time or space,  a turning,  circuit; 1a) at the circuit (as adverb) (譯作: circuit, come about, end.)
H8623: תקיף | 意義: 1) mighty (譯作: mightier.)
H8624: תקיף | 意義: 1) might,  strong,  mighty (譯作: mighty, strong.)
H8625: תקל | 意義: v; 1) to weigh; 1a) (P'il) to be weighed; n m; 2) tekel,  shekel; 2a) (P'al) tekel-a unit of weight, shekel (譯作: Tekel, be weighed.)
H8626: תקן | 意義: 1) to equalise,  make straight,  become straight; 1a) (Qal) to become straight; 1b) (Piel) to make straight,  put straight, arrange in order,  set in order (譯作: set in order, make straight.)
H8627: תקן | 意義: 1) to be in order; 1a) (Hophal) to be established,  be reestablished,  confirm (譯作: establish.)
H8628: תקע | 意義: 1) to blow,  clap,  strike,  sound,  thrust,  give a blow,  blast; 1a) (Qal); 1a1) to thrust,  drive (of weapon); 1a2) to give a blast,  give a blow; 1a3) to strike or clap hands; 1b) (Niphal); 1b1) to be blown,  blast (of horn); 1b2) to strike or pledge oneself (譯作: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, [idiom] suretiship, thrust.)
H8629: תקע | 意義: 1) sound,  blast (of horn),  trumpet blast (譯作: sound.)
H8630: תקף | 意義: 1) (Qal) to prevail over or against,  overcome,  overpower (譯作: prevail (against).)
H8631: תקף | 意義: 1) to grow strong,  be hardened; 1a) (P'al); 1a1) to grow strong,  be hardened; 1a2) to grow arrogant (fig); 1b) (Pael) to make strong,  make firm,  make stringent (譯作: make firm, harden, be(-come) strong.)
H8632: תקף | 意義: 1) strength,  might (譯作: might, strength.)
H8633: תקף | 意義: 1) authority,  power,  strength,  energy (譯作: authority, power, strength.)
H8634: תראלה | 意義: Taralah = "reeling"; 1) a city in the territory of Benjamin (譯作: Taralah.)
H8635: תרבות | 意義: 1) increase,  brood,  progeny,  offspring (譯作: increase.)
H8636: תרבית | 意義: 1) increment,  usury,  interest,  bonus (譯作: increase, unjust gain.)
H8637: תרגל | 意義: 1) to go on foot,  spy out,  cause to walk; 1a) (Tiphel) to teach to walk (譯作: teach to go.)
H8638: תרגם | 意義: 1) (Pual) to interpret,  translate (譯作: interpret.)
H8639: תרדמה | 意義: 1) deep sleep,  trance (譯作: deep sleep.)
H8640: תרהקה | 意義: Tirhakah = "he searched out the pious: he searched out the waiter"; 1) king of Ethiopia and Egypt in the time of Sennacherib (譯作: Tirhakah.)
H8641: תרומה | 意義: 1) contribution,  offering; 1a) a heave offering; 1b) any offering; 1c) an offering to God; 1d) an offering (of grain,  money,  etc); 1e) contribution (譯作: gift, heave offering (shoulder), oblation, offered(-ing).)
H8642: תרומיה | 意義: 1) portion,  contribution,  what belongs to a contribution or attendant or secondary contribution or subdivision (譯作: oblation.)
H8643: תרועה | 意義: 1) alarm,  signal,  sound of tempest,  shout,  shout or blast of war or alarm or joy; 1a) alarm of war,  war-cry,  battle-cry; 1b) blast (for march); 1c) shout of joy (with religious impulse); 1d) shout of joy (in general) (譯作: alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing).)
H8644: תרופה | 意義: 1) healing (譯作: medicine.)
H8645: תרזה | 意義: 1) a type of tree; 1a) perhaps the cypress,  holm-tree; 1b) meaning very dubious (譯作: cypress.)
H8646: תרח | 意義: Terah = "station"; n pr m; 1) the father of Abraham; Tarah = "delay"; n pr loc; 2) a station of Israel in the wilderness (譯作: Tarah, Terah.)
H8647: תרחנה | 意義: Tirhanah = "favour"; 1) a Judaite,  son of Caleb by his concubine Maachah (譯作: Tirhanah.)
H8648: תרין | 意義: 1) two; 1a) two (as cardinal number); 1b) second (as ordinal number); 1c) two (in combination with other numbers) (譯作: second, [phrase] twelve, two.)
H8649: תרמה | 意義: 1) treachery,  fraud,  deceit,  deceitfulness (譯作: deceit(-ful), privily.)
H8650: תרן | 意義: 1) beacon,  mast,  flagpole (譯作: beacon, mast.)
H8651: תרע | 意義: 1) gate,  door; 1a) door; 1b) gate; 1c) court (譯作: gate mouth.)
H8652: תרע | 意義: 1) porter,  doorkeeper (in temple) (譯作: porter.)
H8653: תרעלה | 意義: 1) reeling,  staggering (譯作: astonishment, trembling.)
H8654: תרעתי | 意義: Tirathites = "men of the gate"; 1) one of the 3 families of Kenite scribes living at Jabez (譯作: Tirathite.)
H8655: תרפים | 意義: 1) idolatry,  idols,  image(s),  teraphim,  family idol; 1a) a kind of idol used in household shrine or worship (譯作: idols(-atry), images, teraphim.)
H8656: תרצה | 意義: Tirzah = "favourable"; n pr f; 1) one of the 7 daughters of Zelophehad the son of Hepher of the tribe of Manasseh; n pr loc; 2) one of the kingdoms on the west of the Jordan conquered by Joshua and the Israelites; 3) a Canaanite city,  later capital of the northern kingdom of Israel (譯作: Tirzah.)
H8657: תרש | 意義: Teresh = "strictness"; 1) one of the 2 eunuchs who plotted to kill king Ahasuerus of Persia but whose plot was discovered by Mordecai (譯作: Teresh.)
H8658: תרשיש | 意義: 1) a precious stone or semi-precious gem; 1a) perhaps a chrysolite,  yellow jasper,  or other yellow coloured stone (譯作: beryl.)
H8659: תרשיש | 意義: Tarshish or Tharshish = "yellow jasper"; n pr m; 1) son of Javan; 2) a Benjamite,  son of Bilhan; 3) one of the wise men close to king Ahasuerus of Persia; n pr loc; 4) a city of the Phoenicians in a distant part of the Mediterranean Sea to which the prophet Jonah was trying to flee; 1a) site unknown but perhaps in Cyprus or Spain; 5) a city somewhere near and accessible to the Red Sea to which ships constructed at Ezion-geber on the Elanitic Gulf on the Red Sea were to sail (譯作: Tarshish, Tharshish.)
H8660: תרשתא | 意義: 1) Tirshatha-governor; 1a) a title used by the Persian governor in Judea; 1a1) Nehemiah used this title (譯作: Tirshatha.)
H8661: תרתן | 意義: 1) Tartan-field marshal,  general,  or commander; 1a) a title used by the Assyrian military (譯作: Tartan.)
H8662: תרתק | 意義: Tartak = "prince of darkness"; 1) one of the deities of the Avite people of Samaria; 1a) according to tradition,  worshipped under the form of an ass (譯作: Tartak.)
H8663: תשאה | 意義: 1) noise,  clamour (譯作: crying, noise, shouting, stir.)
H8664: תשבי | 意義: Tishbite = "captivity"; n pr loc; 1) the home of Elijah; 1a) site unknown but maybe the town of Tishbe; adj gent; 2) an inhabitant of Tishbe or Tishbi or Tesheb; 2a) site unknown and name uncertain (譯作: Tishbite.)
H8665: תשבץ | 意義: 1) woven work,  checkered material,  chequered or plaited work (譯作: broidered.)
H8666: תשובה | 意義: 1) a recurrence,  an answer,  return; 1a) return; 1a1) completion of a year, return of a year; 1b) at the return (construct); 1c) answer,  reply (譯作: answer, be expired, return.)
H8667: תשומת | 意義: 1) pledge,  security,  deposit (譯作: [phrase] fellowship.)
H8668: תשועה | 意義: 1) salvation,  deliverance; 1a) deliverance (usually by God through human agency); 1b) salvation (spiritual in sense) (譯作: deliverance, help, safety, salvation, victory.)
H8669: תשוקה | 意義: 1) desire,  longing,  craving; 1a) of man for woman; 1b) of woman for man; 1c) of beast to devour (譯作: desire.)
H8670: תשורה | 意義: 1) gift,  present (譯作: present.)
H8671: תשיעי | 意義: 1) ninth (as ordinal number) (譯作: ninth.)
H8672: תשע | 意義: 1) nine,  nonad; 1a) nine (as cardinal number); 1b) ninth (as ordinal number); 1c) in combination with other numbers (譯作: nine ([phrase] -teen, [phrase] -teenth, -th).)
H8673: תשעים | 意義: 1) ninety (譯作: ninety.)
H8674: תתני | 意義: Tatnai = "gift"; 1) a Persian governor in Syria who opposed the rebuilding of Jerusalem (譯作: Tatnai.)
